name: Senator Scott
subject: America needs a plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
For too long, Washington politicians have led America without a plan.

Congress is racking up _TRILLIONS_ in debt while our priorities as a country remain unclear.
_Enough is enough._ America needs a plan, and that’s why I released mine to [**RESCUE AMERICA.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=6942b558802641eba35c95090c4f9e76&_e=8Wp72QlJubjsLESXpvThXhz-MooeCb8NgooTP9W1Gq_jwTBZQnh3HmZo7yJmFNt5VNW9HISq8NPOJM4vFvPmTDWqOf2PEd0GpQjHwKfekizRUYu3Wu5J4MG6cZnB4q_sC8hmhd0F23_VQACf3sln8Rjmj1oisd3RBDVVhQafpIXo3qCAlGKJwSv7EKg705oqY3KrxG_Coj_tg5XJimAOQ3t4_4pyrfnLkJNC7ribh3kofh3t_kXePoRAfNF8PdR3tqXFMN3wHQzR6dZmLWJMU-LFET92Mys_7jfviZAA3RzU-REaTjxvt0fQVg3bj0t8g2rJQzkJim-RrJhtCNUF755w87jA6MPWa3tJ0MBwZdJVFC3PCgdOl52JT239YG_98Vnou1-DlMOO7G4_bkeA4g%3D%3D)
But the truth is, I shouldn’t be the only one putting out a plan for America’s future, Peter.
In fact, I’d love to see leaders from both sides of the aisle come out with their own plans so we can debate them and find the solutions that are best for the American people.
But the truth is, they are too scared of the political backlash to take a stand and release a plan.
I’ve NEVER been afraid of what the Washington insiders have to say about me, and I know you aren’t either.
My plan has everyone talking, and the DC elites are bashing it at every chance they get.
**But the people who REALLY matter - patriots like you - are standing by our side. **
[**Join our team today to RESCUE AMERICA from the radical Left and create a bright future for our great country.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=6942b558802641eba35c95090c4f9e76&_e=8Wp72QlJubjsLESXpvThXhz-MooeCb8NgooTP9W1Gq_jwTBZQnh3HmZo7yJmFNt5VNW9HISq8NPOJM4vFvPmTDWqOf2PEd0GpQjHwKfekizRUYu3Wu5J4MG6cZnB4q_sC8hmhd0F23_VQACf3sln8Rjmj1oisd3RBDVVhQafpIXo3qCAlGKJwSv7EKg705oqY3KrxG_Coj_tg5XJimAOQ3t4_4pyrfnLkJNC7ribh3kUF9a9FNOe3JoE-vGYxP3KDR9xYSn6dckEoTOw3-ALAWPTRpqLlpKORoV_fm9c3qmFkZZYIpbEQDA6PriximXYo51-bK8zMTOkuMxPzrgZM8wB4rSslBWDdB6-xA7zK6z2dhbdaUKce1T6FSZrpjrNFX3MAvG6ZT4GsDuQDz32nA%3D%3D)

Friend, the GOP saw a big surge in VA-10 last election. They held Jennifer to a win of less than seven percent — by far her closest race ever.

**They're going to be coming at us with everything they have in 2024, and if we aren't prepared by meeting our early fundraising goals, the GOP could make even more progress.**

[**I've forwarded our team's note about this week's mid-month deadline — will you help us stay on track for our goal by donating $10 or whatever you can now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196583/396320313/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230314MM2_MM_AT_FULL_10_NG_N_L3&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZjMTU1Mi1jNGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fNNxawYkkgVMKitpJFLjuOQkhCMk2BAR5EqiLXKv3dY=)

Thanks so much!

Austin Taylor
Campaign Manager

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> Look, here's why our mid-month fundraising deadline this week is critical:
> * Jennifer just faced her closest race yet, as her district shifted eleven points to the right from 2020 to 2022.
> * VA-10 is going to be a top Republican target again, and they'll be working to beat us to the punch in early field, digital, and TV communications.
> * **We won't keep pace with the GOP if we fail to meet our fundraising benchmarks — and need to raise $5,982 more by our deadline on Thursday.**
>
[**It's going to take a team effort to reach our goal this week, but we'll be in a good position if just 45 more supporters pitch in by this time tomorrow. > Jennifer's pitch is simple: she's successfully worked to deliver jobs and economic relief to Northern Virginia, and helped pass historic legislation to revitalize our infrastructure, improve access to public transportation and broadband, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and invest in climate protection and clean energy.
>
> **But that message will be lost in the shuffle if the GOP starts outspending us. And if we fall short of our fundraising goals, we risk giving them an opening.**
>
> So we're counting on you. It's because of supporters like you that Jennifer's won tough races in the past – and we'll need that same groundswell of grassroots energy this time around.
>
> **[So please chip in whatever you can today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196592/396320324/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230314MM2_MM_AT_FULL_10_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZjMTU1Mi1jNGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fNNxawYkkgVMKitpJFLjuOQkhCMk2BAR5EqiLXKv3dY=)**
>
> Thank you!
>
> Team Wexton

We won't keep pace with the GOP if we fail to meet our fundraising benchmarks — and need to raise $5,982 more by our deadline on Thursday. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = --- | | = --- | = --- | | = --- | = --- | | = --- Jennifer's pitch is simple: she's successfully worked to deliver jobs and economic relief to Northern Virginia, and helped pass historic legislation to revitalize our infrastructure, improve access to public transportation and broadband, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and invest in climate protection and clean energy. But that message will be lost in the shuffle if the GOP starts outspending us. And if we fall short of our fundraising goals, we risk giving them an opening. So we're counting on you. It's because of supporters like you that Jennifer's won tough races in the past – and we'll need that same groundswell of grassroots energy this time around. = Thank you! Team Wexton Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. =** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Greg Casar
subject: Bringing national leaders to our district
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60196898/396322317/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTVmOTNlOS1jNGMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDo_tnbPOfkrhITJh0wjou30zkvhDfhWgP8MCZphiLs=&emci=616441e2-c4c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=295f93e9-c4c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

**This past weekend, I marched in Selma, Alabama to mark the 58th anniversary of the “Bloody Sunday” march** , a seminal moment in the Southern freedom struggle for civil rights.

To protest against Jim Crow, and in response to the killing of peaceful demonstrator Jimmie Lee Jackson, leaders like Martin Luther King Jr. and Rev. Fred Shuttlesworth led a march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma.

While marching across the bridge, law enforcement brutally attacked the peaceful marchers—which included the late Congressman John Lewis—with billy clubs, dogs, and even tear gas. The march helped to galvanize the civil rights movement and exposed many Americans to the horrors activists faced while speaking out for civil rights.

While crossing the Edmund Pettus Bride myself this weekend, I thought about Congressman John Lewis’s struggle and legacy. **I walked alongside some of the same freedom fighters that marched in 1965, and they reminded me that we are not simply called to commemorate the original demonstration— we are called to continue it.**
****
_This weekend I crossed the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama, where civil rights activists were attacked by law enforcement 58 years ago while demanding federal voting rights legislation._

Right-wing extremist politicians have successfully dismantled many of the voting rights protections that John Lewis and others successfully won. We’ve seen a surge in voter suppression legislation across the country—including in places like Texas, which passed laws that shortened voting hours, restricted voting-by-mail, racially gerrymandered districts, and empowered partisan poll watchers to intimidate voters.

If you read the history closely, this type of legislation is _**exactly**_ what John Lewis and the marchers in Selma were speaking out against. Now, I’m in Congress and committed to passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the For the People Act, to guarantee voting rights and civil rights for all.

Thank you,

Greg

_Congressman Greg Casar
Texas Congressional District 35_

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: FWD: re: Silicon Valley Bank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie Porter and Elizabeth Warren just introduced the Secure Viable Banking Act.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19380%2E3422442%2EgemSq8)
Derek,
**Katie Porter and Elizabeth Warren just introduced the Secure Viable Banking Act.** This legislation would restore common-sense guardrails that Wall Street clearly needs.
In 2018 before Katie was in Congress, a bipartisan majority of lawmakers voted to repeal important regulations on Wall Street. **That repeal contributed to the bank collapses we’ve seen over the past week,** but Katie’s new legislation will reinstate some of these guardrails and help hold Big Banks accountable.
Now, Congress needs to pass this bill into law. **[Sign on to show your support.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_big_banks?source=EMAF14_1_SVB_20230314_V1_F&t=2&akid=19380%2E3422442%2EgemSq8)**
**[Sign Now ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_big_banks?source=EMAF14_1_SVB_20230314_V1_F&t=3&akid=19380%2E3422442%2EgemSq8)**
_And to learn more about the Silicon Valley Bank collapse, check out the message Katie sent Sunday._
* * *
Derek,
**As a consumer protection attorney who has spent my career taking on Wall Street, I wanted to help break down what’s happening with Silicon Valley Bank.**
Silicon Valley Bank is a well established bank that has been really important in lending to technology companies. During the pandemic, the bank grew rapidly in size. As banks do, it turned around and invested that money. But they were investing in U.S. treasury bonds, which take years to reach their full value.
The problem for Silicon Valley Bank? Interest rates have gone up, so venture capitalists are moving their money **now** to get more bang for their buck. And as of Friday, Silicon Valley Bank didn't have enough liquid cash (i.e. capital) to return people’s deposits—leading to its collapse.
There are some real oversight questions about why the bank wasn’t prepared, but the blame isn’t all on them. Congress played a real role in this debacle.
After the 2008 financial crisis, Congress passed legislation to require banks to hold onto more liquid cash. This thicker cushion lowered the risk for consumers—but it wasn’t ideal for the banks, which want to invest as much as possible to earn more profit.
Wall Street has been working to reverse these consumer protections ever since. When Trump was elected in 2017, a group of Senators pushed to allow medium-sized banks, like Silicon Valley Bank, to hold onto less liquid cash. I wasn’t yet in Congress, but I sounded the alarm that this was a dangerous move that put people’s money at risk. **But in the end, Congress—in a bipartisan vote—caved to Wall Street and loosened our nation’s banking laws.**
**I have no problem standing up to Wall Street, so I’m writing legislation to reverse that risky law.** I’m also working with state officials to make sure businesses and employees who depend on Silicon Valley Bank can still pay their bills.
I wanted to send this summary because I know how scary bank closures can be. When I was growing up in Iowa, the small town bank closed on a Friday afternoon, and everybody in the community was worried about how they were going to get their deposits out or make payroll—the same concerns we're having today.
That experience is part of what inspired me to study bankruptcy law under my then-professor Elizabeth Warren. I saw how Wall Street wielded political power to rig the rules against working people, and how they rarely took responsibility for their own (frequent) mistakes. **After the 2008 financial crash, I was appointed to be California’s Independent Monitor over the Big Banks.** My job was to make sure California families who were cheated by the five biggest Wall Street banks received the compensation a new settlement entitled them to. **I held the banks’ feet to the fire, and forced them to pay Californians billions.**
Now more than ever, California needs a warrior in the Senate who has the courage and experience to stand up to Wall Street.
I’ll follow up as we learn more,
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230314-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF14_1_SVB_20230314_V1_F&refcode2=19380_3422442_gemSq8&akid=19380%2E3422442%2EgemSq8)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF14_1_SVB_20230314_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=19380_3422442_gemSq8&akid=19380%2E3422442%2EgemSq8)**
---

* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=19380%2E3422442%2EgemSq8)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I need to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, my team and I just set our most ambitious mid-month goal of the year – and before I ask you to help us reach it by midnight tomorrow, I need to explain why this is so important.
**Experts at _CNN_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – and as the last remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I am a top GOP target for defeat. We can defy the odds and win this race – but not without critical grassroots support from folks like you.**

[**Please, friend, will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us hit our ambitious mid-month goal, win in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60197032/396323437/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk31-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjdhNjMwNC1jNWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKnp4MtGYzOHZSkmYJoQ9QFyz8V3GQrKcv7Q2aHRBjA=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60197033/396323450/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk31-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjdhNjMwNC1jNWMyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKnp4MtGYzOHZSkmYJoQ9QFyz8V3GQrKcv7Q2aHRBjA=)
I’m determined to keep up the fight for workers and families in Ohio – and to defend our Senate majority so we can continue making desperately needed progress for the American people. **But I simply cannot defend my battleground seat and deliver this progress without you by my side.**

name: Andy Cohen
subject: Me, you, and Lucas Kunce vs. Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH)
Hey Peter, it’s Andy Cohen! **I’m reaching out so I can invite you to have some fun with me and Lucas Kunce on Zoom this Thursday, March 16** — but let me explain more.
You might know me for hosting _‘Watch What Happens Live!’_ on Bravo for nearly 14 years, but something you might not know is that I was born and raised in St. Louis, Missouri.
I love my home state, but I sure as hell don’t love some of the hypocrites who’ve taken power there — and Josh Hawley is the biggest creep of them all. He’s obsessed with controlling every detail of our lives, whether it be in the workplace, the doctor’s office, or even the bedroom. And on January 6, 2021, he showed us just how much of a fraud and coward he really is.
Missourians deserve a Senator who’s proven they’ll fight for them — not a phony who runs away when things get tough. That’s why I’m proud to support Lucas Kunce’s campaign to replace Josh Hawley in this U.S. Senate. He’s a 13-year Marine veteran who knows what it takes to stand up and be a warrior for everyday Missourians.
**This coming Thursday, March 16, at 6:30PM CT/7:30PM ET, I’ll be joining Lucas for a virtual grassroots event. We’re gonna get into exactly how we’ll take Josh Hawley down —[and I want you to join us! Space is limited, so sign up and add a donation of $3 or more to secure your spot and send in a question for us now!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH)**
**[CHIP IN TO RESERVE YOUR SPOT »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH)**
_Can't make it to the Zoom, but still want to support Lucas? Chip in using the links below. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[Chip in $5 Now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29157?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH) [Chip in $15 Now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29157?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29158?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH)
---
This is going to be a real fight to beat Hawley in 2024. While Josh has shown us he’s more a runner than he is a fighter, he’s going to have the whole corporate and GOP mega-donor establishment backing him up. And they’ve even been attacking Lucas already since the day he launched his campaign.
But as a Missourian, trust me — if anyone can beat Josh Hawley, it’s Lucas Kunce, and it’s this election cycle. Here’s what Josh himself said just a few weeks ago: **“My race is going to be one of the closest in America.”**
Since Josh got to the Senate, he’s made a fool of himself. He’s obsessed with convincing the rest of us that he’s a “real man”. So much so, this is the REAL title of a book he’s ACTUALLY writing — _Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs._
Now it’s been years since his approval numbers have been above 50%, and even his mentor, former GOP Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.” The buyer’s remorse about Josh is real.
But then we’ve got Lucas Kunce — a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marine Corps to honor the community that took care of his family when they were bankrupt by medical bills.
Lucas did multiple overseas deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, worked at the Pentagon to keep dangerous weapons out of the hands of terrorists, and helped lead arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia. After active duty, he became an advocate against corporate corruption and the pointless wars that cowards like Josh Hawley always want to start.
Now Lucas is running for U.S. Senate to take power back for everyday Missourians — to rebuild our state, raise wages, and put people back in charge of their own bodies. His record-breaking campaign already has Josh feeling the heat. And if you ask me, living a life of service like Lucas has is a bit more convincing than writing a book titled “Manhood.”
When you chip in to help Lucas’ campaign, your support goes toward putting that message in front of Missouri voters and holding Josh Hawley accountable. **[So if you’re free to join us on Zoom this Thursday, March 16, and want to help Lucas flip this U.S. Senate seat, please chip in what you can!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH)**
**[CHIP IN TO RESERVE YOUR SPOT »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28448?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH)**
_Can't make it to the Zoom, but still want to support Lucas? Chip in using the links below. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[Chip in $5 Now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29157?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=9&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH) [Chip in $15 Now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29157?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=10&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29158?refcode=em20230314-2860&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=2860%2E614464%2E3A7BjH)

Thank you so much — and I hope to see you on Thursday!
Andy Cohen

name: Team WFP
subject: Three weeks until Election Day in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We’re exactly three weeks out from Election Day in Wisconsin. | | | Peter —
We’re exactly three weeks out from Election Day in Wisconsin, where an important Supreme Court seat is up for grabs. The justice who wins this election will become the deciding vote on whether to uphold a state abortion ban that has been on the books since 1849, as well as whether to uphold heavily-gerrymandered maps in Wisconsin. **Four years ago, an open seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court was decided by just 6,000 votes — where three out of four eligible voters stayed home.** This election could be just as close — and the stakes have never been higher. **[Will you join our friends at Working Families Power for a call party tomorrow, Wednesday 3/15 at 7pm ET to let voters know all about the Wisconsin Supreme Court election on April 4th?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqHQHUsD85RHko9anTjP30tZ7MYCiyo1ewOh6gPsXpoedBeJg1uFY4MUQ-n38VWHdO8Fev_Jq6AgCjX_B2wNS4L3ZFiIY3IZCZKYcBt1i1ySEbUkKIldtoWJiPPj7Om6axU6R3w-_psAWcSdCOJLJ0gBkmXzb7s8R_wnbiEqZyMRY48xJXm415dlauuUtn6FZ0XrHZp9m0c638s6cAlkskAVWtSSeedoUZiROkhMvvYm4yWl0I7J6UAgqSX97FENF1/3ui/XBldZ7cmSTqviqc4zHM10A/h0/PtIG68ATPRUrgEo0L4uf0x1Ap0mNrwv0YGLWo7pT84o) ** **[Join a Call Party](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqHQHUsD85RHko9anTjP30tZ7MYCiyo1ewOh6gPsXpoedBeJg1uFY4MUQ-n38VWHdOXRw7EKiwyS88b8KR4kP8VyeyGwM9263-az7jc6M0gtsHPfVGRGSQq5fF8MZcGT4cepehj6aJRgrgCpIB4NL4kh13khAAIv7NDWjfbp2BiVosvji7um710psN2XDVwlGB97BRpG63q3L2y499zk4f4Us1VEVJZ0Z5QilMnh9e4BOAHDay5emjx4C22-b3FdwX/3ui/XBldZ7cmSTqviqc4zHM10A/h1/AfYDooBb6z67DUdHB7T3ucwaRZRSiROGhnadnm1ldo4)** Voters deserve to know where the candidates stand on democracy and abortion access, and you can make a difference by joining a phone bank this week. clean_body: We’re exactly three weeks out from Election Day in Wisconsin. | | | Peter — We’re exactly three weeks out from Election Day in Wisconsin, where an important Supreme Court seat is up for grabs. The justice who wins this election will become the deciding vote on whether to uphold a state abortion ban that has been on the books since 1849, as well as whether to uphold heavily-gerrymandered maps in Wisconsin. Four years ago, an open seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court was decided by just 6,000 votes — where three out of four eligible voters stayed home. This election could be just as close — and the stakes have never been higher. Voters deserve to know where the candidates stand on democracy and abortion access, and you can make a difference by joining a phone bank this week. We’re down to the wire, and every vote counts. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Add your name: Equal work should get equal pay
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=48%2E35263%2EtMdXt6)
Peter, you know what they say: For every strong woman, there is a man who probably gets paid more for doing the same job 🙄 Five decades after the passage of the _Equal Pay Act_ of 1963, women, on average, still make only 77 cents for every dollar men earn. And the gap is even wider for women of color. Or let me put it another way: Today is Equal Pay Day, signifying how far in the calendar year women have to work to earn as much as men did in the previous year. Peter, _it's March 14th,_ meaning it has taken women an extra 72 days to earn what men did in 2022. **It's unacceptable. Equal work should get equal pay.** [**Today, I’m calling on the Senate to pass the _Paycheck Fairness Act_ and eliminate wage discrimination, once and for all. I'm hoping you will join me by signing on to my petition >>**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2303_EqPayDay_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230314_PM2_V2_S1&t=4&akid=48%2E35263%2EtMdXt6) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2303_EqPayDay_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230314_PM2_V2_S1&t=5&akid=48%2E35263%2EtMdXt6)
---
Pay inequity affects not only women but also children, families, and our economy. That’s why I’ve co-sponsored legislation to close the wage gap in every Congress I've been part of.
Here in Wisconsin, working women do a little better than the national average. We are paid about _86 cents_ on the dollar compared to men. But that's hardly a cause for celebration when women and our families are being shortchanged thousands of dollars a year and hundreds of thousands of dollars over a lifetime.
We have made progress on this issue of fairness, but there's still a lot of work ahead of us. More needs to be done to strengthen the economic security of Wisconsin women and families, and passing the _Paycheck Fairness Ac_ t will help do that.
**[Please, add your name to say you're with us in this fight>>](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2303_EqPayDay_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230314_PM2_V2_S1&t=6&akid=48%2E35263%2EtMdXt6)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2303_EqPayDay_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230314_PM2_V2_S1&t=7&akid=48%2E35263%2EtMdXt6)
---
Thank you for taking a stand.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=48%2E35263%2EtMdXt6) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=48%2E35263%2EtMdXt6)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: re: origins of COVID hearing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg6CY4ybHoF47b81rIMjIuTLmSxwCFvAam0m7OFkQh6tWdIjcWysHGvgewf0tfvD78HZwgW_gBCmU9QDkILruFZ5kKaJN6-JZl4MqrIwqNEitYCoDGRB-pjkcyT8mQRFVxV-WSrRc25no-XjZeqq4reg/3ui/bdJ5OlM3T6KtUcKuuVgmbA/h0/ApN1WD3PtxjavIZriMH2fHmCZgT21ZPy5l5OlKRWxXU) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
---
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqrMGenohDwHPVbe8MzgqQpHEn8ePrWa4Bu2DChLvjcafvKA7sN7J49CjoDaxaEEij-xemVnw5YLFLFNQzL_d6a_xNIUxuYp4m1NTLeAjftI6PKdUgQbZIuTdyqzYqOqQ_qS1ZguVdVRHvdL-hHPmEkpYbx1gmBsrHhsAkZtl-wwg/3ui/bdJ5OlM3T6KtUcKuuVgmbA/h1/ukepWP214GPz2Q9Mn_jsYxAAVlleyiskGGTJ4XsKdOk)
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad5yVaA_CImPVuTdzGTYQn8f0bEpl1ylhzbQNCFjgZwH4-yoLsYDxzFfUYWHAnvpZWNDr_4XZN9v7H97OfcnsF-89NnbFaq9EGa8fx7B3IWNuN1iThGlNFK_kMofBg69PaCLrBFXpOkLYrTpycC9JfTJ7TCL0ylotcryfBuf8txh6WwmnTK0kCKjGqHY7xjJAPUClfDP5zQzYaQ8kXqNrJE0c7q7rrd7K68dDioJBRVqksge3R_ytCGaT0xlGgYelQyepLLVqb2CDL-sKxgkHDvmN6-MiGt7KwqE-uV-C7vHIZd4dLPLGUWtvQQKtH_OrxtSDpNy5177Dv4n3zgg9nx8/3ui/bdJ5OlM3T6KtUcKuuVgmbA/h2/3baPhcZsS1FpS6dvZLhjFN6PxQWFebBIZdC7qXkDlGo) Folks, this is a longer email about last week’s first hearing of the Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic, of which I serve as the Ranking Member.

As a physician, I understand how important it is that our committee is guided by _real_ scientific data — _not_ conspiracy theories and fear-mongering.

**While I'm honored to serve as Ranking Member of this committee, I am disappointed with last week's hearing led by my Republican colleagues: They invited a witness who has peddled racist, faux-scientific theories that have been publicly praised by white supremacists, including David Duke.**

I'm incredibly frustrated that our committee was forced to give time to faux-scientific ideas because of radical, extremist partisan Members who are most interested in political games. We cannot continue to ignore _real medical experts_ if we want to protect public health.

When I took the hippocratic oath, I pledged to serve the public.

When I took the oath of office to become a U.S. Congressman, I pledged to serve the public.

And when Democratic Leader Jeffries appointed me to this committee as the Ranking Member, I pledged to use my position to serve the public.

Last week's hearing was a powerful and important first step toward our nation's understanding of the origins of the coronavirus, but we should have focused on setting a foundation for preventative measures to stop the spread of a future deadly virus — not giving airtime to fake science based in racism.

I'm proud that I used my position in the hearing to call this out, and encourage real bipartisan work among my colleagues for the good of the public.

**Friend, here's the main fact that I want you to understand:_The origins of the coronavirus are, at this time, inconclusive._
**
But regardless of its origin, the fact doesn't change that we need to be better prepared to endure the next viral pandemic, whatever that may be.

If our painful experiences from this pandemic taught us anything, it's that we need to work together to prepare for any future pandemic and do everything we can to protect public health. That's the only way that we'll save lives.

We need to stop with the name-calling and the fear-mongering, listen to scientific data and medical experts, and follow the facts.

Thank you for taking the time to read this email. I'll be in touch again soon.

_— Dr. Raul Ruiz_
* * *
**_A quick note from Rep. Ruiz's campaign team:_**
Hi team, we're incredibly proud of the work that Dr. Ruiz is doing on this new Select Committee. He values your support more than we could ever express.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks, this is a longer email about last week’s first hearing of the Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic, of which I serve as the Ranking Member. As a physician, I understand how important it is that our committee is guided by real scientific data — not conspiracy theories and fear-mongering. While I'm honored to serve as Ranking Member of this committee, I am disappointed with last week's hearing led by my Republican colleagues: They invited a witness who has peddled racist, faux-scientific theories that have been publicly praised by white supremacists, including David Duke. I'm incredibly frustrated that our committee was forced to give time to faux-scientific ideas because of radical, extremist partisan Members who are most interested in political games. We cannot continue to ignore real medical experts if we want to protect public health. When I took the hippocratic oath, I pledged to serve the public. When I took the oath of office to become a U.S. Congressman, I pledged to serve the public. And when Democratic Leader Jeffries appointed me to this committee as the Ranking Member, I pledged to use my position to serve the public. Last week's hearing was a powerful and important first step toward our nation's understanding of the origins of the coronavirus, but we should have focused on setting a foundation for preventative measures to stop the spread of a future deadly virus — not giving airtime to fake science based in racism. I'm proud that I used my position in the hearing to call this out, and encourage real bipartisan work among my colleagues for the good of the public. Friend, here's the main fact that I want you to understand:The origins of the coronavirus are, at this time, inconclusive. But regardless of its origin, the fact doesn't change that we need to be better prepared to endure the next viral pandemic, whatever that may be. If our painful experiences from this pandemic taught us anything, it's that we need to work together to prepare for any future pandemic and do everything we can to protect public health. That's the only way that we'll save lives. We need to stop with the name-calling and the fear-mongering, listen to scientific data and medical experts, and follow the facts. Thank you for taking the time to read this email. I'll be in touch again soon. — Dr. Raul Ruiz A quick note from Rep. Ruiz's campaign team: Hi team, we're incredibly proud of the work that Dr. Ruiz is doing on this new Select Committee. He values your support more than we could ever express. | | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 Please, consider making a . subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

# **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z66ldr3at9a5m97oh3vmak3kgjc8pc0t1dsvcms0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob1c3h2bs).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsa1erk9ldg2q45vm5her8pecqrpt6209j9lg4d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob1c3h2bs) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a["Financial Rat-Lab"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8dp4cefptrmhci06d8dcdv9scl4nf7td4604vu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob1c3h2bs). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsko5p87muvjmumqvvvd9c19rhgn2nl24ebp7l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob1c3h2bs)
There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement.
The time on missing on great opportunities is over. **[Act today!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq32scms2j1tjadctp2eh0dkc5j6d7uvsel3nan0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob1c3h2bs)** Explore, 100% free, how gold inside your retirement can significantly improve your future wealth.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My blood is boiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9qo9eii2l71s6439vhgjvdb58nthfa1s0nfqhb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob7c1h2bs)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlqo6nm6df1u35hpchth7phf5h00i206fiok0a4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob7c1h2bs)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5i3dcfdiun3rbq33aobjootatma5jlpr9fvk52g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob7c1h2bs)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqu6hikm31ofnq9keftlug1o3cru2qhcjiloprjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob7c1h2bs)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgrjlvtq05ef7oi243clqm6eu17lvr2k90qi9l90_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob7c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. **[Please help me build this movement by chipping in $1 or more!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrm3snmbij09kh5k66q3pp7qmnstdni2u8k5emro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob7c1h2bs)**

[** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9rkvkg4jmualugqj16tq8jjilnhhbl18in4rsm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob7c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7lq05k458hit1ppgdo0finlbv6sj9q81bfe0860_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm2ob7c1h2bs)

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me. Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.

Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za6p525p923s4a8ggvg6c5i4p622t9328hluvke0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm6oj2cph2bs)
There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement.
The time on missing on great opportunities is over. **[Act today!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8k013dopqmcgaagfbvp16nftt1nk27t7v4l1fjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3jm6oj2cph2bs)** Explore, 100% free, how gold inside your retirement can significantly improve your future wealth.

subject: Alert: Pharmacies becoming abortion facilities
body:

#
Friend of Life,

I have an urgent request.

As you may have heard, Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have announced that they will start selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription.

Despite outrage from thousands of customers and pro-life individuals who took action and made their voices heard, these pharmacies remain undeterred.

**Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have committed to turn your local pharmacy into a neighborhood abortion facility, putting the lives of countless preborn children and their mothers at risk—and your action is needed today, before it’s too late.**

**[Please sign the petition to tell CVS, Walgreens, and Rite Aid to protect women and children by keeping the abortion pill out of their pharmacies.](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**

True health care heals; it does not kill. We must stop our pharmacies from turning into abortion businesses.

The abortion pill has killed 5.6 million preborn children since 2000, and the number of babies whose lives are ended by this lethal method is skyrocketing. Over 50% of abortions in America are now committed by the abortion pill.

The Biden administration FDA is working to eliminate regulations on the pills, paving the way for pharmacies to start dispensing this lethal drug in every city—even in pro-life states with stronger protections for preborn children.

This is the deadly new frontier of Big Abortion, and we must fight back.

You can add your name to the petition here:**[https://www.liveaction.org/wallgreens-cvs-petition/](http://trk.secureandprosper._M44Ng78KKIrBqw)**

Thank you for standing up for our most vulnerable and for being their voice.

For Life,

Lila Rose
President and Founder

name: Team Claudia
subject: Claudia’s Weekly Roundup
body:
We wanted to share with you the latest news and work that Claudia has been up to around the district and in Washington.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=e3f710d123708ef58f8e87372bb5f57fe3b67c0ce5ef6e758edae0e4e8d1afb024ec01eb75558e28fbaf0988ac1c9bbe20b6bc9469ec062b)
---
| | Peter, we wanted to share with you the latest news and work that Claudia has been up to around the district and in Washington.
**Guest Appearance on _Fox Business_**
* * *
Claudia was recently on _Fox Business_ calling out Kathy Hochul and Albany Democrats for the sharp rise in crime across the state and for prioritizing criminals over businesses
---
| | [WATCH THE VIDEO](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=e3f710d123708ef5b2d342d9fd2986b66e6cc35c6b8e595621b731dbae9afb434b35611fe0690b5eeec12c74adcd3eff3ed91b7679aded81)
---
**Claudia Introduces Election Integrity Bill**
* * *
Claudia received some local news coverage for introducing a **MAJOR** election integrity bill in Congress
---
| [ ](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=e3f710d123708ef567ce7d796831d7a8b3ac847fefac561e8e81501a520718aed60235c5a96af19e395b75dc0acaec70c0722952eeb9ae55)
---
**" The right to vote is one of the most sacred rights we have as American citizens...**a citizen of another nation should not be allowed to vote in elections that will influence government officials and U.S. laws at any level." **\- Claudia Tenney**
---
| | [READ THE FULL ARTICLE](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=e3f710d123708ef567ce7d796831d7a8b3ac847fefac561e8e81501a520718aed60235c5a96af19e395b75dc0acaec70c0722952eeb9ae55)
---
**Interview on _Newsmax_ on the Northern Border Crisis**
* * *
Claudia went on Newsmax to highlight the little-discussed crisis unfolding at our Northern border.
---
| [](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=e3f710d123708ef5133b31b57750b94b8c425d0b7266a1e0afeac88bd0b427fef7081138bbfd4408ed1b44a2ac1f15052641f1366c6ad743)
---
| | [WATCH & SHARE THE POST](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=e3f710d123708ef5133b31b57750b94b8c425d0b7266a1e0afeac88bd0b427fef7081138bbfd4408ed1b44a2ac1f15052641f1366c6ad743)
---
Thank you, Team Claudia **P.S. If you 'd like to go that extra mile for Claudia, you can support her fight with a grassroots donation:** **[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/donate](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=1d453f267f56eb2eb2527438934b3456fc046439705d715114458c03846046674d550c9c51bca0fea08744107a25b1b82640c9e36817238c "https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/action-104934/?utm_source=hf&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=direct&utm_term=weekly-roundup&money_pledge=true")**
---
---
This email was sent by: Claudia Tenney for Congress - PO Box 378 Victor, New York, 14564, United States

body:
President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason. | | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436051:JhiJbMGQN:m:1:3365131770:3E11F5A3E414CADFF811724FBB645F6D:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436051:JhiJbMGQN:m:1:3365131770:3E11F5A3E414CADFF811724FBB645F6D:r)Dear Peter,

**[Please give a crucial donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436051:JhiJbMGQN:m:1:3365131770:3E11F5A3E414CADFF811724FBB645F6D:r)**

There's growing panic in the Washington, D.C. Swamp as you read this email.

Both Democrats and RINOs in Congress and in the national media are terrified by Tucker Carlson's release of U.S. Capitol camera footage this week.

**As a generous supporter of Freedom Watch, you know this is a good sign.**

Thanks to Tucker, millions of Americans are seeing for themselves that the official narrative about a "violent insurrection" at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021 is a pack of lies!

**People across the country who bought the "violent insurrection" pitch now know:**

* The protester known as Q Shaman was not violent, and he was actually escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

* US Capitol Police officer Brian Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

* Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.**

Tens of millions more Americans will know this crucial information within two weeks, as their family, friends, and neighbors spread the word in person and on social media.

What's more, that critical video footage may help me defend my clients and all January 6 peaceful protesters...we'll know soon!

**[Please help me fight back as hard as I can for each abused, ignored, and tortured January 6 peaceful protester with your special gift now of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436051:JhiJbMGQN:m:1:3365131770:3E11F5A3E414CADFF811724FBB645F6D:r)**

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

| Friend did you hear my interview with John Reid Tuesday morning on WRVA?
---
|
---
| |
---
| MEET THE SD12 CANDIDATE SERIES
---
| If you live in the 12th Senatorial District, which includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights, you will be given an opportunity to vote in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 20.
This morning I welcomed the opportunity to interview with John Reid and pitch to his audience why I'm running for re-election and what sets me apart from the other candidates.

Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979.
Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.

| Dear Friends and Supporters, Years before I ever ran for public office, I volunteered for the pro-life family organization, The Family Foundation. Protecting innocent life was and still is one of the top issues for me as a pro-life mother of 4. When I ran for the Virginia Senate for the first time in 2015, protecting innocent life was top on my list and front and center as one of my platforms. 8 years later, protecting innocent life is still one of my top platforms.
In 2022, when SCOTUS overturned Roe versus Wade, I stood strong and committed to protecting innocent life, even when some Republican legislators chose not to do so.
Some shirked the very responsibility SCOTUS delegated to states and wouldn't allow pro-life bills to come to a vote. Some Republicans tried to avoid the topic altogether, listening to political consultants instead of defending the innocent and unborn.
Some ran away from the topic and even condemned me for carrying the Life Begins at Conception Act, telling me "there would be consequences". I believe doing the right thing is always the right thing to do, no matter what the consequences. I'm able to defend my position and will go toe-to-toe with anyone who wants to defend killing babies. Infanticide should never be protected.
I'm unapologetically pro-life and pro-family. Period. I believe life begins at conception and all innocent life must be protected. Despite serving in a Democrat-controlled Senate, I continued to introduce the Life Begins and Conception Act in 2023 and The Pain Capable Unborn Child Protection Act in both 2020 and 2022.
I also voted against the so called Equal Rights Amendment that was sponsored by my current Republican opponent and former seatmate Glen Sturtevant, who is challenging me for the opportunity to continue to represent Chesterfield and Colonial Heights in Senate District 12.
What exactly is the ERA or Equal Rights Amendment?
This failed amendment seeks to enshrine abortion in the US Constitution and promotes gender fluidity. Conservative women worked hard for decades at the state and federal level to keep this amendment from becoming a reality. I know many of them and have worked with them for over a decade.
The first female state senator in Virginia, the late Senator Eva Mae Scott fought against this amendment. In fact, she was redistricted out of her seat because of her fight against the ERA. She knew what the liberals were up to and didn't buy their lies and deception. Well intentioned Senator Glen Sturtevant thought he knew better and fell for the lies of the left, who are ushering in abortion on demand, late term abortion and gender fluidity.
Glen both sponsored and voted for this atrocity and didn't reverse course when other Republican legislators and conservative stakeholders tried to reason with him to rescind his efforts and reverse course. He wouldn't listen.

As his former seatmate, I remember his voting record quite well. I tried to convince him to abandon supporting the "so called" ERA. Now he is challenging me, his seatmate who tried to help him do the right thing.

You can trust me, not just by my words but by my actions.
Now Sturtevant wants your support, so does Tina Ramirez who also claims to be pro-life, but has no voting record. Why would you support anyone else when I have a solid, conservative voting record you can trust? Why risk it?
My 8 year voting record supports my statements. When I ran for re-election to the Virginia Senate in 2019, I was endorsed by the National Right to Life Committee and the Virginia Society for Human Life and I look forward to receiving their endorsement again in 2023. Now is not the time for naivete or inexperience.
In addition to supporting life, I support parental rights to include school choice and a parent's rights to be involved in their child's education. Parents, who love their children, are the ultimate authority regarding their child's education, not government.
As a former homeschool mom who homeschooled our 4 children for 8 years, I support school choice. The money should follow the child. And a child's education should never be limited by their zip code.
Parents not government know what is best for their children, which is why in 2022 I co-sponsored and passed [SB739 Public elementary and secondary schools, etc.; provision of in-person instruction](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wcJ5_wY94c97EZhCdgZTCCAoeA6L-d0rDPPzjnIM8iiH7WqByDDNXavM1ofKTq9BNiIr_Ti-KmGn3173PeLUoIpSLUdKnhGIQpNjS20DGSWd97iTd_xLDxiLKnITyGmppYxnjM25Y4NhnmuhTGLxJFBtAw9WD1q4YakOMEYHGxWlVJ-ADbd6InheDq_Ci1XR13VFTirsbZw=&c=O-6vPOGAtAhepHFD8Gm_AArUvlp1Ef4Nf3GmsXErAbLYAcIUwFEwbQ==&ch=YRi8Rne5g-a4ozr3LiHy28Fq1yb67BuzyIs9E_PZwZU_X3QAzkQtbA==), to end the mask mandate for our public school students and give parents the option as to whether or not their child had to wear a mask to public school or not and to require 5 full days of learning each week, both in school and in person.
In 2023, I introduced [SB823 Parental Choice Education Savings Accounts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wcJ5_wY94c97EZhCdgZTCCAoeA6L-d0rDPPzjnIM8iiH7WqByDDNXavM1ofKTq9B_JNOLap2kWP6rvsRj6HjbfNHJW18RdKOMcI76cVIwERRFaYBQn_yiHi5R9O1IuWc7gnFYUgS9meto5tfeExsaHPz6LhpkMTD0DmYO_MzkKpsFhotlP8vlRwe_Z4wTQZIUMSEv_nTd1A=&c=O-6vPOGAtAhepHFD8Gm_AArUvlp1Ef4Nf3GmsXErAbLYAcIUwFEwbQ==&ch=YRi8Rne5g-a4ozr3LiHy28Fq1yb67BuzyIs9E_PZwZU_X3QAzkQtbA==). The bill permits the parent to use the moneys in such account for certain education-related expenses of the student, including tuition, deposits, fees, and required textbooks at a private, sectarian or nonsectarian elementary or secondary school or preschool.
I also introduced [SB832 Parental Rights to Educational Transparency](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wcJ5_wY94c97EZhCdgZTCCAoeA6L-d0rDPPzjnIM8iiH7WqByDDNXZ-f5zEmF_tzZQfYTqZ5a249jhWCQfxrhJLZvnr4nBfmRiraEDVIlFGkn_JymMCwTcTgmDpU7HcDaSEsYlrqs2qDnM5cm-1PaKKHNuLV8iD4xDnRg3U-ndf0Q0EZ_PtpXr4zxhrDpCoUR1bimZDDAuE=&c=O-6vPOGAtAhepHFD8Gm_AArUvlp1Ef4Nf3GmsXErAbLYAcIUwFEwbQ==&ch=YRi8Rne5g-a4ozr3LiHy28Fq1yb67BuzyIs9E_PZwZU_X3QAzkQtbA==), which declares that the parent of any student enrolled in a public elementary or secondary school in the Commonwealth has the right to: (i) access a list of any printed or audiovisual instructional material; (ii) participate in the textbook review and approval process; (iii) receive notice of and give informed consent to any counseling or guidance program offered to his child by the school; (iv) access his child's education records; (v) receive advance, written notice of any school-sponsored field trip, activity, assembly, presentation, or other event at which his child's attendance is invited, including a clear opt-out provision; (vi) receive advance notice of any questionnaire or survey to be administered to his child; (vii) receive notice of and attend any public meeting of the school board in the local school division in which his child is enrolled; (viii) review the annual school division budget and expenditures; and (ix) petition the circuit court with jurisdiction over such child's local school division to review an action of the school board if the parent is aggrieved by such action.
The bill also requires the Department of Education to develop and make available to each school board model policies and procedures to ensure compliance with the parental right to review and exempt his child from any printed or audiovisual instructional materials used as a part of the curriculum in any class or course in which such parent's child is enrolled. The bill also revises existing policies and duties of each local school board in accordance with the parental rights to transparency in education.
I sponsored [SB1463 Requiring Parental Advisory Warnings for Sexually Explicit Materials in Public School Libraries](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wcJ5_wY94c97EZhCdgZTCCAoeA6L-d0rDPPzjnIM8iiH7WqByDDNXavM1ofKTq9BPaA8DBszrdGLE6qNf1FOB3bkUJXVtExKY0LeyO1h-fA1VCJP693WocyQ308vEEWhgLsBixS7yNBVPMN9a-rxOUBSfcVjOivkL4LsI46FJbMKgdnNagYJnCIYfqWvT0GxIU2fva2mT5Y=&c=O-6vPOGAtAhepHFD8Gm_AArUvlp1Ef4Nf3GmsXErAbLYAcIUwFEwbQ==&ch=YRi8Rne5g-a4ozr3LiHy28Fq1yb67BuzyIs9E_PZwZU_X3QAzkQtbA==), which requires a parental advisory label to be affixed to the front of any book that contains sexually explicit content, and that is made available to minors in any public elementary or secondary school library,
In 2022, I sponsored [SB635 Public Charter Schools](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wcJ5_wY94c97EZhCdgZTCCAoeA6L-d0rDPPzjnIM8iiH7WqByDDNXVXlbgPbCCWg_MFvBW4BxYI9n-1Z2_5o6FInJVnQgsk3a7U_WM1qAGI2VEjVSvpC-HwseJPWz-vSzhcAfeo2WugBF5lluHbzkz61T4lKuz5zOavl1MUuRNUawvKVED6jUwhwepCUoSjwXjmaoQEhuQ0=&c=O-6vPOGAtAhepHFD8Gm_AArUvlp1Ef4Nf3GmsXErAbLYAcIUwFEwbQ==&ch=YRi8Rne5g-a4ozr3LiHy28Fq1yb67BuzyIs9E_PZwZU_X3QAzkQtbA==) at the request of the Governor to give our students more options instead of a one size fits all cookie cutter approach to education.

You can also count on me to vote for HB511 the [Tebow Bill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wcJ5_wY94c97EZhCdgZTCCAoeA6L-d0rDPPzjnIM8iiH7WqByDDNXavM1ofKTq9B9de9AdGL0lwlcm87rCyziWT5F1-aa8S7FHAS5Ct5njzrxgYq0xuaPBOHCqaQLZZNe_YG8MitBZFFNmmt239vZSJx1h5ykHgubjPEa6s_BNhaEsg9RbE0j1BqMsDq2zEmMggUGYCyBS5znj1tpZR_zg==&c=O-6vPOGAtAhepHFD8Gm_AArUvlp1Ef4Nf3GmsXErAbLYAcIUwFEwbQ==&ch=YRi8Rne5g-a4ozr3LiHy28Fq1yb67BuzyIs9E_PZwZU_X3QAzkQtbA==), which was sponsored by Delegate Marie March and would have given homeschool students access to public school sports, but it died in the House because Republican Delegate Carrie Coyner voted against it. | Senator Chase presents SR87 Life Begins at Conception Bill before the Senate Rules Committee
---
| My pro-life Senate bill was the last pro-life Senate bill to be killed in the Senate, escaping Senator Louise Lucas's Senate Health and Education Committee.
Even though I knew the Democrat-controlled 13 to 4 Senate Rules Committee would kill or "pass by indefinitely," I wanted to put the Democrats on the record for "not supporting the science."
This was a simple bill that simply says that "life begins at fertilization", which is supported as fact by 85% of scientists. Listen to the extreme and irrational comments by Planned Parenthood who clearly didn't read the bill.

| How much do you value your freedom? Most candidates are bought for and paid for by political action committees and lobbyists. Not me.
I rely on the generous donations from you. So please chip in today. Anyone can donate and you don't have to live in the district to give. You may not be able to vote for me, but I can still vote for you.
Successful campaigns are expensive unfortunately. Many people are surprised to find out that we have to raise our own money to run for public office. I've heard people express that they didn't know about a campaign and I know it was because the candidate didn't raise enough money to get the word out.
Signs, mailers, radio, tv and social media ads let people know there's an election coming and to get out and vote. In order to communicate to voters it costs money. If 5,000 people gave $100 we would be able to fully fund my campaign.
Would you please donate $100 today or more if you are able?

Want to Walk your Neighborhood with Amanda? Please help us collect signatures to get my name on the ballot, drop off some campaign literature along with an invitation to our upcoming community event. Our goal is to reach a different neighborhood every week.
Beginning Saturday, March 11 and every Saturday going forward we will go door to door from 10am to 5pm in 2 shifts.
For the first shift please arrive at 9:30am for instructions and we will begin walking at 10am. This first shift is from 10am until 1pm.
For the second shift please arrive at 1:30pm for instructions and we will begin walking at 2pm. The second shift is from 2pm to 5pm.
We will meet at the Arby's on Hull Street parking lot located at: 6541 Bayside Ln, Midlothian, VA 23112
If you are able to walk your neighborhood during the week, please reach out to Chris at [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

|
What is a "Meet and Greet"? A "meet and "greet" is simply inviting your friends and neighbors over for dessert and coffee so that I can meet them and answer their questions. This is an opportunity for voters to interview the candidate. I look forward to meeting your friends and neighbors and personally asking for their vote.
Would you be willing to open your home, business or neighborhood clubhouse so that I can meet your friends and neighbors?
Know that we will help you with invitations and getting the word out about your meet and greet. We encourage hosts to keep it simple. Dessert and coffee are perfect and the event should only last about an hour and a half. We've found that Tuesday and Thursday evenings or Sunday late afternoons work best.
If this interests you please reach out to Debbie at [debbie@chaseforva.com](mailto:debbie@chaseforva.com) to schedule a date.

Please Sign The Petition to Get My Name on the Ballot
| In order to get my name on the ballot we must get at least 250 registered voters who live in [Senate District 12 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wcJ5_wY94c97EZhCdgZTCCAoeA6L-d0rDPPzjnIM8iiH7WqByDDNXb4aZkeqSRqnPs-ryUleJ5tqzWtK8hO00UjY6S1AxcYjECD9mORfkNcR-IQctnjHJGTbKUNy9XMteInCijmr4wRTB8BoAp6h_M6hvVgfXuS0uy1gbyylmGWpeREzffUAiLCnYykGm5ESSdLg3iZbuvxbooLnDC040A7UnZ27jlssqBNMHV1pSyw6cvl2bOT-wZk7xAvo9ECt&c=O-6vPOGAtAhepHFD8Gm_AArUvlp1Ef4Nf3GmsXErAbLYAcIUwFEwbQ==&ch=YRi8Rne5g-a4ozr3LiHy28Fq1yb67BuzyIs9E_PZwZU_X3QAzkQtbA==) to sign my petition. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election.
Senate District 12 includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Do you live in Bon Air, North Chesterfield, Woodlake, Summerlake or Smoketree? You live in SD12. For a complete map of the district please click the link above.
You must actually sign a physical petition. This is not something that can be done online.
You can sign in person at our next event or we can email the form to you. If we mail you the form, you can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. Here's our address:
Friends of Amanda Chase Attention: Petition PO Box 5811 Midlothian, VA 23112
If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us.
We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair.
Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com.

"Today, I'm announcing my endorsement of Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate. | "Many say they support this platform, but not everyone votes like it or messages constantly on it like Senator Chase. • Free enterprise system - No special interests • All individuals are entitled to equal rights, justice, opportunities • Fiscal responsibility and budgetary restraint at all levels • Observing Constitutional limitations • Peace is best preserved through a strong national defense • Faith in God, as recognized by our Founding Fathers, is essential to the moral fiber of the Nation

She has my full support as she seeks re-election to the Virginia State Senate."
---
| "It makes no sense that anyone claiming to be a Republican and who truly cares about election integrity would challenge her given everything she's done for election integrity, not just in Virginia but nationally.
She's been actively engaged in getting answers to what happened in 2020, implementing those solutions in legislation for Virginia, to include a full forensic audit, and founding the National Election Integrity Caucus to support other legislators across the country.
While we welcome anyone who wants to expose the lies and deception that took place in 2020, Amanda has been the leading work horse for election integrity in Virginia , not a show horse like her opponents who have recently taken an interest in putting the guardrails back on Virginia elections.
If you truly support real election integrity I highly recommend you support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate."
---
| Colonial Heights City Councilman John Wood

|
"I am honored to support Senator Amanda Chase for re-election to the Virginia Senate."

---
"As a small business owner, professor, and a member of the Colonial Heights City Council, I'm proud to stand with and endorse Senator Chase in her run for re-election to the Virginia Senate in Senate District 12."
---
| Senator Chase has represented my district since her election in 2016 and continues to push legislation to protect our individual freedoms and rights, such as overreaching COVID mandates, voting against tax increases, and preservation of the election process.
She stands firm in her faith and positions amidst controversy and challenges.
Her voting record is consistent and matches the promises she makes to her constituents. I support her continued service for District 12 as our Senator and provide her with my full endorsement."
---
| Amelia County Sheriff Ricky Walker
---
| |
---
"I endorse Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Virginia Senate in district 12.
Senator Chase has represented Amelia County for the past 7 years and I've had the pleasure to work with her on a number of issues."
---
| "She's present in the community, an active listener who cares about public safety and keeping our community safe. She's an effective legislator who fully supports public safety, our sheriffs and law enforcement.
Her 7 year voting record shows she supports the tools that help our sheriffs and law enforcement effectively do what they were trained to do to keep our communities safe.
She's co-patroned pay raises for our sheriffs, voted to support qualified immunity, protected our law enforcement from personal financial devastation and spoken on the Senate floor about the importance of fully funding our law enforcement and against defunding the police.
I stand with Senator Amanda Chase because she has a 7 year voting record of supporting our law enforcement."

| "I endorse Amanda Chase for a continuation of her successful results in putting the needs of her constituents ahead of going with the flow.
We need Virginia Senators who put partisan politics aside and focus on people rather than politics. Amanda is just that person.
She is courageously ahead of the curve in introducing and shepherding into law issues that meet peoples needs rather than seeking out easy and non-controversial issues.
We need Amanda for another term in the Virginia Senate."

"I have had the pleasure of knowing Senator Amanda Chase for the past fifteen years.
She is a Christian lady who lives her life by "Founding Father Values", the values that made our Country great."

| "She stands firm on our Constitutional Rights and amid much adversity she never wavers on the First and Second Amendments which give us the free exercise of religion, freedom of speech, the press, and the right to peacefully assemble to and petition the government for a redress of grievances, and the right to keep and bear arms.
Without the first two amendments all the other amendments would have much less effect.
She will not be silenced as she forcefully and effectively represents the people of her district.
She is a true Statesman who will not violate her oath of office and the trust of her constituents."

"I endorse Virginia State Senator Amanda Chase as she seeks re-election to the Senate of Virginia in Senate District 12.
I've known Amanda both professionally and personally for over 15 years and know her to be a person of good character and integrity. "

That said, she knows how to get things done and is a reliable and consistent vote for the people.
She stands strongly for the Constitution and doing right by the people she represents.
Amanda has been an effective Virginia State Senator who has consistently represented us well and without influence by special interest groups.
She has accomplished much since she was first elected in 2015. She works tirelessly for the people to represent their needs and we need to re-elect her to the Virginia Senate to be our voice."
