clean_body: Introduction of the Candidates | | | | | | == | Friend did you hear my interview with John Reid Tuesday morning on WRVA? | | | | MEET THE SD12 CANDIDATE SERIES | If you live in the 12th Senatorial District, which includes most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights, you will be given an opportunity to vote in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 20. This morning I welcomed the opportunity to interview with John Reid and pitch to his audience why I'm running for re-election and what sets me apart from the other candidates. If you missed the interview, you can now click the button below to listen to the recorded interview. | | | == | A Solid Conservative Voting Record You Can Trust 100% | | | Senator Amanda Chase Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. Amanda and her husband Mike have been married over 30 years and have 4 grown children. Amanda and Mike both grew up in Bon Air and have lived most of their lives in Chesterfield County, since 1979. Amanda has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA. She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting innocent life, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans. | MESSAGE FROM SENATOR CHASE | | | | Dear Greetings! It's been such an honor to serve you in the Virginia Senate for the past 8 years representing Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia. I'm running for re-election in Senate District 12 to represent most of Chesterfield and all of Colonial Heights. Today, I humbly ask for your support and your vote in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 20. Thanks to redistricting, some of you will have the opportunity to vote for me for the first time and I look forward to earning your vote. I'm super excited that I will now have the opportunity to represent Bon Air, where my husband and I grew up. I will also represent the Robious corridor, and much of North Chesterfield which is currently represented by Senator Hashmi, who defeated former state senator Glen Sturtevant in 2019. | About Senator Amanda Chase | | Senator Amanda Chase is not a politician. She's a mom who fights for everyone and has proven she can get things done for the people of Virginia! We can trust Amanda. She's been married to Mike Chase her high school sweetheart for almost 31 years. She's a mother of her 4 now grown children and has served in the Virginia Senate for almost 8 years. She will best represent the people of the new Senate District 12 because she has lived most of her life in the district and knows the people and history of the community. Amanda and her husband Mike both grew up in Bon Air and were active members at Bon Air United Methodist Church. They attended Bon Air Elementary, Robious Middle School and graduated from Monacan High School. They met as teens working at the Chick Fil A at Cloverleaf Mall and spending summers at the Bon Air Community Association. 6 years later and after Amanda graduated from Virginia Tech, she married her high school sweetheart at Bon Air United Methodist Church, where both Mike's parents and his grandparents were married. This is something I have to do every time I've run for re-election. Thanks to all who have already signed and asked to collect signatures for us. If you'd like to sign my petition, you can stop by my senate office, see me at church on Sunday in the foyer in between services or attend one of our upcoming events like our Tea Party meetings, held on the first of each month. We can also email you the form. You can ask family members to sign the petition and mail the form back to us, but please remember to get the form notarized at your bank before you mail it back to us. We must turn in our signatures before Monday, March 20 at noon sharp to the GOP District Chair. You will want to turn in your notarized forms well before this date, as this is the date we must turn all forms into the chair. Please reach out to Mike at Mike@chaseforva.com if you have questions or call our campaign cell at 804 380 0009. | MARCH 31 | | APRIL 6 BON AIR | | RECONVENE APRIL 12 | | APRIL 13 COLONIAL HEIGHTS | | APRIL 27 Meet & Greet at Summerlake in Chesterfield County | | MAY 11 Meet & Greet at Chesdin Landing in Chesterfield County | | JUNE 20 | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | SESSION NEWSLETTERS | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | HOW DO I VOTE? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.
I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:
Can you please split a $25 contribution between Serve America and my United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so important. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either.
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: "The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is available on DVD.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=301923fa91d044c6877d25e909d1f488&_e=3IV_6sMEeabui3eaZoym760fz2lFsrkEo8erfzPxh0xveEIxIz4BGMPhpkTtkVTVhNB62wr7WMqaBLqiXpOxdbNFupBSY3_RVe888nqdD1hYmHAKPSMEURwvm9Ikng91ahBIgolOrKLnySpzut3YExWmMa_maps8WuHEC13ruOZ2Z9ionpH8PvSjHQTXfkPgbIyHwm3hQYXi6-E6ZetbMKatSZ7wI--6n3zXd_L7emOKm9I_vAMi8crkEk2Z8IR2SBaK1BKYsDmEf6-0wihzRmbFSfdBYdCimPlk8cBFu8hyu58_ePe7HFDrc-Xucfed0aU8p05P2jzwA7BfKdphHnP-pgci9xYn7BOhXN8tT-vejwvUg_R78RppFv1dCHiY9zpLNjRepDFubgnuVCfljA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course, **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,"** is available on DVD.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=301923fa91d044c6877d25e909d1f488&_e=3IV_6sMEeabui3eaZoym760fz2lFsrkEo8erfzPxh0xveEIxIz4BGMPhpkTtkVTVhNB62wr7WMqaBLqiXpOxdbNFupBSY3_RVe888nqdD1hYmHAKPSMEURwvm9Ikng91ahBIgolOrKLnySpzut3YExWmMa_maps8WuHEC13ruOZ2Z9ionpH8PvSjHQTXfkPgbIyHwm3hQYXi6-E6ZetbMKatSZ7wI--6n3zXd_L7emMghG2EYsBCDXfLpFn3HsuxnyhHBK8mFItjvNb1Ise3wD1tBTeEvEEQrVqQjhTAiwiEVCOXeq9ltCC2uCN53qAoshZofRTRM2dP-Cb9bvKW9IAwIo3CzQFSDhf_MZC7Boq11UKIWnTq1vVsestl1pqpS9B4yL0pAapFQMG8V6iKCA%3D%3D)In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

"The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education.
Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

clean_body: Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is available on DVD. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news. Hillsdale College's popular online course, " The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is available on DVD. this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature. "The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text. The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education. Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation. These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph. This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs. For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you 'll receive the DVD as our thank you. To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That's why your support is so crucial. Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College's national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation's youth. Your gift will also help to: Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as "Genesis." Expand the readership of Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty. Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio. Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale's educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of " The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives." Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Millions of Americans are worried about their jobs or retirement security after the bank crashes this past weekend. Kyrsten Sinema helped crash Silicon Valley Bank and put huge stress on the financial system through support for deregulation … a policy that Ruben Gallego voted to oppose. We know who we want for Arizona’s Senate seat!
body:
She voted for this bank crash
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26397021-27d2-46e6-8a35-5663fb5e593d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Who caused the crash of the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB), _the second largest bank crash in U.S. history,_ is simple to figure out.** _One of the biggest causes of this crash_ of the kind that set in motion the Great Depression, _was none other than Kyrsten Sinema. In 2018, when Trump deregulated banks like SVB, he knew where to buy a vote. GOP Senators like Ted Cruz were easy. But, he had a "Democrat" who'd also endanger our economy: Kyrsten Sinema._ [**Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ruben Gallego? No more SVB crashes caused by greedy politicians**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f1f3ef5-ec94-4865-9be8-350454ce2f87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Kyrsten Sinema's appalling Senate record is defined by doing whatever banks ask of her, as long as the cash keeps flowing. As Michael Daly wrote, for _The Daily Beast_ : ** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0e33674-e1bf-463c-84ab-e8243a6eb1ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

---
| **_Sinema's donations from big banks skyrocketed to over $100,000, including 3 LONGTIME LOBBYISTS FOR SVB! Meanwhile, Ruben Gallego, veteran, Latino, fighter for choice, gun safety, workers & democracy, voted against that travesty of a bank deregulation bill._** **_Sinema proved she's a danger to our economy. Rep. Gallego is a public servant who'll protect it._** **_(And if Gallego can win in Arizona, it means good things for President Biden’s reelection in 2024!)_** [**Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ruben Gallego? No more SVB crashes caused by greedy politicians!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4ddeb54-30f5-4473-9fdd-360eb1cd6953/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for speaking for all the people Sinema tossed aside.** **Cliff**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te41f1335-fd15-4509-843c-6c6cefb2e363/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Biden to Launch “FedNOW” [Move Your Money Now]
body:
Earlier this year President Biden signed the death warrant for America...

| | |
# ****
---
| | Earlier this year President Biden signed the death warrant for America...

**[Executive Order 14067](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c88052ee1cb4336b7c80f711cb3f8c6&_e=uJxc-Xw8MnULt3j6i9c_zpdTLBGepQ9KPErp0VSUBAhSFkXFI22c8n_Q2gY6gHSFWoiVa_kph514H60IV6ivA_PH_gzZqSycpa_7jvDaHoSvvsEL2IBSOxXng9sl_m3p2DrbVxsE0__NauDPbqlDdK6QrbjH5DMflpQ8uaG2Mwu4UXH063toNcXiBmmF-8W_twlUcTT7uxbe2g2F_hnRk74wiwJQmOBI1mea6BViOmkOi8CVBqnpl52PYpIfA_sd)** will essentially cancel your money.

You see Biden and the Fed have teamed up to create a controllable, traceable, programmable digital currency to replace the dollar...
---
| Giving 'them' full control to:
* Legally spy on how you spend every penny of your money...
* Take control of your bank account and your purchases...
* Silence any political opponents...

It's already all underway...

The first phase launches next May with what they are calling "FedNOW" ...

Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.

subject: As Congressman
disclaimer_text: paid for by the VA
body:
Hello Peter, As congressman, I am committed to working 24/7 for you. As an American and retired bus
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/538727?id=137732.407.1.ae47d8be491333fd8000992ffb81f60f)
---
**Hello Peter,**
---
As congressman, I am committed to working 24/7 for you. As an American and retired businessman,
I can dedicate all my time working for you. My international experience working with Aramco gives me the wisdom to work with international partners, protect our national borders and end corruption. **I will follow the US Constitution** , assuring equality to all Americans. The people have made the United States, the greatest and most powerful country in the world. For our children, families, and all citizens of America, I will continue to protect and defend the Constitution and Bill of Rights. Including powers not specified back to the states or the people (10th Amendment). I will fight for our veterans! Assuring needed health care! And if not provided by the VA in a timely manner, veterans will have the ability to receive medical care at any facility they choose, to be paid for by the VA. Under my watch there will be no homeless veterans, giving them a way to sufficient living.
---
| | [ DONATE for AMERICA ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/538727?id=137732.408.1.a113f48e21bff37cf5169ef153339dc2)

Please sign my petition to be on the ballot

---

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Let me tell you a story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436065:J5kBEMGNc:m:1:3331421248:04CCC0D37C48316DD91038F1C3FB607B:r)
---
I want to tell you a story that shows you exactly who I am - from where I started to what made me the man I am today. All I'm asking from you is that you read it all the way through. Thank you in advance.

I was the son of two working-class teachers. I spent my winters deer hunting and my summers trimming Christmas trees on our family farm. Throughout high school, I wrestled, which created opportunities I never thought possible - like going to West Point for college. At West Point, I continued to wrestle, but I also began a new journey in service to our country. I trained hard and became a paratrooper, working my way up to a 2nd Lieutenant.

One day I learned I was headed off to the Gulf War as part of Operation Desert Storm.

Because of the chaos and secrecy of the mission, we didn't get a chance to call home and say goodbye to our families before deploying, and were only able to stay in touch by mail, so I sent my parents letters as often as I could. My mom even still has them in a box at home!

It became harder and harder to keep in touch. There were a lot of restrictions for security reasons, so we really didn't get our mail very regularly.

Until one day shortly before Christmas.

A huge box showed up at our camp right before Christmas. My unit opened it up to find a Christmas tree that my dad had picked out from the farm. By some miracle - a Christmas miracle! - it somehow made it past all the censors and restrictions.

So for a few days in the middle of the Saudi desert, my camp had some proper Christmas cheer, and for me, I had a piece of home and a reminder of where I had come from.

This unexpected blessing made even the most hard bitten soldiers smile.

I tell you this story because it summarizes who I am and where I came from. **My new book,_Superpower in Peril_ , draws on experiences like these to set out on a new path toward America greatness.**

America used to be a global superpower as recently as the 90s, but now, that status is in peril. When writing my plan for America, I drew on my childhood, growing up on a Pennsylvania Christmas tree farm, to my training days at West Point to fighting in Desert Storm to my experience as a job creator, ultimately crafting and creating my conservative agenda to renew America.
_**[If you'd like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436065:J5kBEMGNc:m:1:3331421248:04CCC0D37C48316DD91038F1C3FB607B:r "If you’d
like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:")**_
---
| | | [CLAIM MY SIGNED BOOK!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436064:J5kBEMGNc:m:1:3331421248:04CCC0D37C48316DD91038F1C3FB607B:r "CLAIM MY
SIGNED BOOK!")
---
**This is the book that Fox News Anchor Mark Levin, UN Ambassador Nikki Haley, and 70th Secretary of State Mike Pompeo are all raving about, and you can get your copy signed.**

I hope I'll be signing your book soon! Thank you for being dedicated to restoring America to power.

Sincerely,
Dave McCormick

name: Conservative Priorities Briefing
subject: Here’s how you know which elections are the most important
body:
The races with the biggest impact on our country's future have the biggest price tags as activist groups duke it out for critical wins.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652030%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w4lONZBLnFBdnURq0jRxyQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, **Want to know a fool-proof way to determine which elections have the highest stakes?_Follow the money._** The races with the biggest impact on our country's future have the biggest price tags as activist groups duke it out for critical wins. **So, friend -- when you see national groups spending $9 million dollars on a single state supreme court PRIMARY race, PAY ATTENTION!** And that primary spending was only the beginning...
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652031%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YCXbNI7LQkf94O7TQpmfbg&sysid=1)
---
The primary I'm talking about just happened in Wisconsin -- in fact, our group, **Fair Courts America** , was one of those spenders. And let me tell you: we're grateful for every dime we've spent so far because this is the most important race in America right now. Here's why: _The winner of the general election will get a seat on the court for 10 years, and they will tilt the balance of Wisconsin’s divided court._ We supported **solid conservative Daniel Kelly**. A seasoned former member of the Wisconsin Supreme Court, he has advanced to the general election. But so has the far-left's favored candidate: **radical leftist Janet Protasiewicz**. Not only does Janet have a horrifying record of letting violent criminals walk free, she's got a LENGTHY record of statements promising to use her seat on the court to push a liberal agenda, including:
* Promoting abortion through judicial activism
* Rejecting the state's congressional maps as "rigged" toward Republicans
* _And maybe even ruling in favor of Joe Biden in a contested 2024 Wisconsin presidential election. _

---
[**DEFEND WI FOR 2024**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652032%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4TDM19zcKFBAEbjsn5eBhw&sysid=1)
---
**Now do you see why the far-left is pouring every dime they can get their hands on into this race?** Wisconsin is counting on grassroots conservatives like you to help fight back against the influx of big liberal cash in their state. We're doing everything we can at Fair Courts America, but we need your help. That’s why I’m reaching out to conservatives like you who see the big picture, and can see why this race is so important. Will you stand with us today?
**[_Fight back in Wisconsin. Defend our country and our courts._](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652033%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Paae%2fEWGfs3CRy0lQr5XcQ&sysid=1) **
---
[**FIGHT BACK: DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652034%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oOZPwItsMpL8DNWgjfd7Cw&sysid=1)
---
Thank you, Andrew Wynne Executive Director Fair Courts America
---

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Who I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
This is a story from my book that’s close to my heart

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4vl7306pofc7ai4h55oij9v5lccgm8o7tagvaj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3ie6p72c5h2bs)
---
I want to tell you a story that shows you exactly who I am - from where I started to what made me the man I am today. All I'm asking from you is that you read it all the way through. Thank you in advance.

I was the son of two working-class teachers. I spent my winters deer hunting and my summers trimming Christmas trees on our family farm. Throughout high school, I wrestled, which created opportunities I never thought possible - like going to West Point for college. At West Point, I continued to wrestle, but I also began a new journey in service to our country. I trained hard and became a paratrooper, working my way up to a 2nd Lieutenant.

One day I learned I was headed off to the Gulf War as part of Operation Desert Storm.

Because of the chaos and secrecy of the mission, we didn't get a chance to call home and say goodbye to our families before deploying, and were only able to stay in touch by mail, so I sent my parents letters as often as I could. My mom even still has them in a box at home!

It became harder and harder to keep in touch.There were a lot of restrictions for security reasons, so we really didn't get our mail very regularly.

Until one day shortly before Christmas.

A huge box showed up at our camp right before Christmas. My unit opened it up to find a Christmas tree that my dad had picked out from the farm. By some miracle - a Christmas miracle! - it somehow made it past all the censors and restrictions.

So for a few days in the middle of the Saudi desert, my camp had some proper Christmas cheer, and for me, I had a piece of home and a reminder of where I had come from.

This unexpected blessing made even the most hard bitten soldiers smile.

I tell you this story because it summarizes who I am and where I came from. **My new book,_Superpower in Peril_ , draws on experiences like these to set out on a new path toward America greatness.**

America used to be a global superpower as recently as the 90s, but now, that status is in peril. When writing my plan for America, I drew on my childhood, growing up on a Pennsylvania Christmas tree farm, to my training days at West Point to fighting in Desert Storm to my experience as a job creator, ultimately crafting and creating my conservative agenda to renew America.
_**[If you'd like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0jm63p2rbclegf66fk53quoehugvhfcdm2hbmg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3ie6p72c5h2bs "If you’d like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:")**_
---
| | | [CLAIM MY SIGNED BOOK!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq6e0udcud4u8eg01n5gonva8ojgdjm3m779j9s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3ie6p72c5h2bs "CLAIM MY SIGNED BOOK!")
---
**This is the book that Fox News Anchor Mark Levin, UN Ambassador Nikki Haley, and 70th Secretary of State Mike Pompeo are all raving about, and you can get your copy signed.**

I hope I'll be signing your book soon! Thank you for being dedicated to restoring America to power.

Sincerely,
Dave McCormick

In 10 days, [Sheridan.Church OKC](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18755582.10955.1.78459f438fc7d6e211568581fc943557) will officially launch!

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I’d like to know your priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)

[**2023 SENATE SURVEY**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)******************************************************
Peter,

I know we haven't touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.

Despite giving it our all last year, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats still hold the Senate majority. But let me make something abundantly clear - we will NEVER stop fighting for you and the issues that matter to you most.

Which is why I'm reaching out today. **[I want to hear directly from you about what policies you think the Senate needs to focus on first this year.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)**
**[2023 SENATE SURVEY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)**
[CAN A REPUBLICAN BEAT PRESIDENT BIDEN NEXT YEAR AND TAKE BACK THE WHITE HOUSE?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)

******************************************************[YES>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)******************************************************

******************************************************[NO>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)******************************************************

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)******************************************************
Patriot, it doesn't take a rocket scientist to know the Democrats liberal agenda is crippling our country. Now more than ever, what Washington needs is problem solvers who are willing to do whatever it takes to get things done for the American people.

I've seen firsthand that my Republican colleagues in the Senate are up for the challenge, but now we need to hear from you.

**[Please, let me know what policies you think the Senate should be focusing on, and I'll make sure we get to work.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)
Lindsey Graham
United States Senator from South Carolina

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436687:JKtXVMGlN:m:1:3365131770:DE010E4FBCD94475329B3C43166422B5:r)******************************************************

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18907?t=1001&akid=3058%2E346206%2ENz6aah ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230315-3058-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3058_346206_Nz6aah&akid=3058%2E346206%2ENz6aah

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3058%2E346206%2ENz6aah

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

CHIP IN → The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either. Thank you, and adiós, Ruben Contribute to Charles Booker:

body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House -

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we’re running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652040%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kboXzSiqtbexG3S5e%2f2KmQ&sysid=1 "Will you accept my
invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we’re going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we’re going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652041%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0XwU377pj4VIYyhja%2bi53A&sysid=1)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It’s the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you’re with me. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652042%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4uvyS6UmXPQRK%2ft747vzqg&sysid=1 "Confirm you’re with me,

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Who I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
This is a story from my book that’s close to my heart

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdc3oiodmobgn5kk6n0l2bhqvdvi1fiupkmj1d7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3ie1pr4c5h2bs)
---
I want to tell you a story that shows you exactly who I am - from where I started to what made me the man I am today. All I'm asking from you is that you read it all the way through. Thank you in advance.

I was the son of two working-class teachers. I spent my winters deer hunting and my summers trimming Christmas trees on our family farm. Throughout high school, I wrestled, which created opportunities I never thought possible - like going to West Point for college. At West Point, I continued to wrestle, but I also began a new journey in service to our country. I trained hard and became a paratrooper, working my way up to a 2nd Lieutenant.

One day I learned I was headed off to the Gulf War as part of Operation Desert Storm.

Because of the chaos and secrecy of the mission, we didn't get a chance to call home and say goodbye to our families before deploying, and were only able to stay in touch by mail, so I sent my parents letters as often as I could. My mom even still has them in a box at home!

It became harder and harder to keep in touch.There were a lot of restrictions for security reasons, so we really didn't get our mail very regularly.

Until one day shortly before Christmas.

A huge box showed up at our camp right before Christmas. My unit opened it up to find a Christmas tree that my dad had picked out from the farm. By some miracle - a Christmas miracle! - it somehow made it past all the censors and restrictions.

So for a few days in the middle of the Saudi desert, my camp had some proper Christmas cheer, and for me, I had a piece of home and a reminder of where I had come from.

This unexpected blessing made even the most hard bitten soldiers smile.

I tell you this story because it summarizes who I am and where I came from. **My new book,_Superpower in Peril_ , draws on experiences like these to set out on a new path toward America greatness.**

America used to be a global superpower as recently as the 90s, but now, that status is in peril. When writing my plan for America, I drew on my childhood, growing up on a Pennsylvania Christmas tree farm, to my training days at West Point to fighting in Desert Storm to my experience as a job creator, ultimately crafting and creating my conservative agenda to renew America.
_**[If you'd like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z21jspf5ibo20pun7dllkc65pe9ji6i3mi5m9dl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3ie1pr4c5h2bs "If you’d like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:")**_
---
| | | [CLAIM MY SIGNED BOOK!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1s6hfo25stndg16rclj95jl8k52bbv7odqrf5do_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3ie1pr4c5h2bs "CLAIM MY SIGNED BOOK!")
---
**This is the book that Fox News Anchor Mark Levin, UN Ambassador Nikki Haley, and 70th Secretary of State Mike Pompeo are all raving about, and you can get your copy signed.**

I hope I'll be signing your book soon! Thank you for being dedicated to restoring America to power.

Sincerely,
Dave McCormick
---

subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp780qof8be6cil5a2lbr3j6gjp64l7eku58j7l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3ie9or0cjh2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

subject: We are at a critical point
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsAGfrdDNa

I hope you're having a great day. There's something important I
want to share with you today. For years, we've seen a growing
effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of
liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous
in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden
administration's education department.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osAGfrdDNa

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I hope
you're having a great day. There's something important I want to
share with you today.

For
years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to
destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the
freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found
a willing ally in the Biden administration's education
department.

And right
now-with the help of these government bureaucrats-they are
actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America's schools
while teaching destructive ideologies like critical race theory
and socialism.

We are at
a key point in our history. We must defend our nation's founding
documents and principles of liberty through education.

And
that's why I'm emailing you today.

Hillsdale
College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our
very popular "Constitution 101" online course, and I'd like you
to have a copy.

The
course features Hillsdale's faculty-the same professors who teach
our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you
view "Constitution 101," you'll learn about:

The
original design and purpose of the Constitution.
The
challenges it faced during the Civil War.
How
it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and
liberalism.
How
limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our
own time.

Right
now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100
or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61595854:sAGfrdDNa:m:3:2532013465:10DD4F511AD5DF0C4949596CD0BF47C3:r

And when
you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help
expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free
online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and
Imprimis-our digest of liberty.

We need
your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even
indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

So,
please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61595854:sAGfrdDNa:m:3:2532013465:10DD4F511AD5DF0C4949596CD0BF47C3:r

And
remember, as I mentioned above, supplies are limited, so be sure
to reserve your copy today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

body:

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

**[We can't do it without you. Renew your membership before it's too late](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za8iocn7lpv0nk16kta5eqj6169hgattflftj1u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s3ie9or4cth2bs "We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late")**

name: Col. Mike Waltz, me (2)
subject: for Peter's eyes only
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I wanted to take a minute to give you a critical campaign finance update:

Our mid-month deadline is **tonight** at **midnight** , and right now we’re still not at our goal.

Peter, I know what you’re thinking: we’re running out of time.

clean_body: | | | Peter, I wanted to take a minute to give you a critical campaign finance update: Our mid-month deadline is tonight at midnight , and right now we’re still not at our goal. Peter, I know what you’re thinking: we’re running out of time. But one thing I learned as a Green Beret is that a mission isn’t over until it’s over, and I'm not about to give up now. In Service, Col. Mike Waltz \-------Forwarded Message------- From: Mike Waltz Date: March 13, 2023 Subject: Keep your eyes open 👀 Peter, Liberal Democrats in Washington tell lie after lie to cover for Joe Biden. They tell you that the economy is improving. They tell you that they’re not using public schools to brainwash our children. They even tell you that Joe Biden is 100% competent. I know you won’t fall for the lies, but unfortunately, too many Americans don’t know what we know. Peter, we’re coming up on a critical deadline to DEFEAT the radical Left, and I need your help. Our mid-month deadline is TWO DAYS AWAY, and we need every patriot to pull their weight to meet this critical goal. Peter, the radical Left has already tried to do irreparable damage to our great country. They’ve thrown law and order out the window to pave the way for criminals to roam our streets while leaving our borders wide open. And all the while they’ve left hardworking Americans out to dry. I didn’t put my life on the line for this great country just to watch Democrats try to throw it away. | | De Oppresso Liber, Col. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I need to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
$5.
That's the contribution I am asking you to make to The Long Run today. Let me quickly explain why:
At the end of this month, we face our first end-of-quarter deadline since our launch — our biggest challenge yet. And since today is the midpoint of this month, it's so important that we stay on track to hit our goals.
The press, political pundits, and ring-wing super PACs will be watching to see just how many supporters we have and how much we can raise. Why? Because those results will directly reflect how many critical races we can continue to impact in 2024.
So, it's so important that our fundraising data reflects the strength of this grassroots initiative. I know I can count on you so I need to ask:
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to support The Long Run and help us impact critical races across the country? Your contribution today will help keep us on track to hit our end-of-quarter deadline goals.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.QOYevG&refcode=em230315-1-t2&t=1&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.7efGeS&refcode=em230315-1-t2&t=20&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.jrcQoE&refcode=em230315-1-t2&t=21&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.tH38ms&refcode=em230315-1-t2&t=22&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.F2LVPU&refcode=em230315-1-t2&t=23&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.iC3NiK&refcode=em230315-1-t2&t=24&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.QOYevG&refcode=em230315-1-t2&t=25&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
My team and I are very grateful that you are a part of this team. Thank you for chipping in today, if you can afford it.
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.QOYevG&refcode=em230315-1-t2&t=26&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=4263_196590_VFFBfx&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4263%2E196590%2EVFFBfx)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Giffords.org
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your $15 contribution truly has the power to save someone’s life
#

It may be hard to believe, but today we’re halfway through the month of March. That means we are running out of time to reach our quarterly fundraising goals.
We’ll be honest, we’re a little behind where we were hoping to be, so in honor of today being March 15th, [**we’re hoping we can ask you to make a contribution of $15 to Giffords PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230315-1-subs&t=1&akid=4424%2E3935704%2EjPjEBc)
The truth is that if everyone reading this email chipped in $15, we’d have more than enough to reach our quarterly fundraising goal by the end of this month.
But not everyone gives. That’s why we need your help today.
[**Please, use this link to chip in $15 to Giffords PAC today—or any amount that feels right for you. We need all hands on deck to ensure we reach our quarterly fundraising goal by the end of this month.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230315-1-subs&t=2&akid=4424%2E3935704%2EjPjEBc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[CONTRIBUTE $15](https://go.giffords.org/go/34420?c0=giffords-em-mar23.RuOloT&refcode=em230315-1-subs&t=3&akid=4424%2E3935704%2EjPjEBc)**
Remember this, team: every single dollar donated to Giffords PAC goes towards our work to keep our communities safe from gun violence. Your $15 contribution truly has the power to save someone’s life.
Thanks so much for your constant support of our mission.
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4424%2E3935704%2EjPjEBc) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

There is an important runoff election for the Phoenix City Council District 6 on March 14. Conservative Sal DiCiccio (R) is term limited and will be replaced by the winner of this race. The two candidates are Republican Sam Stone and Democrat Kevin Robinson. **If you live in District 6 (**[check here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/229ab74333ded7f9/7e90d23340ef8ed7c3d6b838967d376c/35693)**), you either received a mail-in ballot or you must vote in person (see below).

****This is a very important race that will determine the balance of power on the City Council.** Phoenix, like many large cities in conservative states, has tended blue with the consequences many cites suffer from with progressive governance. Have you noticed the growing homeless problem in our city?

**Conservative Sam Stone is the strong choice of The Prickly Pear** and we urge our readers in District 6 to mail your ballots in immediately and cast your vote for Sam Stone. [Learn about Sam Stone here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/229ab74333ded7f9/78b722a639b721e8c3d6b838967d376c/35693).

name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01659%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xaJbrmtPCc9tYsyQXsFmUg&sysid=1)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I’d like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01650%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eQazJZoEbi4KAMer%2f3a%2fog&sysid=1)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**“We stand as a counter-offensive**_ _**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children."**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can’t allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America’s schools from the corrupt Teacher’s Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01651%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uQ4nT60v3Osb%2fhwzk7gpCA&sysid=1)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01652%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J8Mzyo1pAuWOpAGkDLOQbA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01653%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QToWbJbEnjgpKdo4UHdeMg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01654%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j2OzU9gZbc8ITJK22uwRzg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01665%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fKcszzw9mUfDrBX8M7V5uA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01666%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0%2bz%2bNV48P4zZ6qemfjKMyw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01667%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d98jpK313AWJDfezfar15Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01668%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q%2fVwidliKV5yz0srLzyDnw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01669%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rwY7X7DgdPIaehguplqDKw&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

Your America News

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Less than 2 Weeks Until My Fundraising Deadline
disclaimer_text: paid for by the political ruling class by the time they are sworn into office
body:
The Lobbyists and PACS want to take me out. Will you let them?
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Friend did you hear the Good News?
---
| | |
---

Friend did you hear the good news? Those to whom I stood up to on your behalf are now retiring. They don't want to have to deal with me holding them accountable for another 4 years for their bad votes. The truth about their voting record has been exposed and now you know what I know. And they know they don't have the support to run for re-election. When I return to the Senate in January, the makeup of the senate will be completely different. Those who came after me, won't be back.
They claimed to be a Republican but didn't always vote like it and then went after me because I told the truth and shed light on their bad votes. You told them you would not support them and they knew they couldn't get re-elected. Term limits are good and I've always sponsored term limit legislation every year I've been in office, introducing it every year.
Now they are going to focus all of their energy on taking me out. Will you let them take out the one who has stood up for you and taken the hits?
They wanted me to sit down, shut up and stop asking questions. They were upset with me only because "they couldn't control me" and I wouldn't just "go along to get along" when it went against our Republican values and principals.
That's because my principals trump my willingness to go along to get along. Too much was at stake then and is still at stake today. I stood strong and spoke out again the complete shutdown of our businesses and schools during the Covid lock downs. They came after me, but I didn't cowtail or give in. I stood strong and didn't back down. And for that they can't stand me.
When they were forcing us to wear masks and mandate vaccines I spoke out against the Marxist-style Northam government that treated us like subjects instead of citizens. When the thugs in Richmond destroyed our history, our statues, and our businesses, I stood up to them. When they rioted and looted the streets of Richmond, I was on the front lines fighting for what was important to you.
Meanwhile, most politicians said nothing. They were too afraid to speak up for you because they were afraid they would be attacked by the left. I don't care if the left attacks me. Someone needs to hold them accountable and push back against their agenda to destroy our state and our country. What I won't miss are those who are supposed to be on our side attacking me for standing up for what's important to you. I'm not peer dependent; I'm driven by our shared principals.
I wouldn't stop talking about pushing back against mask and vaccine mandates.
I wouldn't stop talking about life and how it begins at conception not 15 months.
I wouldn't stop talking about the 2020 Presidential Election and how we need to conduct a full forensic audit in Virginia to get to the bottom of what happened in Virginia and to hold people accountable.
---
BUT THEY ARE STILL COMING AFTER ME AND I NEED YOU TO GIVE YOUR BIGGEST DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT 31 MARCH.
---
| |
---|---
|
MARCH 31 is our next CRITICAL FUNDRAISING DEADLINE and I need for you to GIVE BIG ONE MORE TIME.

THEY ARE TRYING TO TAKE ME OUT BECAUSE I STAND UP FOR YOU.

ARE YOU GOING TO STAND STRONG WITH ME LIKE I STOOD STRONG FOR YOU?

My two opponents have had 2 months to fundraise while I could not because I was in session doing the work of the people and legally could not raise money for my
re-electon campaign.
Please don't wait or it will be too late.

THE ELECTION IS TUESDAY 20 JUNE
LESS THAN 3 MONTHS AWAY

The political elite don't like me because I fight hard for you and refuse to just fall in line. The people love me but the RINO politicians don't. If they speak against me, know they are a RINO.

We must have the money now to pay staff, purchase mailers and hold events. Running a campaign is like running a business. We have to raise our own funds to run for public office.

And while many are giving, some of you have not given yet, and I'm asking you to please give what you can today. It all adds up.

WE HAVE LESS THAN 2 WEEKS TO FULLY FUND MY CAMPAIGN

I really need you now.

Please donate today before it's too late. They want to replace me with a Liz Cheney Republican.
Are you going to let them?

If you've already donated $100 to my re-election campaign to the Virginia Senate; thank you. Please consider giving another $100 as we are running out of time and have less than 2 weeks to fully fund my campaign. If you have not already donated $100, would you please do so today?

The Establishment is coming after me. They don't like that I can think for myself and chose to put the interests of the people above party politics. They don't like that I speak the truth to power- like when I said the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen and that people shouldn't be forced to wear masks or get a vaccine that's been around for less than a year.

I even had the audacity to introduce legislation that would give patients and their doctors the ability to have access to ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine. Apparently, this is unpopular to say and will earn you scorning looks from "the approved healthcare experts."

Instead, I say what is true instead of what is expedient or politically correct. And THEY HATE it.

And now they are circling the wagons.

I currently have 2 primary opponents. One, is a failed one term Senator, Glen Sturtevant, who compromised on both the 2nd Amendment when he voted for red flag laws and sponsored the so-called Equal Rights Amendment which had nothing to do with Equal Rights and everything to do with enshrining abortion into our Constitution and creating gender fluidity. He lost both 2nd Amendment supporters and conservatives with just those 2 votes alone, but most importantly.... he lost.

You can't win a Republican leaning seat without the support of both conservatives and 2A supporters. Glen Sturtevant proved this in 2019 when he lost. Now he wants you to forget his voting record.

The other candidate is Tina Ramirez, a twice failed #NeverTrump Congressional candidate who has been running for Congress for years, only to finish in last place. She says speaking the truth is "divisive." Many question how she runs a non-profit in which she pockets over $100,000 annually from her donors, and her family members not only sit on the board of her non-profit, but many get paid from it.

The political elite and the lobbyists have convinced themselves that they can beat me, and they are doing everything they can to fund my opponents in an effort to win this race; but it won't happen.

While I was working hard for the people during our 46 day 2023 General Assembly session, they were busy trying to raise money and collect endorsements from politicians. I on the other hand, since 2019, I have not taken money from special interest groups or lobbyists.

The people are tired of politicians who are already bought and paid for by the political ruling class by the time they are sworn into office. In fact, they are sick of it. They want term limits and caps on campaign donations, both of which I have introduced year after year in the Senate.

Many tell me that they love that "I'm a fighter." They love that I can't be bought by special interest groups or lobbyists and that I introduce legislation that people care about.

When my Republican Caucus leader sponsored tax increases and gun control, I left the caucus; not because I didn't like the Senators, but because what they were doing was wrong and I stood up to them. They wanted to teach me a lesson.

Now that same Republican Senate Minority Leader has hosted at least one fundraiser for my RINO opponent Glen Sturtevant who will go along to get along with the political elite who are not for you.

Because I stood up to them, they changed the Senate rules and took away all of my committee assignments, striped me of my seniority and stuck my desk in the corner. Nobody puts baby in the corner. So, I ran for Governor.

I was the front runner, until the State GOP implemented a Rigged Rank Choice Convention, which creates many hurdles that disenfranchise most registered voters from participating in choosing their Republican nominee, because they do not understand how to vote. So only those who faithfully participate in their local GOP Committee and their friends choose our Republican nominees. That's wrong! And not only did I call foul play. I sued the Republican Party of Virginia over it. We should include those who vote Republican, not just those who are able to volunteer for a GOP Committee.

Now some of the party elite hope I will simply leave and not fight for my seat, but that won't happen either!

Knowing how much support I have with the people, my opponents who are puppets for the political ruling class knew they had to start early. Well my question is, "Where have their candidates been?"

Neither one of my opponents stood up to the gun control groups when they were coming for your guns. They were no where to be found in 2020 when HB961 was presented to the Democrat controlled Senate Judiciary Committee. I was on the front row when the Democrat Senate Chair called me up to his chair to let me know the anti-gun bill, that would turn law abiding gun owners into felons overnight, would pass by for the year because of my efforts to lead our grassroots in calls, emails and visits to legislators. The Democrat controlled Senate Judiciary committee understand that Virginians support gun rights and we won.

I proudly led the effort to ensure law abiding citizens would not be turned into felons and was one of the only elected officials to speak at the annual VCDL Rally in Richmond, which turned out to be the largest 2A Rally in Virginia history.

I have consistently fought publicly and unapologetically to preserve and restore your gun rights as a law abiding citizen. The entire almost 8 years I've served in the Virginia Senate,

I'm the only candidate who can say I have a perfect lifetime score of 100 percent with the Virginia Citizen's Defense League and A rating with the NRA. I understand the importance of eliminating gun free zones which only turn participants into sitting ducks in a barrel. I get it because I live it. As it stands, I am the only candidate who also carries for personal protection and will do everything I can to restore gun rights lost in 2020 with the Democrat Trifecta.

Neither one of my opponents participated in any effort to push back against covid mandates. Delegate John McGuire was the only legislator to join me for the "Reopen Virginia" Rally that I led. We drove our cars ar0und capital grounds and beeped our horns while Governor Ralph Northam was giving his weekly Covid update. You could hear our beeping horns during his live weekly presentation.

Neither one of my opponents has done anything to call for an investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election or called for a FULL forensic audit.

Actions speak louder than words.

This session I was the ONLY legislator to introduce legislation to call for a FULL forensic audit.

I'm the only elected official from Virginia to witness in person the full forensic audit in Arizona and the release of the Executive Summary from the gallery of the Arizona Senate gallery. I used the knowledge I gained from the Arizona full forensic audit to draft and introduce 10 bills to put the guardrails back on our elections using the knowledge I gained in Arizona and also my role as National Election Integrity Chair.

I introduced legislation requiring photo identification to vote, requirement of a notary signature and required excuse to vote mail-in or absentee, elimination of voter ballot boxes that have no chain or custody, elimination of the permanent absentee voter list which allows live ballots to be mailed automatically to voters and the list goes on. I stood on my feet for 4 hours straight presenting 10 election integrity bills to the Democrat controlled Senate Privileges and Elections Committee which was controlled by Democrats. Even though I knew they would kill all 10 bills to put the guardrails back on our elections, I introduced and presented them anyway. I put these Democrat Senators on the official record as voting against fair, free and transparent elections in which every legal vote should count. And we will use this video when they run for re-election.

During the pandemic, I was the ONLY legislator who refused to wear a mask. In fact, they built a plexiglass wall around my desk on the Senate floor. Later it was discovered that masks are actually hazardous to your health and make you more likely to contract Covid. Later, I cosponsored and passed legislation that allowed parents to determine whether or not their child would wear a mask to school.

I was the ONLY legislator to introduce legislation to make it illegal to discriminate against people who choose not to wear a mask or get the vaccine.

I was the ONLY legislator to be illegitimately censured for attending the January 6 rally to exercise my First Amendment right to participate in a "Stop the Steal" Rally with President Trump.

I was the ONLY legislator to be canceled on Facebook.

WHY?

Because I'm one of the ONLY legislators who has the fortitude to stand up for you.

Please give your most generous donation before it's too late. Time is ticking.

Friday, March 31 at midnight is our next big fundraising deadline I will need to fully fund my re-election campaign. We are a long way from our goal and we really need your help now.

Will you allow the Establishment to get rid of one of the only voices in the Senate who stands up for you?

Please donate today. If they silence me, they know they don't have to address the issues that are most important to you.

I need your help to make it to the finish line. We need at least 5,000 people who love their country and want a fighter, to donate $100 or more so that we can fully fund my re-election campaign and win.

Can I count on you? You know you can count on me.

In Service,
|
