clean_body: The Lobbyists and PACS want to take me out. Will you let them? | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend did you hear the Good News? | | | Friend did you hear the good news? Those to whom I stood up to on your behalf are now retiring. They don't want to have to deal with me holding them accountable for another 4 years for their bad votes. The truth about their voting record has been exposed and now you know what I know. And they know they don't have the support to run for re-election. When I return to the Senate in January, the makeup of the senate will be completely different. Those who came after me, won't be back. They claimed to be a Republican but didn't always vote like it and then went after me because I told the truth and shed light on their bad votes. You told them you would not support them and they knew they couldn't get re-elected. Term limits are good and I've always sponsored term limit legislation every year I've been in office, introducing it every year. Now they are going to focus all of their energy on taking me out. Will you let them take out the one who has stood up for you and taken the hits? They wanted me to sit down, shut up and stop asking questions. They were upset with me only because "they couldn't control me" and I wouldn't just "go along to get along" when it went against our Republican values and principals. That's because my principals trump my willingness to go along to get along. Too much was at stake then and is still at stake today. I stood strong and spoke out again the complete shutdown of our businesses and schools during the Covid lock downs. They came after me, but I didn't cowtail or give in. I stood strong and didn't back down. And for that they can't stand me. When they were forcing us to wear masks and mandate vaccines I spoke out against the Marxist-style Northam government that treated us like subjects instead of citizens. When the thugs in Richmond destroyed our history, our statues, and our businesses, I stood up to them. When they rioted and looted the streets of Richmond, I was on the front lines fighting for what was important to you. Meanwhile, most politicians said nothing. They were too afraid to speak up for you because they were afraid they would be attacked by the left. I don't care if the left attacks me. Someone needs to hold them accountable and push back against their agenda to destroy our state and our country. What I won't miss are those who are supposed to be on our side attacking me for standing up for what's important to you. I'm not peer dependent; I'm driven by our shared principals. I wouldn't stop talking about pushing back against mask and vaccine mandates. I wouldn't stop talking about life and how it begins at conception not 15 months. I wouldn't stop talking about the 2020 Presidential Election and how we need to conduct a full forensic audit in Virginia to get to the bottom of what happened in Virginia and to hold people accountable. BUT THEY ARE STILL COMING AFTER ME AND I NEED YOU TO GIVE YOUR BIGGEST DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT 31 MARCH. | | ---|--- | MARCH 31 is our next CRITICAL FUNDRAISING DEADLINE and I need for you to GIVE BIG ONE MORE TIME. THEY ARE TRYING TO TAKE ME OUT BECAUSE I STAND UP FOR YOU. ARE YOU GOING TO STAND STRONG WITH ME LIKE I STOOD STRONG FOR YOU? My two opponents have had 2 months to fundraise while I could not because I was in session doing the work of the people and legally could not raise money for my re-electon campaign. Please don't wait or it will be too late. THE ELECTION IS TUESDAY 20 JUNE LESS THAN 3 MONTHS AWAY The political elite don't like me because I fight hard for you and refuse to just fall in line. The people love me but the RINO politicians don't. If they speak against me, know they are a RINO. We must have the money now to pay staff, purchase mailers and hold events. Running a campaign is like running a business. We have to raise our own funds to run for public office. And while many are giving, some of you have not given yet, and I'm asking you to please give what you can today. It all adds up. WE HAVE LESS THAN 2 WEEKS TO FULLY FUND MY CAMPAIGN I really need you now. Please donate today before it's too late. They want to replace me with a Liz Cheney Republican. Are you going to let them? If you've already donated $100 to my re-election campaign to the Virginia Senate; thank you. Please consider giving another $100 as we are running out of time and have less than 2 weeks to fully fund my campaign. If you have not already donated $100, would you please do so today? The Establishment is coming after me. They don't like that I can think for myself and chose to put the interests of the people above party politics. They don't like that I speak the truth to power- like when I said the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen and that people shouldn't be forced to wear masks or get a vaccine that's been around for less than a year. I even had the audacity to introduce legislation that would give patients and their doctors the ability to have access to ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine. Apparently, this is unpopular to say and will earn you scorning looks from "the approved healthcare experts." Instead, I say what is true instead of what is expedient or politically correct. And THEY HATE it. And now they are circling the wagons. I currently have 2 primary opponents. One, is a failed one term Senator, Glen Sturtevant, who compromised on both the 2nd Amendment when he voted for red flag laws and sponsored the so-called Equal Rights Amendment which had nothing to do with Equal Rights and everything to do with enshrining abortion into our Constitution and creating gender fluidity. He lost both 2nd Amendment supporters and conservatives with just those 2 votes alone, but most importantly.... he lost. You can't win a Republican leaning seat without the support of both conservatives and 2A supporters. Glen Sturtevant proved this in 2019 when he lost. Now he wants you to forget his voting record. The other candidate is Tina Ramirez, a twice failed #NeverTrump Congressional candidate who has been running for Congress for years, only to finish in last place. She says speaking the truth is "divisive." Many question how she runs a non-profit in which she pockets over $100,000 annually from her donors, and her family members not only sit on the board of her non-profit, but many get paid from it. The political elite and the lobbyists have convinced themselves that they can beat me, and they are doing everything they can to fund my opponents in an effort to win this race; but it won't happen. While I was working hard for the people during our 46 day 2023 General Assembly session, they were busy trying to raise money and collect endorsements from politicians. I on the other hand, since 2019, I have not taken money from special interest groups or lobbyists. The people are tired of politicians who are already bought and paid for by the political ruling class by the time they are sworn into office. In fact, they are sick of it. They want term limits and caps on campaign donations, both of which I have introduced year after year in the Senate. Many tell me that they love that "I'm a fighter." They love that I can't be bought by special interest groups or lobbyists and that I introduce legislation that people care about. When my Republican Caucus leader sponsored tax increases and gun control, I left the caucus; not because I didn't like the Senators, but because what they were doing was wrong and I stood up to them. They wanted to teach me a lesson. Now that same Republican Senate Minority Leader has hosted at least one fundraiser for my RINO opponent Glen Sturtevant who will go along to get along with the political elite who are not for you. Because I stood up to them, they changed the Senate rules and took away all of my committee assignments, striped me of my seniority and stuck my desk in the corner. Nobody puts baby in the corner. So, I ran for Governor. I was the front runner, until the State GOP implemented a Rigged Rank Choice Convention, which creates many hurdles that disenfranchise most registered voters from participating in choosing their Republican nominee, because they do not understand how to vote. So only those who faithfully participate in their local GOP Committee and their friends choose our Republican nominees. That's wrong! And not only did I call foul play. I sued the Republican Party of Virginia over it. We should include those who vote Republican, not just those who are able to volunteer for a GOP Committee. Now some of the party elite hope I will simply leave and not fight for my seat, but that won't happen either! Knowing how much support I have with the people, my opponents who are puppets for the political ruling class knew they had to start early. Well my question is, "Where have their candidates been?" Neither one of my opponents stood up to the gun control groups when they were coming for your guns. They were no where to be found in 2020 when HB961 was presented to the Democrat controlled Senate Judiciary Committee. I was on the front row when the Democrat Senate Chair called me up to his chair to let me know the anti-gun bill, that would turn law abiding gun owners into felons overnight, would pass by for the year because of my efforts to lead our grassroots in calls, emails and visits to legislators. The Democrat controlled Senate Judiciary committee understand that Virginians support gun rights and we won. I proudly led the effort to ensure law abiding citizens would not be turned into felons and was one of the only elected officials to speak at the annual VCDL Rally in Richmond, which turned out to be the largest 2A Rally in Virginia history. I have consistently fought publicly and unapologetically to preserve and restore your gun rights as a law abiding citizen. The entire almost 8 years I've served in the Virginia Senate, I'm the only candidate who can say I have a perfect lifetime score of 100 percent with the Virginia Citizen's Defense League and A rating with the NRA. I understand the importance of eliminating gun free zones which only turn participants into sitting ducks in a barrel. I get it because I live it. As it stands, I am the only candidate who also carries for personal protection and will do everything I can to restore gun rights lost in 2020 with the Democrat Trifecta. Neither one of my opponents participated in any effort to push back against covid mandates. Delegate John McGuire was the only legislator to join me for the "Reopen Virginia" Rally that I led. We drove our cars ar0und capital grounds and beeped our horns while Governor Ralph Northam was giving his weekly Covid update. You could hear our beeping horns during his live weekly presentation. Neither one of my opponents has done anything to call for an investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election or called for a FULL forensic audit. Actions speak louder than words. This session I was the ONLY legislator to introduce legislation to call for a FULL forensic audit. I'm the only elected official from Virginia to witness in person the full forensic audit in Arizona and the release of the Executive Summary from the gallery of the Arizona Senate gallery. I used the knowledge I gained from the Arizona full forensic audit to draft and introduce 10 bills to put the guardrails back on our elections using the knowledge I gained in Arizona and also my role as National Election Integrity Chair. I introduced legislation requiring photo identification to vote, requirement of a notary signature and required excuse to vote mail-in or absentee, elimination of voter ballot boxes that have no chain or custody, elimination of the permanent absentee voter list which allows live ballots to be mailed automatically to voters and the list goes on. I stood on my feet for 4 hours straight presenting 10 election integrity bills to the Democrat controlled Senate Privileges and Elections Committee which was controlled by Democrats. Even though I knew they would kill all 10 bills to put the guardrails back on our elections, I introduced and presented them anyway. I put these Democrat Senators on the official record as voting against fair, free and transparent elections in which every legal vote should count. And we will use this video when they run for re-election. During the pandemic, I was the ONLY legislator who refused to wear a mask. In fact, they built a plexiglass wall around my desk on the Senate floor. Later it was discovered that masks are actually hazardous to your health and make you more likely to contract Covid. Later, I cosponsored and passed legislation that allowed parents to determine whether or not their child would wear a mask to school. I was the ONLY legislator to introduce legislation to make it illegal to discriminate against people who choose not to wear a mask or get the vaccine. I was the ONLY legislator to be illegitimately censured for attending the January 6 rally to exercise my First Amendment right to participate in a "Stop the Steal" Rally with President Trump. I was the ONLY legislator to be canceled on Facebook. WHY? Because I'm one of the ONLY legislators who has the fortitude to stand up for you. Please give your most generous donation before it's too late. Time is ticking. Friday, March 31 at midnight is our next big fundraising deadline I will need to fully fund my re-election campaign. We are a long way from our goal and we really need your help now. Will you allow the Establishment to get rid of one of the only voices in the Senate who stands up for you? Please donate today. If they silence me, they know they don't have to address the issues that are most important to you. I need your help to make it to the finish line. We need at least 5,000 people who love their country and want a fighter, to donate $100 or more so that we can fully fund my re-election campaign and win. Can I count on you? You know you can count on me. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jen=20Kiggans?=
subject: Just when it couldn’t get worse…MORE TAXES?!
body:
Mr. President, enough is enough! | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=218452983e&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=2765eb56ed&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Peter,
Inflation has hit an all-time high, interest rates are skyrocketing, the cost of living has continued to rise, and the debt ceiling is quickly approaching. And what did President Biden include in his newly released budget? Increased tax rates...! [Are you tired of broken fiscal policies?](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=7f06bc2154&e=4955722b3e)
---
| [YES >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=15c100decd&e=4955722b3e "YES >>>")
---
| [No >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=f3c00560be&e=4955722b3e "No >>>")
---
| It is unacceptable that the very people who are struggling the most to make ends meet are being asked to bear the burden of the Democrats poor fiscal policies. From day one, Joe Biden has contributed to the economic struggle facing every American. His priorities, as well as the priorities of the Democratic Party, are not the priorities of the American people. We need leaders who are willing to prioritize the needs of working-class families, not just the wealthy and corporations.
I am calling on all Americans to join me in telling Joe Biden, enough is enough! It is time for our elected officials to listen to the needs of the people and take action that will benefit all Americans.. We must demand that our leaders focus on policies that will create jobs, lower the cost of living, and provide real relief to struggling families. Together, we can create a better future for all Americans.
---
| [Are you tired of broken fiscal policies? >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=12793db6b0&e=4955722b3e "Are you tired of broken fiscal policies? >>>")
---
| With Gratitude, Jen Kiggans
---
| | | | | | [](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=6ba0c4ab9e&e=4955722b3e)

We need leaders who are willing to prioritize the needs of working-class families, not just the wealthy and corporations. I am calling on all Americans to join me in telling Joe Biden, enough is enough! It is time for our elected officials to listen to the needs of the people and take action that will benefit all Americans.. We must demand that our leaders focus on policies that will create jobs, lower the cost of living, and provide real relief to struggling families. Together, we can create a better future for all Americans. | "Are you tired of broken fiscal policies? >>>" | With Gratitude, Jen Kiggans | | | | | | | | | | | | Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60212321/396390643/-1708609261?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2348-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMGVhNTVjLTNhYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6sRhka7O3Dy1SwOwKdqKsPxTh-zC9qfeqTri739qpkc=)Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean _all_ work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.

I’m running for reelection so I can _keep_ fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at _CNN_ say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: ****[Will you give $15 or more right now – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60212331/396390651/-1708609261?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2348-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMGVhNTVjLTNhYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6sRhka7O3Dy1SwOwKdqKsPxTh-zC9qfeqTri739qpkc=)**

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”

**The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.**

**[That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $15 or more now – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60212339/396390661/-1708609261?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2348-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMGVhNTVjLTNhYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6sRhka7O3Dy1SwOwKdqKsPxTh-zC9qfeqTri739qpkc=)**

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Friend, this update out of New York should worry _all_ Democrats:
**_First,_** New York Republicans had their best election cycle in _two decades_ — flipping enough House seats red to retake the majority. On that same ballot, Lee Zeldin, a far-right extremist, nearly won the race for governor!
_**Then,**_**Zeldin attacked me directly on Twitter, saying that running to defeat me in 2024 would be an _"epic clash." _**

**I'm fighting back with everything I've got, but I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, which means I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you. I can't afford to show the GOP any signs of weakness right now – but we're still $3,183 short of our critical mid-month goal.**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. clean_body: | | | Friend, this update out of New York should worry all Democrats: First, New York Republicans had their best election cycle in two decades — flipping enough House seats red to retake the majority. On that same ballot, Lee Zeldin, a far-right extremist, nearly won the race for governor! Then,Zeldin attacked me directly on Twitter, saying that running to defeat me in 2024 would be an "epic clash." Now,the GOP is targeting me for defeat to turn New York red and deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. I'm fighting back with everything I've got, but I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, which means I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you. I can't afford to show the GOP any signs of weakness right now – but we're still $3,183 short of our critical mid-month goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: He’s selling Snake Oil to Latino Voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Latinos for America First**
body:
Radical leftist Ruben Gallego is trying to remove Arizona's Kyrsten Sinema from the U.S. Senate.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62439144:6mylvMG8N:m:1:3365131770:9C315038690BAE2A2C276C8DFC093422:r "Scale") Peter: You have a choice. Do you want the U.S. Senate to be run by radical progressives or do you want it to return to body filled with an individual who will strictly adhere to the U.S. Constitution? Radical leftist Ruben Gallego is trying to remove Arizona's Kyrsten Sinema from the U.S. Senate. Sinema opposed many of the radical Biden spending policies in the last year and has worked alongside Republicans to curtail Biden's socialist agenda. Progressives are seeking to tip the scales in favor of Gallego, and **they 've already donated millions to his campaign since the January launch.** The more he attacks conservatives, the more they donate. While you're still licking your wounds from the 2020 and 2022 Elections, my team and I are working nationwide to reverse the losses and increase the gains we helped deliver in these last two cycles, but we need to ensure we have the resources to stop Gallego from winning Arizona's U.S. Senate race. **[Help us stop radical progressives from tipping the scales in this Arizona Senate Race. Donate $25, $50, $100 or more TODAY and help us lay the groundwork for a conservative to win!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62439144:6mylvMG8N:m:1:3365131770:9C315038690BAE2A2C276C8DFC093422:r "Help us stop radical progressives from tipping the scales in this
Arizona Senate Race. Donate $25, $50, $100 or more TODAY and help us lay the groundwork for a conservative to win!")** With the left fighting each other for the seat, we need to use the opportunity to show v Latino Voters why the Democrat Party has gotten too extreme for them. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62439144:6mylvMG8N:m:1:3365131770:9C315038690BAE2A2C276C8DFC093422:r "Headline")**Our job is to expose how the Democrat Party will keep them from living the American Dream and shuns their commitment to faith, freedom and free enterprise.** Progressives like Gallego want to divide us and push our country farther to the left than AOC. He wants open borders but then claims he is seeking to help the people. He wants to reduce crime, but then wants to ban guns and defund the police. He wants to "protect" families but supports Planned Parenthood funding and abortions. He wants to slam other members of Congress from taking donations from lobbyists, but he's married to one. **[Will you help us tip the scales in favor of sanity? Donate $50 or more TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62439144:6mylvMG8N:m:1:3365131770:9C315038690BAE2A2C276C8DFC093422:r "Will you help us tip the scales in favor of sanity? Donate $50 or more TODAY!")** Progressive billionaires from coast-to-coast support him while he sells snake oil to Latino Voters and uses his base to pressure more support. **Gallego will rubber-stamp Biden 's agenda and confirm more federal judges to strip our Constitutional rights away. That's why Conservatives must take this race seriously and engage early.** Latino Voters need know that they'll have a choice next year and not feel pressured to vote Democratic because Gallego, a fellow Latino, is on the ballot. That means we need to educate them early. **[Take a stand TODAY and help us set the course for our nation's history before progressives have the chance to tip the scales in their favor. Donate TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62439144:6mylvMG8N:m:1:3365131770:9C315038690BAE2A2C276C8DFC093422:r "Take a stand TODAY and help us set the course for our
nation’s history before progressives have the chance to tip the scales in their favor. Donate TODAY!")** For America, Bianca Gracia
Founder
Latinos for America First PAC

Don't miss out on this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be a part of something truly extraordinary. | | = | Join today and you'll gain access to a wealth of perks tailored to your chosen tier, including: Invitations to exclusive member-only events Networking with like-minded individuals A limited-edition Common Sense Club hat, reserved seating at events, and VIP access to our annual gala, where you can rub shoulders with key community leaders and decision-makers. These limited spots are going quickly, so claim yours before it's too late. Join the movement that will make a lasting impact on New Jersey and our great nation. We're eagerly awaiting your arrival. Every day that passes, we come closer and closer to Illinois' April 4th Consolidated Elections, and the IDCCA has a lot of work ahead of us beating back extremists in the elections for **more than 6,000 offices on the ballot.**

While we have another fundraising deadline left before then, we need the resources to carry out critical work much sooner than four days before Election Day. We are shifting to Get Out The Vote mode and that means we need your help to get Democrats out on Election Day.

Unfortunately, I'm here to say we're still running $935 behind on our $3,500 mid-month goal.

**[Fellow Democrats, these are funds we need to raise to maximize our impact and keep hateful extremists from sabotaging local governments and schools across our state. name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652183%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eMXiBxOhF6pGJY%2bs3ki2ag&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. name: Lila Rose
subject: Tell Walgreens to say NO to abortion
body:
As you may have heard, Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have announced that they will start selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription.

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4stledlh1lfqn4mqq2ckmd9g0v8nlu81taeijig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjg62p32c9h2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

I have an urgent request.

As you may have heard, Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have announced that they will start selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription.

Despite outrage from thousands of customers and pro-life individuals who took action and made their voices heard, these pharmacies remain undeterred.

**Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have committed to turn your local pharmacy into a neighborhood abortion facility, putting the lives of countless preborn children and their mothers at risk --and your action is needed today, before it's too late.**

**[Please sign the petition to tell CVS, Walgreens, and Rite Aid to protect women and children by keeping the abortion pill out of their pharmacies.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdjktnnmieqg3p7een3a7p77121du6ugr1f7r8tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjg62p32c9h2bs)**

True health care heals; it does not kill. We must stop our pharmacies from turning into abortion businesses.

The abortion pill has killed 5.6 million preborn children since 2000, and the number of babies whose lives are ended by this lethal method is skyrocketing. Over 50% of abortions in America are now committed by the abortion pill.

The Biden administration FDA is working to eliminate regulations on the pills, paving the way for pharmacies to start dispensing this lethal drug in every city--even in pro-life states with stronger protections for preborn children.

This is the deadly new frontier of Big Abortion, and we must fight back.

You can add your name to the petition here:**[https://www.liveaction.org/wallgreens-cvs-petition/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb7v3s4it7cg11u4aggt1h2a9jeeqbq5hlqvd7po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjg62p32c9h2bs)**

Thank you for standing up for our most vulnerable and for being their voice.

For Life,

Lila Rose
President and Founder

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeoalf9nbtlabkr3jtkck2eglime60r0t0gth6do_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjg62p32c9h2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They used her like a lab rat
body:
Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot,Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decidedshe was “trans”... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente’s multi-billion-dollar_ _industry to “transition” her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmh7luk3a16qb5roimau602ecaiuhpbnqo19h4u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjg62o32c5h2bs)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe’s healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to “test” their “gender affirming care.”** Now for the rest of Chloe’s life, her voice will always be deeper, she’ll never be able to breastfeed – if she can even have children – and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe’s healthy body for profit.****And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **...and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust.**[**I’m asking you to support Chloe’s landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation of $35 to the case’s legal fund.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1aeie4643v962entvuu0sva0jlj4nps7f5065eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjg62o32c5h2bs) Winning this case won’t be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country.They’re going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine.**But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we’ll shut them down.** [**I’m counting on you to join me in Chloe’s fight today by supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible $35 donation to our legal fund.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhn0k2gkd9p3hl0543ir3jccg816154esmj3dqp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjg62o32c5h2bs) Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat.
---

name: Young Democrats of America
subject: TONIGHT: Join NC & VA to support labor in the South
body:
YDNC and VAYD are teaming up to host a panel of labor leaders to discuss what's next for organized labor in the blue-trending South. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn8n5Nk2vU85Vm1rEi1fHyenvdj80CZOkkxB6m6KW5_n2jplni7qxipz_qhMgwCfA-y4HKOQwR7RkJIgUd3O5XNaEyxR73MokQZiHyIQA1zqXPf0gpS7IlNIpZtdEgpuXEw4Alaz-1tEDD1UjYYn-zeMo9rK3Fzo60SkJ1IUy_6iTsgFpcVh4p83irpZurwc31lS_twvNLpn80P9ljeHZoZ2Hqj9y9dsAvVTMyonL68bJyBVrIhxv_5IZR_BnE5qgHQkEgFiRHxQriYQr1hgv5LRZvLRxuEb99lYAFz9ZHnTDvPeZQDc4oi4nJAkOPuBdI/3ui/3DvH1ISxR6ap1SEXoAV5PA/h0/Z81rKf10Qaocn8YANIGwOUu2qbOt046B4i_zR94jFlk)
---
Derek- **Tonight at 7pm,** the Young Democrats of North Carolina and the Virginia Young Democrats are teaming up to co-host a panel on what's next for organized labor in blue-trending Southern states like Virginia and North Carolina. A recent, shocking announcement of the [closure of a union paper mill](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlykidiKlcIs4CajloI6I9eoEQPmS_C1mzCIlblvFadzqIUun8J9T2VN-z5eEnupsefbYPmw-6uIA_ATlL8ZCrJ3t_Vo0XUBvac0eOXKsG1CBHnIX68kFnCLU-Wfz1UIFkaQ8REiEilcaIOT6OCtcAATmXRY6HmbrAkg0cipy_tRlZgVWmAn2StasCjtXFSvNKgL4Be6TFdmefpFniKDaT5_4CwQtDzaOUydjgq4qe_5nEuaP0uVfLlqaBCKLut9bqBQpxcl14zSe1cOrA_SGf477NRLFwhn4VDlUqem2zt6D4zg7cgn9a-7ww_zhzR1F5h_aawqzYXLRKwz1PEbPjzA0NhmPQZ80pQSqf61KON4XMt3bDuJaFULcT-ySsu4dA/3ui/3DvH1ISxR6ap1SEXoAV5PA/h1/WQCuSFyxWlw_ilrMzh3qtImb6bQNlEhiGa7X3YKIKMM) in Canton, NC—just as the union's contracts were set to expire—has upended the lives of over a thousand union workers in western North Carolina. This is a critical time for labor in the right-to-work South.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn8n5Nk2vU85Vm1rEi1fHyenvdj80CZOkkxB6m6KW5_n2jplni7qxipz_qhMgwCfA-y4HKOQwR7RkJIgUd3O5XNaEyxR73MokQZiHyIQA1zqXPf0gpS7IlNIpZtdEgpuXFy53TgMW4a4nKxoD5XaOklJM_yCeGbkztN9r7iVVCmRvPz79DrsfKuxd6_XFw75-wlcEMzT5EX_ohLvdXVWZg8hSufjJj87cGsU-FMiRqmJooArguGQ381Y9kIJmjzEXGT6tPq6GppVHCRIqRbfsfwuY8IQLcEgguXwofIjIFNhZhC3-CGPrvTMx-PAhr0Mhw/3ui/3DvH1ISxR6ap1SEXoAV5PA/h2/VePYVNCf7n5pLNflJWwFASPXLpbBhFUyQGKOKfIo9b0)
---
[GET THE ZOOM LINK ON MOBILIZE >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLwpHTS0pS5n55DPLaWMQKl-Isw3CyoUMPZNGz-bPp7R2eS0tQtIXXRsXRM10Beujs0Yx4GInuoGqxx32oivSCw3FaFgMeXPg9RzmBZrcYZ-HIjpXNNJTej_4Fb2d2TDifyGJf8koh69Z-ytJZtR-PTb_mdtbY6uisYSGdwmDMJYtRD7_PRIwyZ1j4rMHuJDnSUcgyOJdNxBPPQLw5mKSg2VIWHoXL7DQHbeCh7Y-L2Gj_uAbhp4Bv5ToTuwtACTK00v7rf57bdxgs_NLJBpQflXOp3akBzlkhy3kim6d2g4RO2SQEFrnZgeE2sZLBDh8b_EibNCFRvRkmWUX-5bHQSyQITaq2F2AFVaypPCSE1fwx9jgKSKLY-GMyvI7sv0Sw/3ui/3DvH1ISxR6ap1SEXoAV5PA/h3/L61TDjDKpPWKBzfKbgeFcLQrjJJ6lVlGHjyCM1zLHxE) Tonight we'll be discussing topics such as strategies for passing pro-worker legislation and repealing anti-worker laws, addressing the needs of Southern unions, getting Southern Democrats to pay more attention to labor issues, and crafting a persuasive message about the benefits of unionization to the general Southern public. **Panelists:**
* VA — Del. Elizabeth Guzmán
* VA — Lynlee Thorne, Rural Ground Game
* NC — Grant Welch, VP NC AFL-CIO, CWA
* NC — Mikeya Jones, CWA 3640

clean_body: YDNC and VAYD are teaming up to host a panel of labor leaders to discuss what's next for organized labor in the blue-trending South. | | Derek- Tonight at 7pm, the Young Democrats of North Carolina and the Virginia Young Democrats are teaming up to co-host a panel on what's next for organized labor in blue-trending Southern states like Virginia and North Carolina. A recent, shocking announcement of the in Canton, NC—just as the union's contracts were set to expire—has upended the lives of over a thousand union workers in western North Carolina. This is a critical time for labor in the right-to-work South. | Tonight we'll be discussing topics such as strategies for passing pro-worker legislation and repealing anti-worker laws, addressing the needs of Southern unions, getting Southern Democrats to pay more attention to labor issues, and crafting a persuasive message about the benefits of unionization to the general Southern public. Panelists: VA — Del. Elizabeth Guzmán VA — Lynlee Thorne, Rural Ground Game NC — Grant Welch, VP NC AFL-CIO, CWA NC — Mikeya Jones, CWA 3640 This event is open to everyone—so come join no matter what part of the country you're from! Together we can build a stronger movement for organized labor in solidarity with the South. | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: Florida Update (via DLCC)
subject: Republican governors can’t act alone
body:
With his MAGA allies in the state legislature, DeSantis’ extreme agenda already has the Florida GOP’s rubber stamp | | |
---
| | **Ron DeSantis is giving state Republicans a blueprint for GOP extremism.** Last week, he laid out his right-wing priorities ahead of Florida’s legislative session as state legislators move to enact their extreme agenda including: ✖ Banning abortion at six weeks
✖ Attacking the LGBTQ+ community from criminalizing drag shows to restricting transgender rights
✖ Expanding gun access by scaling back licensing requirements and **encouraging school employees to carry guns**
✖ Targeting educators and students by slashing curriculum and banning books
**_...And much more_** With his MAGA allies in the state legislature, all of these policies and more could come to fruition. But DeSantis won’t stop there – **he wants Florida to be a model for Republicans across the country!** **Republican governors can’t act alone – they rely on support from state legislators to get their agenda off the ground.** That’s why it’s critical that we build our Democratic power in statehouses across the country, so we can fight back against extremists and defend our democracy from DeSantis’ brand of dangerous right-wing Republicanism. Here are the facts: DeSantis is anti-abortion, anti-voting, anti-LGBTQ+ rights, and anti-democracy. He has chosen to lead by pandering to far-right fringe Republican extremists – and with his highly expected 2024 presidential run, he’s setting out to prove himself as the Republican Party’s new face of extremism. **He’s dangerous – but he’s not alone.**
There are _hundreds_ of state Republicans across the country looking to Florida and DeSantis as an example of GOP rule – we need to double down on our efforts to defeat state Republican extremists _now_ to stop their far-right crusade in its tracks.
But to give state Democrats the resources they need to defeat Republican extremists nationwide, we need committed grassroots Democrats from your state and across the country to step up and invest in our movement today. **Can we count on you?**

clean_body: With his MAGA allies in the state legislature, DeSantis’ extreme agenda already has the Florida GOP’s rubber stamp | | | | | Ron DeSantis is giving state Republicans a blueprint for GOP extremism. Last week, he laid out his right-wing priorities ahead of Florida’s legislative session as state legislators move to enact their extreme agenda including: ✖ Banning abortion at six weeks ✖ Attacking the LGBTQ+ community from criminalizing drag shows to restricting transgender rights ✖ Expanding gun access by scaling back licensing requirements and encouraging school employees to carry guns ✖ Targeting educators and students by slashing curriculum and banning books ...And much more With his MAGA allies in the state legislature, all of these policies and more could come to fruition. But DeSantis won’t stop there – he wants Florida to be a model for Republicans across the country! Republican governors can’t act alone – they rely on support from state legislators to get their agenda off the ground. That’s why it’s critical that we build our Democratic power in statehouses across the country, so we can fight back against extremists and defend our democracy from DeSantis’ brand of dangerous right-wing Republicanism. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Here are the facts: DeSantis is anti-abortion, anti-voting, anti-LGBTQ+ rights, and anti-democracy. He has chosen to lead by pandering to far-right fringe Republican extremists – and with his highly expected 2024 presidential run, he’s setting out to prove himself as the Republican Party’s new face of extremism. He’s dangerous – but he’s not alone. There are hundreds of state Republicans across the country looking to Florida and DeSantis as an example of GOP rule – we need to double down on our efforts to defeat state Republican extremists now to stop their far-right crusade in its tracks. But to give state Democrats the resources they need to defeat Republican extremists nationwide, we need committed grassroots Democrats from your state and across the country to step up and invest in our movement today. Can we count on you? – Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:

| | | Peter - we won't mince words with you: **The Liberal Mob just launched a coordinated political AMBUSH to bring down Fox News ONCE AND FOR ALL!**

Here's what we know as of this moment - the Liberal Mob is racing to...

- Block Fox reporters from White House press briefings
- Boycott the network entirely to attack its credibility
- Circulate petitions to take popular hosts off the air
- Strip the network of critical ad dollars to attack Fox financially

_The Liberal Mob 's goal is crystal clear. They want Fox News - the largest news source for Conservatives in America - ripped off the airwaves and shut down for good._

_**[Trusted media sources for Conservatives must be protected, especially in a world where Democrat propaganda networks like CNN and MSNBC control so much of the news cycle and can stir Liberals into a FRENZY whenever they please.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436801:66izvMGKN:m:1:3365131770:9A811BB79E13812311F2FDB2B40E69BB:r "Trusted media sources for

stir Liberals into a FRENZY whenever they please.")**_

Will you add your name to our official petition so we can prove there are thousands of Conservatives fed up with these attacks on our trusted media networks?

Hi Peter, there have been a number of important updates in our campaign, so I wanted to take a moment to make sure you had the latest. Here’s what you need to know about my campaign in IL-17.
---
* **This week, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) listed me as one of the top targets they want to unseat in 2024.** I was the only House member from Illinois added to their list, which means our race is poised to become the most competitive in the state.

* **Last week, House Democrats designated me as a "Frontline" Democrat.** The Frontline Program is how the national party signals to Democrats across the country that winning our race is essential in our effort to retake the House.

* The analysts at _Inside Elections_ just released their first report on the major House races of 2024. **They explicitly called out IL-17, and said we will remain "the most competitive House race in Illinois.”**

* **The end of this month marks my first public FEC deadline as a member of Congress.** It's hard to overstate just how important it is that we show the largest fundraising total possible.

---
**[Will you make a contribution of $5 today? name: VoteVets
subject: Our toughest fight yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets is focused on putting your contributions to work in a way that will have a real impact.
#
Hey Derek,
We’ve been emailing a lot lately.
But we would not be doing it if it were not so important. And we’re sorry to say it, but our fundraising has started to fall off.
Not by a little, either.
Right before our first FEC deadline of the year, the timing just isn’t great.
So today, we’re coming to you. We haven’t convinced you to chip in yet, and that’s okay. Maybe it wasn’t the right time for you. But ahead of one one of our toughest fights yet in 2024, we’re asking you to join us.
From our campaign to ban Fox News hosts like Tucker Carlson on Military bases, to the millions we spend backing Veterans in tough races around the country — VoteVets is focused on putting your contributions to work in a way that will have a real impact.
**[So if you’re able, please rush VoteVets a $3 donation. It’ll help us get back on track ahead of this critical FEC deadline, and we’ll use every dollar to elevate the voices of Veterans against dangerous radicals in Congress like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230315-1-15&t=1&akid=7793%2E3013755%2ELT3Xjp)

body:

I’m reaching out because President Biden’s approval is the highest it's been in almost a YEAR, **_and that could be a leading indicator of a MASSIVE blue wave!_**

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s **_critical_** that we have accurate state-by-state data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

But I just checked our President Biden approval poll and didn’t see your response -- in fact, without hearing your answers, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll in Pennsylvania!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Let me tell you a story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
|
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436896:6a17KMGN2:m:1:3365131770:50F22A72010F66A2C5D90B45FD0FE89C:r)
---
I want to tell you a story that shows you exactly who I am - from where I started to what made me the man I am today. All I'm asking from you is that you read it all the way through. Thank you in advance.

I was the son of two working-class teachers. I spent my winters deer hunting and my summers trimming Christmas trees on our family farm. Throughout high school, I wrestled, which created opportunities I never thought possible - like going to West Point for college. At West Point, I continued to wrestle, but I also began a new journey in service to our country. I trained hard and became a paratrooper, working my way up to a 2nd Lieutenant.

One day I learned I was headed off to the Gulf War as part of Operation Desert Storm.

Because of the chaos and secrecy of the mission, we didn't get a chance to call home and say goodbye to our families before deploying, and were only able to stay in touch by mail, so I sent my parents letters as often as I could. My mom even still has them in a box at home!

It became harder and harder to keep in touch. There were a lot of restrictions for security reasons, so we really didn't get our mail very regularly.

Until one day shortly before Christmas.

A huge box showed up at our camp right before Christmas. My unit opened it up to find a Christmas tree that my dad had picked out from the farm. By some miracle - a Christmas miracle! - it somehow made it past all the censors and restrictions.

So for a few days in the middle of the Saudi desert, my camp had some proper Christmas cheer, and for me, I had a piece of home and a reminder of where I had come from.

This unexpected blessing made even the most hard bitten soldiers smile.

I tell you this story because it summarizes who I am and where I came from. **My new book,_Superpower in Peril_ , draws on experiences like these to set out on a new path toward America greatness.**

America used to be a global superpower as recently as the 90s, but now, that status is in peril. When writing my plan for America, I drew on my childhood, growing up on a Pennsylvania Christmas tree farm, to my training days at West Point to fighting in Desert Storm to my experience as a job creator, ultimately crafting and creating my conservative agenda to renew America.

clean_body: | | | | | I want to tell you a story that shows you exactly who I am - from where I started to what made me the man I am today. All I'm asking from you is that you read it all the way through. Thank you in advance. I was the son of two working-class teachers. I spent my winters deer hunting and my summers trimming Christmas trees on our family farm. Throughout high school, I wrestled, which created opportunities I never thought possible - like going to West Point for college. At West Point, I continued to wrestle, but I also began a new journey in service to our country. I trained hard and became a paratrooper, working my way up to a 2nd Lieutenant. One day I learned I was headed off to the Gulf War as part of Operation Desert Storm. Because of the chaos and secrecy of the mission, we didn't get a chance to call home and say goodbye to our families before deploying, and were only able to stay in touch by mail, so I sent my parents letters as often as I could. My mom even still has them in a box at home! It became harder and harder to keep in touch. There were a lot of restrictions for security reasons, so we really didn't get our mail very regularly. Until one day shortly before Christmas. A huge box showed up at our camp right before Christmas. My unit opened it up to find a Christmas tree that my dad had picked out from the farm. By some miracle - a Christmas miracle! - it somehow made it past all the censors and restrictions. So for a few days in the middle of the Saudi desert, my camp had some proper Christmas cheer, and for me, I had a piece of home and a reminder of where I had come from. This unexpected blessing made even the most hard bitten soldiers smile. I tell you this story because it summarizes who I am and where I came from. My new book,Superpower in Peril , draws on experiences like these to set out on a new path toward America greatness. America used to be a global superpower as recently as the 90s, but now, that status is in peril. When writing my plan for America, I drew on my childhood, growing up on a Pennsylvania Christmas tree farm, to my training days at West Point to fighting in Desert Storm to my experience as a job creator, ultimately crafting and creating my conservative agenda to renew America. Peter – **Right now** , a conservative federal judge is holding a hearing on the legality of mifepristone, one drug of the two-step abortion pill regimen — the most common form of abortion in the country. The case was brought by a group of extremist anti-choice activists who are using shoddy science to claim the drug — which has been used safely by hundreds of thousands of women — should lose its FDA approval. **Once again, our human rights and bodily autonomy are in the hands of a conservative, white, anti-choice man, who nobody elected.** We’re bracing for the outcome of this case, and in order to prepare for all possible scenarios, are building up an action fund to fight back. Whatever the result, we’ll be working hard to restore reproductive rights in this country. clean_body: | = Peter – Right now , a conservative federal judge is holding a hearing on the legality of mifepristone, one drug of the two-step abortion pill regimen — the most common form of abortion in the country. The case was brought by a group of extremist anti-choice activists who are using shoddy science to claim the drug — which has been used safely by hundreds of thousands of women — should lose its FDA approval. Once again, our human rights and bodily autonomy are in the hands of a conservative, white, anti-choice man, who nobody elected. We’re bracing for the outcome of this case, and in order to prepare for all possible scenarios, are building up an action fund to fight back. Whatever the result, we’ll be working hard to restore reproductive rights in this country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your solidarity, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Jon Tester
subject: I'm a farmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
I’m personally asking you to join my reelection campaign | | | Can I explain something, Peter? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.** Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. **And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.** **_[That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 or more between United Rural Democrats and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xxj3DnMoZyyrBrGmnfRdqSdffayqxUTYkxlelO2LcBsBmO1-s8132Q_oVrsgE5BcP3acYFXOdYnmCmPA5h5WpiNRKHzbS9CbX8_qGjCK1LPldlfGiM2f7qdovV9a2yoenZ_nfL8FZZGE7ocvCyWZte5fmwDSv6nCR32cYGzFGNPu0bBHiQeC-25gxfpuCLJ4GCOl39LUnYwoRDjf4I2sGF2bKQ4kIaY3nXagXZzsc1CYRqoO2AJbz2qkSOtQZFzRLY3pS2ghMnxR5tIl5pwuSpwiJvi6g1glQmM8TZPIZxHSpSOiyBJqMCgzq6DOwyUw0/3ui/vUXd7TiJTJS9B2BhF5S2dQ/h0/q4-ou0ryrVJKgpdmXlanbvL2PfdeEFZqg2P8Dm3XIlA)_** **__** **[DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xxj3DnMoZyyrBrGmnfRdqSdffayqxUTYkxlelO2LcBsBmO1-s8132Q_oVrsgE5BcOBXRslcTZqx6AUWxzlxjqrZxmfLWPfIQrrKCekYGJB_qhsfZRjaAZ-o8pwULfvLnqGPtG0e_SrOduyHbjwOaa6o3MuxY0JS8Z0GgmBpxaRkP9DTg67M3-nkFE4llO9lq_477gIFPBoyeDpUgV1QAlHs01kEnmFP19oITAAl-BvDcH5G43qNnUJ0-ZmH51JEWhAyEBaKsQaVDKsMAfwSo13QQkqGBEbOoMzcw-IxAWZbsyAdGDLTbwR2NTbTupjyH4/3ui/vUXd7TiJTJS9B2BhF5S2dQ/h1/s3RabSOcXQUUjEukOljlLNWbcyk_D8xSf3bo-K9xVjc)** Thank you so much for sticking by me. name: The Ohio Dems
subject: Reproductive rights can be on the ballot — with your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Ohio Democrats are proud to have endorsed a commonsense reproductive rights ballot initiative that could enshrine the right to reproductive freedom into our state constitution.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60218959/396415379/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWY2Y2JiYS00OWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8gtFJS1WWU8sccavOuhO8hiP8OU6lviqYrZC5XJut4=) | Here's the bottom line, team:

_The majority of Americans and Ohioans support access to safe and legal reproductive care._ That's why Ohio Democrats are proud to have endorsed a commonsense reproductive rights ballot initiative that could enshrine the right to reproductive freedom into our state constitution!

We have a plan to gather the signatures needed to get this reproductive rights measure on the ballot. But gathering the resources needed to reach folks in every corner of Ohio isn't going to be cheap – which is why we're counting on this grassroots team to help us reach the $25,000 fundraising goal before our mid-month deadline.

**[Help Ohio Democrats kickstart our plan to put reproductive rights on the ballot! We have a plan to gather the signatures needed to get this reproductive rights measure on the ballot. Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

Fellow American,

As a parent, one of the things that keeps me up at night is worrying about the things my children will be exposed to when they reach school age.

The speed at which the woke agenda has infiltrated our classrooms is both **astounding and terrifying.**

In schools across America, **starting in kindergarten** , little boys and girls are now being forced to learn and indoctrinated with woke ideas about gender identity and racial privilege.

And when parents speak out and protest what their little ones are being taught, **they are ostracized and even attacked by school officials.**

_Parents across the country, including myself, are terrified at the idea that our rights as parents over our children’s education and rearing could be completely out of our control._

**This will not happen when I am President. Full stop.**

Between combating the destructive woke agenda and keeping it out of our schools, to abolishing the Department of Education and completely reforming our education system in America, **we have a lot of work to do.**

Here’s a little-known fact: the U.S. Dept of Education is actually responsible for much of the wokeism now in schools. They use federal funding as a handcuff to get schools to bend the knee. _**Yet another side effect of the managerial cancer in government.**_

I know I’m not the only parent - or grandparent - disturbed by what’s happening in America’s schools. **[Will you join me and save our children from having the woke agenda forced on them in the classroom and on the playground by chipping in $5 to my campaign today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bcaf60961be04eec8bc3dbf81f2d54bc&_e=oUuKQwllMmCWu8jTEMkBim-O55IzuXLH33S8q2B0bI49so_AlHTEprHEbGPcaFk0hdDGR7PE6tWo_bsG1G_QzQXI1xMkYBgL7o9CUM5QKCF6s7z0ITFylikFgJGq-brdjlt9SWP4dONbvSBQVqmZIkd0gI6WWOaH8-1Qg-6QTXz0I1MpHawBqOJQUQ3juNZ5_HsD3MCzgCUjAsh1DK4V5nxnpYBL6CXbi9wqVcs-VpQYz8w9YEQuzgfJ8Kt8d1s1z-6mAqNO7CeCTw7jG6GMAbGFVev-5n2j06NGLcXgvgewZ51DeNJyr7lsGhBr_IqHJJdgRvWUBxoSSbtulakP3kSQqGDa9Y7Ed3wZlbtyaFLmciGLIxevu_YEOsNqknsxlyKpI4KUUTm6R7vnSMawyw%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This will not happen when I am President. Full stop. | | Fellow American, As a parent, one of the things that keeps me up at night is worrying about the things my children will be exposed to when they reach school age. The speed at which the woke agenda has infiltrated our classrooms is both astounding and terrifying. In schools across America, starting in kindergarten , little boys and girls are now being forced to learn and indoctrinated with woke ideas about gender identity and racial privilege. And when parents speak out and protest what their little ones are being taught, they are ostracized and even attacked by school officials. Parents across the country, including myself, are terrified at the idea that our rights as parents over our children’s education and rearing could be completely out of our control. This will not happen when I am President. Full stop. Between combating the destructive woke agenda and keeping it out of our schools, to abolishing the Department of Education and completely reforming our education system in America, we have a lot of work to do. Here’s a little-known fact: the U.S. Dept of Education is actually responsible for much of the wokeism now in schools. They use federal funding as a handcuff to get schools to bend the knee. Yet another side effect of the managerial cancer in government. I know I’m not the only parent - or grandparent - disturbed by what’s happening in America’s schools. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Happy Women's History Month, Peter!

My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber.

Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!**

I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color.

**And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher.**

**[That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need strong women in Congress, and I’m asking you to support that effort by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Kim Schrier's to elect more women into office.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60219376/396417118/-1582910304?refcode=em23_230313_mm1_fnd_gq_act___kc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_mm1_fnd_gq_act___kc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9498f470-4ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDk4ZjQ3MC00YWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r55DK0LrABphTU9rmlWAnp9MjpefYSZVeJdIRUxZkLs=)**

Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.

Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we _all_ do better.

**Together, Kim and I will continue the fight for gender equity and women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve.**

**[So please, if you can afford to, split a contribution today between my campaign and Kim's and help us fulfill the country’s promise of equality and opportunity for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60219382/396417124/-1582910304?refcode=em23_230313_mm1_fnd_gq_act___kc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230313_mm1_fnd_gq_act___kc_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9498f470-4ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDk4ZjQ3MC00YWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r55DK0LrABphTU9rmlWAnp9MjpefYSZVeJdIRUxZkLs=)**

Thank you for your support, Peter! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America.

All my best,

— Katherine

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: missed you yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I reached out yesterday because we needed 16 folks to chip in $3 or so to help get our fundraising on track.
| | |
---
Hello,

I reached out yesterday because we needed 16 folks to chip in $3 or so to help get our fundraising on track.

In the last few weeks of our 2022 campaign, polls got really tight and pundits doubted whether we’d win. Taking on the debt was the right thing to do, but we’re still paying down the bills we owe. The bad news is, fundraising has really slowed down. THAT is why I was hoping you’d be on the list of donors yesterday.
[**Do you think you could pitch in today? name: Justin Pitts

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
So let’s make her irrelevant

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60219706/396417884/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDIzNGVkOC00YWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9jGpR-RuWz_Cfpp-x-bDB_XuoGGWG5Av-zoQBtX6TA=&emci=57958203-70c2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=90234ed8-4ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, if you’re like me, you’re sick and tired of hearing about Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Everything she ever does is to draw attention to herself and her fervent support of Donald Trump. It’s not to help anyone in her district. It’s not to bring attention to a key issue facing America. It’s about her.

_**So let’s make her irrelevant.**_

I know I miss the days when I could ignore what she said because she didn’t have any power. But now that she’s on two of the most powerful congressional committees, I can’t ignore her! _**It’s too dangerous.**_

**So here’s the plan: we make her irrelevant again. We flip control of Congress, remove her from her powerful committees, and send her into obscurity.[_Will you join us in our movement for a return to common sense in Congress and rush a donation before our midnight deadline?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60219707/396417886/710125701?refcode=20230315.2_JP_3AD_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDIzNGVkOC00YWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9jGpR-RuWz_Cfpp-x-bDB_XuoGGWG5Av-zoQBtX6TA=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: So let’s make her irrelevant | | | Peter, if you’re like me, you’re sick and tired of hearing about Marjorie Taylor Greene. Everything she ever does is to draw attention to herself and her fervent support of Donald Trump. It’s not to help anyone in her district. It’s not to bring attention to a key issue facing America. It’s about her. So let’s make her irrelevant. I know I miss the days when I could ignore what she said because she didn’t have any power. But now that she’s on two of the most powerful congressional committees, I can’t ignore her! It’s too dangerous. So here’s the plan: we make her irrelevant again. We flip control of Congress, remove her from her powerful committees, and send her into obscurity.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I’m working every day to flip control of Congress, and I want you on my team. = If we work hard, we can defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and her MAGA extremism. – Justin Justin Pitts Deputy Executive Director Democratic Party of Georgia | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Our American way of life is UNDER ATTACK!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436169:Jb_oHMGNz:m:1:3331421248:9B0E7197DCE417690F81912EEF86141C:r)
---
Peter, we're under attack.

But not from any foreign adversary; _we're under attack from within._ **And the aggressor is the Democrat Party.

** At this very moment, Americans like you and me are being attacked for our beliefs, our ideals, and our morals.
| [ **PROTECT OUR COUNTRY!** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436169:Jb_oHMGNz:m:1:3331421248:9B0E7197DCE417690F81912EEF86141C:r)
---
Make no mistake: All across the country, radical leftists are trying to change the fundamental American way of life that we know and love.

**Enough is enough.[ Will you stand with thousands of fellow patriots to help us put an end to these liberal attacks?

](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436169:Jb_oHMGNz:m:1:3331421248:9B0E7197DCE417690F81912EEF86141C:r)** Never before in our country's history have we seen one party:
* **FORCE** gender identities on our children
* **LABEL** parents as terrorists for trying to protect their children
* **IGNORE** the invasion of human traffickers and drug smugglers pouring across our southern border

**But now that is exactly what we are seeing - a party that appears committed to destroying our country from within.** And it's time for conservatives across the country to stand together and put an end to this liberal madness. [**Can I count on you to join us?

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436169:Jb_oHMGNz:m:1:3331421248:9B0E7197DCE417690F81912EEF86141C:r) I'm fighting for our country in Washington, D.C., and I need true patriots like you all across the country to fight back against these insane liberal agendas.
| [ **STAND UP TO THE DEMOCRATS!** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436169:Jb_oHMGNz:m:1:3331421248:9B0E7197DCE417690F81912EEF86141C:r)
---
**We have to step up to stop our communities and our country from being torn apart from within by the Democrats.

** We have to step up RIGHT NOW to protect the greatest country in the world, a country that has lifted more people out of poverty, provided a better standard of living, and made a better life for more people than ANY OTHER country in history.

[**Will you join the fight?

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62436169:Jb_oHMGNz:m:1:3331421248:9B0E7197DCE417690F81912EEF86141C:r) Thank you,

Harriet Hageman
| **PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**

| | Derek, Last month, you told us what issues matter to you most, and we want you to know: Senator Warner is listening. The issues we asked you about will be on the ballot in our upcoming General Assembly election. From legislation on gun violence to abortion access, healthcare, and more – it will all be on the line this November. And Mark knows what must be done to protect our progress – **we have to elect Democrats across the Commonwealth.** That’s why he’s already on the road traveling across Virginia to support the campaigns of Democrats who will fight for the things _you_ care about. **_[**Will you chip in anything you can right now before our mid-month deadline to help us fuel Mark’s efforts so we have the best chance of winning in November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60221189/396421856/783205722?refcode=mw_em_230315_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVhODNjYy00Y2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Zn2yaFaMWhJfzkUj33Bop-JhFWfAy_Bl472UUyhxmg=)_** The elections this fall will be critical when it comes to the future of access to abortion, the safety of our streets, our education system, and so much more. name: Lila Rose
subject: The FDA expands abortion by 1,000%
body:
As you may have heard, Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have announced that they will start selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription.

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d11cb3364fef48d0b54c858517d35575&_e=-HYnms05lYFRc8oP8F5oipitGqJ5eoOLz126Qqyka6KVMrcgjYN9GqLyHr1GejtLdK7eK4Z5wkrNJr4DCTlmYTawwz6jwKhsClS8c_iffAZi8TIOKW_t3SBXvYarzipoe0MueSQCaj9pCKGo_nY7asvIoFS4t7nbCWlXHCFC5tRhhT-N1IdZG3l5QfbZNAsp9WwEgbyIh8UhVXZXhZQLfvC7poH5FkQOeY0ER8UcTUIYiNAc6LDuBKBXrCvuo6GN1uYAKCxrHT5llcW18i08LQkhxWiecsU4WTAKuweLJyCREw_4Kch1DfocpmF2CX5u-NwMIqMxGDd5PQGEpefuqKVoyoxj-BEpt-gDFe71MB5cH07GEW4SZZzKaRPrmp1E)
