#
Friend of Life,

I have an urgent request.

As you may have heard, Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have announced that they will start selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription.

Despite outrage from thousands of customers and pro-life individuals who took action and made their voices heard, these pharmacies remain undeterred.

**Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have committed to turn your local pharmacy into a neighborhood abortion facility, putting the lives of countless preborn children and their mothers at risk --and your action is needed today, before it's too late.**

**[Please sign the petition to tell CVS, Walgreens, and Rite Aid to protect women and children by keeping the abortion pill out of their pharmacies.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d11cb3364fef48d0b54c858517d35575&_e=-HYnms05lYFRc8oP8F5oipitGqJ5eoOLz126Qqyka6KVMrcgjYN9GqLyHr1GejtLdK7eK4Z5wkrNJr4DCTlmYTawwz6jwKhsClS8c_iffAZi8TIOKW_t3SBXvYarzipoe0MueSQCaj9pCKGo_nY7asvIoFS4t7nbCWlXHCFC5tRhhT-N1IdZG3l5QfbZNAsp9WwEgbyIh8UhVXZXhZQLfvC7poH5FkQOeY0ER8UcTUJvYOnGHMc0jovQaJn7QfOpXcsfLND8Rpw18TrsF3aYfhJYZzS1JiUlMre6poehj9NLRNrBENUyDRaqO4-ygxnjzyeUgKIMIYrIRvF8aB-USueIUTjgv6dxTGiNFM-VhWl4VRu-6dktyxcaxMYShjP0)**

True health care heals; it does not kill. We must stop our pharmacies from turning into abortion businesses.

The abortion pill has killed 5.6 million preborn children since 2000, and the number of babies whose lives are ended by this lethal method is skyrocketing. Over 50% of abortions in America are now committed by the abortion pill.

The Biden administration FDA is working to eliminate regulations on the pills, paving the way for pharmacies to start dispensing this lethal drug in every city--even in pro-life states with stronger protections for preborn children.

This is the deadly new frontier of Big Abortion, and we must fight back.

You can add your name to the petition here:**[https://www.liveaction.org/wallgreens-cvs-petition/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d11cb3364fef48d0b54c858517d35575&_e=-HYnms05lYFRc8oP8F5oipitGqJ5eoOLz126Qqyka6KVMrcgjYN9GqLyHr1GejtLdK7eK4Z5wkrNJr4DCTlmYTawwz6jwKhsClS8c_iffAZi8TIOKW_t3SBXvYarzipoe0MueSQCaj9pCKGo_nY7asvIoFS4t7nbCWlXHCFC5tRhhT-N1IdZG3l5QfbZNAsp9WwEgbyIh8UhVXZXhZQLfvC7poH5FkQOeY0ER8UcTUJr7hZx_ZzNSA8kicL8aP_-aRmymUGcqBO1SGb2hXfk18P-wAWorS8W-W61kymZNP89e0sGaqimKucP-MsvhihSchFbPJibxa78DxTHdE-AnWp4Te2-FWcXviKpHtWW0aRuYRBE0rfZ4892x1AK4Dqb)**

Thank you for standing up for our most vulnerable and for being their voice.

For Life,

Lila Rose
President and Founder

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d11cb3364fef48d0b54c858517d35575&_e=-HYnms05lYFRc8oP8F5oipitGqJ5eoOLz126Qqyka6KVMrcgjYN9GqLyHr1GejtLdK7eK4Z5wkrNJr4DCTlmYTawwz6jwKhsClS8c_iffAZi8TIOKW_t3SBXvYarzipoe0MueSQCaj9pCKGo_nY7asvIoFS4t7nbCWlXHCFC5tRhhT-N1IdZG3l5QfbZNAsp9WwEgbyIh8UhVXZXhZQLfvC7poH5FkQOeY0ER8UcTUKJ-laIwMVoVGokfls5YsfCQ9WL_avgjNheEFAbpux4_GgPwinGYFty8a6lniapQWUFwUwmIa1HXhbzQ0YcUGoa01gFu3lZrjvFMbqDVoEZmeHtfshcwmGnl_shWWTmuRCPwYsSjvqSjsLR8V1uuRZm)

body: 96 https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/no-svb-bailout-e mail?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023march15hf  Friend — When Joe Biden says his plan for Silicon Valley Bank isn’t a bailout and that it won’t cost taxpayers a cent, don’t believe him. His plan is a bailout. Period. It will force community banks in Kansas and across America to foot the bill for a woke California bank’s failure. How? The FDIC will pass fees onto community banks. Those fees will eventually be forced onto depositors — YOU, the taxpayer. This is a horrible precedent to set. I will vote NO on any bailout bill that comes to the U.S. Senate. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/no-svb-bailout-email?utm _source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023march15hf If you’re with me, not Biden and the woke billionaires, I hope you’ll take action here. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/no-svb-bailout-email?utm _source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023march15hf Senator Roger Marshall https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/no-svb-bailout-email?utm _source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023march15hf DONATE NOW »   https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email -footer?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023march15hf Keep reading for a personal message from Doc: Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: ☀️ Ruben Gallego’s supporters - please don’t miss this message before midnight.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We are passionate about our fundraising model, because at its core, this campaign is powered by you.
#

☀️ To all of Ruben Gallego’s supporters. Please don’t click away.
We’ll get straight to the point: Our FEC fundraising deadline is coming up and we’re short of where we need to be to hit our goals.

According to our records, you’ve yet to make your first online contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate.
We hope that can change today. Not only because this FEC deadline is a huge deal, but because the donations we’ve received so far are a big part of why we’re leading in the polls and are racking up a bunch of good, early endorsements.

Here’s a fun fact:
Out of more than one million people on Ruben’s email and text messaging lists, less than 3 percent have made a donation so far.
We need to do better than that before this week’s end-of-month fundraising deadline.
So tomorrow morning, we’re going to send Ruben a list of everyone who made their first online contribution today. We’d love to put your name on it.

Our average donation is $28. Many donors give less. But what matters most is making a donation today, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in before this FEC deadline ends.
[**If Ruben winning this race and voting to bypass the filibuster seems worth $3 to you, we’re humbly asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this campaign by making a donation before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight. Thank you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230315-1-20k+ld&t=1&akid=469%2E734936%2ELYmG30)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: small problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1_logo]Hi there, I’ll be fast –
Our first quarterly deadline of 2023 is a couple of weeks away. After that, my campaign is required to publicly report how much money we’ve raised.
Here’s why it matters: pundits will use the number we post as the first indicator of our campaign’s strength. With Republicans in the House Majority and campaign experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s imperative that we knock this out of the park.
Here’s the problem: my team just pulled our fundraising pacing report and we’re a bit behind. Nothing we can’t bounce back from, but I do need to ask you for $10 today to help close the gap. Can I count on your help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$15 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15] $30 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1&express_lane=true&amount=30&refcode2=EL30]
$75 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1&express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode2=EL75] $150 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1&express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode2=EL150]
$300 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1&express_lane=true&amount=300&refcode2=EL300] OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-mar2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230315_MM1&refcode2=ELother]
I don’t take asking you for money lightly, and I’m so grateful for anything you can do to help.
All my best,
Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

clean_body: [] [ there, I’ll be fast – Our first quarterly deadline of 2023 is a couple of weeks away. After that, my campaign is required to publicly report how much money we’ve raised. Here’s why it matters: pundits will use the number we post as the first indicator of our campaign’s strength. With Republicans in the House Majority and campaign experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s imperative that we knock this out of the park. Here’s the problem: my team just pulled our fundraising pacing report and we’re a bit behind. Nothing we can’t bounce back from, but I do need to ask you for $10 today to help close the gap. Can I count on your help? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: $15 » [] $30 » [] $75 » [] $150 » [] $300 » [] OTHER » [] I don’t take asking you for money lightly, and I’m so grateful for anything you can do to help. All my best, Lisa Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In 2017, Ted Cruz was eager to meet with bankers for gobs of cash. He's knee-deep in this crisis and up for reelection in 2024, after barely holding on by 2% in 2018. It’s an open secret he can be beaten in 2024.
body:
Ted Cruz out in 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdba34ae5-6a29-4f06-9f18-7fc175a6c367/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The SIlicon Valley Bank (SVB) crash was the second largest in U.S. history. Repulsive Senator Ted Cruz is a big reason this happened. ** **[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the candidate fund to remove Ted Cruz from public life?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb54a285e-5fed-4908-841f-353a4ff1d63c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _We cannot let right-wingers who deregulated railroads, leading to the Ohio tragedy, and cut a hole in President Obama's Dodd-Frank bank regulations--created specificially for banks like SVB--get away with it. This piece from 2017 about the banking de-regulation frenzy in Washington makes Cruz's role clear:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ccf56de-b09d-4979-956f-8e83c8d40ad4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Cruz was eager to meet with bankers for gobs of cash. He's knee-deep in this crisis and up for reelection in 2024, after barely holding on by 2% in 2018. It’s an open secret he can be beaten in 2024._**_And, of course, Cruz won't be hurt by the bank crash he helped cause. His wife's an executive at Goldman Sachs. He's probably on his way to Cancun. _
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ea91495-785d-4219-a1e0-75976942cc17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Meanwhile, Dallas-area Congressman Collin Alred's preparing to join the race. Raised by a single mother, Allred played in the NFL, worked in the Obama Administration and, in a huge upset, knocked out incumbent Republican Rep. Pete Sessions in a swing seat in 2018. He's the highest profile Black politician in elective office in Texas, has a ton of charisma and is a great public servant._** **There's a candidate fund set up to go to Allred when he gets in the race: ****[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the candidate fund for Allred as he removes Ted Cruz from public life?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T830a28a7-9269-458d-bdc1-4b82e967e649/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you for helping take this blight on Congress and our democracy out of office.** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6516c2cd-71da-4cf7-9a75-748ea7d567fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/texassenatecandidatefund-cruzsvb-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d351162-d70d-4d72-8325-9c3321e2ceb9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: John Pierce
subject: BREAKING: FBI destroyed January 6 evidence, committed felonies
body:
The FBI admitted that in electronic documents they thought had been erased. | | | | [ ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FKdufu892WzwH8llftLiGE5og%2F5M4I5DU0m3Uil892j2mpLDEg/1/01000186e6346eae-28fd23bc-61c1-4f10-9b3f-ae47a2142af3-000000/L0rjnIX-CNHTLld7lgp1bZ9hKNc=313)
---
* * *

Please read the message below from our sponsor, NCLU.
We encourage you to [**visit their site today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FKdufu892WzwH8llftLiGE5og%2F5M4I5DU0m3Uil892j2mpLDEg/2/01000186e6346eae-28fd23bc-61c1-4f10-9b3f-ae47a2142af3-000000/uqMUWqD4u9mulxDTg7T0oaodjzA=313).

* * *
| [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FKdufu892WzwH8llftLiGE5og%2F5M4I5DU0m3Uil892j2mpLDEg/3/01000186e6346eae-28fd23bc-61c1-4f10-9b3f-ae47a2142af3-000000/aFv9OGmUVeqKEY5Z8UtLdYK4B98=313)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FKdufu892WzwH8llftLiGE5og%2F5M4I5DU0m3Uil892j2mpLDEg/4/01000186e6346eae-28fd23bc-61c1-4f10-9b3f-ae47a2142af3-000000/nNZzH0HFgZGqmr5kkQEAI36C4K0=313) [ **If you’re sick of the FBI treating Americans’ Constitutional rights like _trash_ , it’s absolutely crucial for you to give a critical $25, $50, $100, or more immediately. ** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FKdufu892WzwH8llftLiGE5og%2F5M4I5DU0m3Uil892j2mpLDEg/5/01000186e6346eae-28fd23bc-61c1-4f10-9b3f-ae47a2142af3-000000/MwhqrGCGLx9cyNbJUpCvcJgcLYs=313)

My associate, attorney Roger Roots, has filed a motion to dismiss the government’s bogus case against innocent American Dominic Pezzola.

In fact, he’s filed for a mistrial.

Not only because Tucker Carlson revealed videos that prove the government suppressed video evidence that can clear January 6 defendants of their alleged crimes.

**But because the government illegally monitored communications between at least one attorney and his January 6 defendant...and the FBI DESTROYED EVIDENCE AND FABRICATED EVIDENCE to railroad innocent patriots!**

The FBI admitted that in electronic documents they thought had been erased.

Patriot, this is a critically important, breaking story. Very few Americans know what you just read.

Expect to see much more about this on cable news and hear much more about on conservative talk radio.

**What the FBI is doing to innocent January 6 protesters is VICIOUS and ILLEGAL.**

And I’m not going to let them get away with it.

I’m going to fight tooth and nail in court for each of the 30 patriots who desperately depend on you and me to defend them.

As you know, they face years, even decades, in prison for crimes they didn’t commit.

They need all the help they can get.

And to be frank, so does NCLU. We need lawyers, paralegals, investigators, and more to help build our cases and to fight for our clients in the courtroom.

**We’re stretched to the breaking point.**

body:

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=abb9a0e6fc0a4be0aad4b7e0a2bbd8b8&_e=xMh_4pS8axOGN5by82lJjxBnYGn5FPQfh3G8-6vMZ7Kf7jk1_0Oa2X_jwGSv6Bo1j3J2VVAuMk9mV7yXZY558R31Flj7LPiMcsRfgpcZDmw1so0hT8mvPLiiToDEs7_N3IWmUtNRL-hgHviTAjpBSTpDPTThWxwRwrMSF7OIAS5ItKyxXili49Q6r7fYj10iISNzC8JKXVTquctBeORDqviFulibaOlNnlJO736uPRvNnZtw2opGEFf2nTL0ZOST38a1tixHWAhwmLRsKGjI21x2h5y1vRfhCSMjtXB65w1imQigaNXwEtPAmTmxs_qintc0_jMTsaoOkSZp2lStwtgbuMYApDXR3gPNegJhfprodwx_O_oDuBK7Vak0YPH81u7CsJQMGsuVfK1Ug-QT3BbNf-lPC0-hUm6MuHYKybY%3D)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=abb9a0e6fc0a4be0aad4b7e0a2bbd8b8&_e=xMh_4pS8axOGN5by82lJjxBnYGn5FPQfh3G8-6vMZ7Kf7jk1_0Oa2X_jwGSv6Bo1j3J2VVAuMk9mV7yXZY558R31Flj7LPiMcsRfgpcZDmw1so0hT8mvPLiiToDEs7_N3IWmUtNRL-hgHviTAjpBSTpDPTThWxwRwrMSF7OIAS5ItKyxXili49Q6r7fYj10iISNzC8JKXVTquctBeORDqviFulibaOlNnlJO736uPRvNnZtw2opGEFf2nTL0ZOST38a1tixHWAhwmLRsKGjI2yCfnK6dzPKTafLZXsbcpSie_hMvdHfkgrDYMk6M6wkVF1wcubD39YnsuWeDsAT23tuR4IsqEwJTIi5zI0JsyfRseX23mvq1e1tzFISM2y9FPYkoJSzQ71W8HWoUq26oKEmtmJsLWriARBDJ_6lDOeA%3D)

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=abb9a0e6fc0a4be0aad4b7e0a2bbd8b8&_e=xMh_4pS8axOGN5by82lJjxBnYGn5FPQfh3G8-6vMZ7Kf7jk1_0Oa2X_jwGSv6Bo1j3J2VVAuMk9mV7yXZY558R31Flj7LPiMcsRfgpcZDmw1so0hT8mvPLiiToDEs7_N3IWmUtNRL-hgHviTAjpBSTpDPTThWxwRwrMSF7OIAS5ItKyxXili49Q6r7fYj10iISNzC8JKXVTquctBeORDqviFulibaOlNnlJO736uPRvNnZtw2opGEFf2nTL0ZOST38a1tixHWAhwmLRsKGjI2ywZShgSX5i_9gerob4LAIRpX9bF-_7pdFLnhxvzvCDXu1kPAMLFqighqN4teXDvMwre89Fv8_GifQWRJjv53d9qvQrzS8SwrwltIlBC84Ol-pIPgtmg0EAkBtOTDJB1C0vwCwhQXO2KZcuL0wx-L7g%3D)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=abb9a0e6fc0a4be0aad4b7e0a2bbd8b8&_e=xMh_4pS8axOGN5by82lJjxBnYGn5FPQfh3G8-6vMZ7Kf7jk1_0Oa2X_jwGSv6Bo1j3J2VVAuMk9mV7yXZY558R31Flj7LPiMcsRfgpcZDmw1so0hT8mvPLiiToDEs7_N3IWmUtNRL-hgHviTAjpBSTpDPTThWxwRwrMSF7OIAS5ItKyxXili49Q6r7fYj10iISNzC8JKXVTquctBeORDqviFulibaOlNnlJO736uPRvNnZtw2opGEFf2nTL0ZOST38a1tixHWAhwmLRsKGjI2wx4PuYfHZ8urWJs3Y6dexotYIZ2gw7oluF_FS8ukQw3yXSCNzSfrLji1jlk2ykrz9KQ0vfreVfDASh6iQrU-T8iiyseUcka75r504K4vV98cTlOupztSd_n9HOodP8R6Fy7d0Wo8EGvDJmZsLxULsA%3D)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=abb9a0e6fc0a4be0aad4b7e0a2bbd8b8&_e=xMh_4pS8axOGN5by82lJjxBnYGn5FPQfh3G8-6vMZ7Kf7jk1_0Oa2X_jwGSv6Bo1j3J2VVAuMk9mV7yXZY558R31Flj7LPiMcsRfgpcZDmw1so0hT8mvPLiiToDEs7_N3IWmUtNRL-hgHviTAjpBSTpDPTThWxwRwrMSF7OIAS5ItKyxXili49Q6r7fYj10iISNzC8JKXVTquctBeORDqviFulibaOlNnlJO736uPRvNnZtw2opGEFf2nTL0ZOST38a1tixHWAhwmLRsKGjI29jGsV4I6NU9bjDmUJmownnwx6oMMne6v8lx1pmbyjTeEKukOo46onsRjo-ryPjofY5ksQa4BpUL6FrTRcZOdvjiogb4TCVYdonD10mbHZjhUyBjtjtj7wbA8M-nlOixUPuPRwTuI_dplw9vi54o9Rc%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=abb9a0e6fc0a4be0aad4b7e0a2bbd8b8&_e=xMh_4pS8axOGN5by82lJjxBnYGn5FPQfh3G8-6vMZ7Kf7jk1_0Oa2X_jwGSv6Bo1j3J2VVAuMk9mV7yXZY558R31Flj7LPiMcsRfgpcZDmw1so0hT8mvPLiiToDEs7_N3IWmUtNRL-hgHviTAjpBSTpDPTThWxwRwrMSF7OIAS5ItKyxXili49Q6r7fYj10iISNzC8JKXVTquctBeORDqviFulibaOlNnlJO736uPRvNnZtw2opGEFf2nTL0ZOST38a1tixHWAhwmLRsKGjI27T6ZADmbAuMqBlN4VGZRSEe1hYq83BaVFZFXocNK7Y_a2LweW-F46qfnCa5rwZ16yT0KMUKL_h6ykQKA7h32h1YNv32X_GXvos8vkRORg3g0TBF1yQzefKaby6c9xnAFeJGeamFTvuMbODW1_uMVZE%3D)

---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Kash Patel
subject: What else are they lying about?
body:
I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=312b933e359a47b18f5d025a4581b1f1&_e=6aG0S-iBHfZoznwdwb1HI-kbBqo9ROBRbRla0lhPclRIRLgmZtU02YrqNGMWtncgaB01q2TY6uweRjKKmAETlyccZ9U0r9J59Eep3w9K40Xk7ZNX1TGGYYJ4dgG63nNdfveKOuSEoXMFVyaluUBzbUY439AHvLQurnD50ExeuLKoQkgm3iOimw5yUFz0yDaWHBMhpG2si8BkbmfQ98iZ3knUQ-1HHe1N4xxXs9qWza7q2fU3jH_96PHZ1QbRd9M1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. body:

If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=e8f29e2ca073491d8aa6d5eebbc75f89&_t=BoJHlYqswAhwqNuaERhNRXJ0SSuuJ58TNna77j7wMJ1ImWYBewF0zebVSK0tp_l8tnWbxUzAzAcv_ZGEiiKpLaLfHZMqmfuzmXkq9tKfP4M%3D). Liz Cheney is trembling.
Tucker Carlson just revealed that everything you were told about January 6th was a LIE.
She used January 6th to paint every Trump loving conservative as an enemy of the state.
Her goal is to put Trump in jail, and have his STRONGEST supporters like YOU locked in a cell next to him.
**But now, every single lie she’s told is being EXPOSED.**
Liz Cheney needs to pay for what she did, but unless we get an overwhelming response at this very moment, she’ll get away with everything.

body:

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4ae8c3fb7a7b415d8f4716a1e4666d0c&_e=yXzHKZMHbYr2I0OIPRi-y1GdvnLDps3H-ADLQnQoqRGRwjqNihDiprXMvmOfi8FBALYUbu7mPqi0CFBPvy1Co6IknZXX029UZfHhBMDTn1ilmW56kNNMRg6CwKebwdfaRaNJ1a1pdsqdmqEIQGBoYZQSIXib-XoWtl3AheGNl5cBS5AuGiM3vd2L85gi7EIBmOZxLuP9a7G1PG29NJs117NokJA9oAM8KMwN6eOfYCtHmLZZirCV8mm3rbOmqhG2Cmea81Am6cOiB7B-_tWjF-TmSq04ghj0JEW9IFQ7gJT6y0WoiQybgwz-nYNyzqPDp64o7zMjic2r9lOaijD9i0vrjBqsez-4jzVgf-HAn_m65b59WRy-WvW1U8ZxtvQo)

Peter, woke environmentalists said the world was going to end in 12 years unless we acted on the “immediate threat” of climate change. **But they’ve been saying that for the last 20+ years.** This same group of people passed legislative packages like the "Inflation Reduction Act" and a so-called infrastructure bill, which spent trillions of taxpayer dollars and funded many of the Left's radical climate projects. Then, they were SILENT when the train derailed in East Palestine, Ohio not long ago. __Where’s the outrage now?___ _ They were too busy pushing their Woke ESG agenda that would make gas stoves, heaters, and even cars a thing of the past to notice this tragedy unfold.

Peter, in a moment, [**I’m going to ask you to contribute to my campaign and re-activate your Team James Membership**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60224124/396432436/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1002-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Q4NWE4MS01M2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fz8I1xIvCpsLfvdy71-mOU97nm8uiZ_TP9RcGJqhOyo=) , but first I want to explain why I’m counting on your support.

Today is Equal Pay Day, and it’s one of the most concrete examples of _why_ we cannot falter in our fight for progress. Because in 2023, women in New York are _still_ earning just 88 cents to every dollar a white man earns. And when we break that into smaller groups, the statistics are even more jarring: **Black women are paid just _63 cents_ and Latina women only _56 cents_ for every dollar paid to white men.**

This is _unacceptable_. That’s why I’m fighting hard for the things that matter most to New York’s working families – workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, a future free of gun violence, and, of course, equal pay for equal work – but I can only win these fights with _your_ help.

**I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their 2023 March Team James Memberships and join our fight for equality, but it looks like I’m still missing your membership, Peter. Peter, if I can be candid for a second, I didn’t grow up with power of privilege. I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for generations from preying on families like my own.

That’s why, when I was elected in 2018, I vowed to do _everything_ in my power to become the fierce fighter that working families like my own need.

But with another Equal Pay Day rolling by and no _real_ progress being made on closing the pay gap, we cannot relent in the fight for equality.

**So please, will you be one of the 1,000 fearless fighters I need to activate their 2023 Team James Memberships before midnight tomorrow?

clean_body: Peter, yesterday, I reached out to you regarding your March 2023 Team James Membership – but it looks like your membership status is still PENDING. I still need 449 new members to reach our 1,000 membership goal by midnight. So please, Peter, will you activate your official March Team James Membership before our midnight deadline? Here’s the best link:= Thank you for your help here. Letitia \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Tue, Mar 14, 2023 Subject: 56 cents to every dollar | | | Peter, in a moment, = , but first I want to explain why I’m counting on your support. Today is Equal Pay Day, and it’s one of the most concrete examples of why we cannot falter in our fight for progress. Because in 2023, women in New York are still earning just 88 cents to every dollar a white man earns. And when we break that into smaller groups, the statistics are even more jarring: Black women are paid just 63 cents and Latina women only 56 cents for every dollar paid to white men. This is unacceptable. That’s why I’m fighting hard for the things that matter most to New York’s working families – workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, a future free of gun violence, and, of course, equal pay for equal work – but I can only win these fights with your help. I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their 2023 March Team James Memberships and join our fight for equality, but it looks like I’m still missing your membership, Peter. So please:= = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Peter, if I can be candid for a second, I didn’t grow up with power of privilege. I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for generations from preying on families like my own. That’s why, when I was elected in 2018, I vowed to do everything in my power to become the fierce fighter that working families like my own need. But with another Equal Pay Day rolling by and no real progress being made on closing the pay gap, we cannot relent in the fight for equality. So please, will you be one of the 1,000 fearless fighters I need to activate their 2023 Team James Memberships before midnight tomorrow? = | | = Thank you for being in this fight alongside me. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

| | | President Biden just released his new budget for the year, and it includes programs and provisions that would seriously improve the lives of millions of Americans. The president’s budget puts families first by restoring the expanded child tax credit which helped cut poverty in half, establishing a national, comprehensive paid family and medical leave program, lowering prescription drug costs, investing in American manufacturing, and spending more on climate, healthcare, and more. This plan would also cut the national deficit by $3 trillion. To sweeten the deal, these critical improvements would be paid for by raising taxes on corporations and the ultra wealthy, and undoing the Trump tax cuts. We need Republicans to do what’s right for America, act like adults, and join Democrats to pass this budget and put working families first. [Sign your name: Tell Congress to pass President Biden’s budget >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc71b328-941c-4eef-a033-d8094030d8ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

On multiple occasions, “No Jail Janet” has given no prison time to child abusers and sex offenders. And when questioned about those decisions she says she has zero regrets and feels those decisions were appropriate. The people of Wisconsin deserve better than a judge who has a record of coddling criminals and putting her liberal values above protecting our communities. Thank you, Wisconsin Republicans Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. www.wisgop.org 148 E Johnson Street, Madison, WI 53703

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What Does “The Good Life” Look Like?
body:
Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life?

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f0e5a7d4a0c4c12ad947d1b2305581b&_e=hGIe1D9mRJfk-flwj0UgoYZrZyCi7SwbGLYjeh_CciItzKOgSc3Au7Qu7nqiCN2d2Q5wAyf4UH1pWZp-ouBJr08v6m2ibLdPN1ziMARK6-5civCu9y1d4FoiFXlfr68EZVElF1_GUB4XcSWif09OYfhyfuyO-BkR0ZtSxLuBVcBiKW-KYT4Cy8EoFL82fPJMfx1c-EU0e9lk1FOJ4Uq5USRag2FpNvbQ3fU6d6Un1fnGVrje381Aw6fD4tX1JzkIa2lET84IlUnwP-1Mk22tKDSAe9SKf5bAy7jfZ3-Pn8DGLpXBz0xOAL7EEuIOn7rlBfqB9uRojMTUX16u8tNSLTy6aPOKpLcKtWSH6C2aolXa0xHfo1Q8TECUF-PrcxMcH-wdhdcjFjtIqx_LxsFYUg%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Knowledge, Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It's part of the human condition to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people. We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and justice when we face difficult questions. In the _Nicomachean Ethics_ --the first book written on how best to live--Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a person's character, which is formed by making good choices. But good choices don't come naturally. That's why every student at Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is so important to living a good life that we've produced our online course, **" Introduction to Aristotle's _Ethics_ : How to Lead a Good Life." **
---
| | And now you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale College edition of Aristotle's _Nicomachean Ethics_ , for personal study. You'll not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, but you will also explore ways to put this knowledge to work.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f0e5a7d4a0c4c12ad947d1b2305581b&_e=hGIe1D9mRJfk-flwj0UgoYZrZyCi7SwbGLYjeh_CciItzKOgSc3Au7Qu7nqiCN2d2Q5wAyf4UH1pWZp-ouBJr08v6m2ibLdPN1ziMARK6-5civCu9y1d4FoiFXlfr68EZVElF1_GUB4XcSWif09OYfhyfuyO-BkR0ZtSxLuBVcBiKW-KYT4Cy8EoFL82fPJMfx1c-EU0e9lk1FOJ4Uq5USRag2FpNvbQ3fU6d6Un1fnGVrje381Aw6fD4tX1JzkIm8Bz2wWIJ-tVBvQS_TL5x2TDIeBj8OSvkxdZF1Xj0lPf93_OCG4fpsfNfjkH7JN75Zm6OJUtYuLJKRbW8bNcIJh-ZiLL-k9YsdtLIs9U3Adx7_R6q-xjihLvpUeIBPqMNEn7DKaE62Uod48mmcntTQ%3D%3D)
---
| | The DVD gives you a seat at the table in a seminar-style class like those here on campus, and you'll read from the same book the students are in the course. In addition to the topics I've already mentioned, the course focuses on subjects including:
* Aristotle's _Politics_ and the Nature of Man
* Deliberation and Choice
* Practical Judgment
* Contemplation and Action

Just consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently said: _" I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every choice we make etches into our soul."_ Make a good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course. Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link: [**_https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/aristotle-dvd-book-offer_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f0e5a7d4a0c4c12ad947d1b2305581b&_e=hGIe1D9mRJfk-flwj0UgoYZrZyCi7SwbGLYjeh_CciItzKOgSc3Au7Qu7nqiCN2d2Q5wAyf4UH1pWZp-ouBJr08v6m2ibLdPN1ziMARK6-5civCu9y1d4FoiFXlfr68EZVElF1_GUB4XcSWif09OYfhyfuyO-BkR0ZtSxLuBVcBiKW-KYT4Cy8EoFL82fPJMfx1c-EU0e9lk1FOJ4Uq5USRag2FpNvbQ3fU6d6Un1fnGVrje381Aw6fD4tX1JzkIeaiApA2Lr05WrNHNAou-EVvK5Rg1cYJ6g4aggIIfiFkyjTWr2AEVjvNACFSS54fCn9aF_WBfUM74UJyjNT4eExHNY9lKZuIgp32AOT4n_Wxu3Ku5vhN4ovrTatGR5oxvhCujz2ouDEHEnJbSOUQG2g%3D%3D) After watching the preview, if you're struggling with a thorny question, I hope you'll join Rebecca and many others by reserving your DVD of [**" Introduction to Aristotle's _Ethics_ "**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f0e5a7d4a0c4c12ad947d1b2305581b&_e=hGIe1D9mRJfk-flwj0UgoYZrZyCi7SwbGLYjeh_CciItzKOgSc3Au7Qu7nqiCN2d2Q5wAyf4UH1pWZp-ouBJr08v6m2ibLdPN1ziMARK6-5civCu9y1d4FoiFXlfr68EZVElF1_GUB4XcSWif09OYfhyfuyO-BkR0ZtSxLuBVcBiKW-KYT4Cy8EoFL82fPJMfx1c-EU0e9lk1FOJ4Uq5USRag2FpNvbQ3fU6d6Un1fnGVrje381Aw6fD4tX1JzkI1CU6WuAE9a87M0MY_sWmAUE0JoGNVmlTqj9gqW2Gd9qU1llngeRXfzaABdgVREtOchxm4VfdML7-33U3AADKiYhEJLwZf2t9PaTD-JXDpnDflJGW5vkB7lbK4PenNpas4SlCSeJrAVHW9KD08DyhIw%3D%3D)**** along with its companion book __ today _._ Quantities of the DVD and book are limited, so don't wait too long to decide. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Arnn, but you will also explore ways to put this knowledge to work. | | | The DVD gives you a seat at the table in a seminar-style class like those here on campus, and you'll read from the same book the students are in the course. In addition to the topics I've already mentioned, the course focuses on subjects including: Aristotle's Politics and the Nature of Man Deliberation and Choice Practical Judgment Contemplation and Action Just consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently said: " I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every choice we make etches into our soul." Make a good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course. Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link: After watching the preview, if you're struggling with a thorny question, I hope you'll join Rebecca and many others by reserving your DVD of **** along with its companion book today . Quantities of the DVD and book are limited, so don't wait too long to decide. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: This is not something I took lightly...
body:
(here's my explanation)

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Petitioning both Harris & Montgomery County GOPs to sign a resolution calling on Governor Greg Abbott to ban the sale and distribution of the COVID-19 vaccine is not something I took lightly.
I don’t like big government and do not believe more legislation is the answer to our problems.
With the understanding that banning the sale and distribution of the jab in Texas can be a slippery slope, I want to explain my thought process.
**FACT:**
The jab is experimental and never should’ve been allowed in the first place.
Shoutout to @jasonfalter on Twitter for adding the following to the discussion...
_"The government (at any level) and private companies have no authority or right to infringe the rights of an individual and their personal healthcare.

Gov used private businesses to force this. That should NEVER happen._"
When the jab was introduced, I refused and still refuse to take it - if you’re anything like me, then you know why.
We were labeled conspiracy theorists and coo-coo.
But we now know that the difference between conspiracy theories and reality is about six months.
**So at the risk of sounding coo-coo once again...**
There’s a mountain of evidence that suggests that the vax is being distributed knowing both the risks and results - and that this is happening with intent.
And so I will say again - the experimental serum should’ve never been released in the first place.
They used your fear against you.
That is why I believe Governor Abbott should ban the sale and distribution of the COVID-19 vaccine until the manufacturers are willing to be held liable for the damages it is causing.It’s as simple as that.
As a matter of fact, the Lee County GOP in Florida has ALREADY done this and it has been sent to Governor DeSantis.
I don’t know about you... but I’m sick of Texas not leading the fight against Tyranny.
Right now, Florida is the freest state in the Union.
Now... that being said, the Harris County GOP has reached out to me and told me that resolutions can only be submitted and voted on by the Executive Committee and that the next Executive Committee Meeting will be in the second quarter of 2023.
I’m in the process of speaking to Montgomery County as we speak.
**If you are reading this right now...**
You have either already signed the petition... or you haven't had an opportunity to.
(Also, those of you who have already signed and received an error message, your signature was recorded and the issue has swiftly been resolved by Anedot.)
We need your help to make a statement. The more signatures we have on the petition, the greater statement we will make.
Residents of Harris & Montgomery Counties... can we count on your support?
**Click on your county below to sign the petition.**

**_FOX NEWS_**
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

clean_body: | | | DEVELOPING FROM THE WHITE HOUSE: President Biden just announced new executive orders to combat gun violence and keep our communities safe! Friend: Thanks to President Biden's bold leadership, these new executive orders will expand background checks, strengthen the reforms that Democrats passed last year, hold the gun industry accountable, and more. This announcement is a major victory in the fight to keep our children and communities safe from gun violence. But we already know that the GOP and NRA will be launching a new onslaught of attacks against President Biden and these bold reforms. We need 1,000 grassroots Democrats to show President Biden that they have his back in this crucial work by responding to our live poll before midnight tonight. As one of the top Democrats in 43614, we're counting on your response. Please tell us now: Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | Links generated exclusively for use by dpwillis67@gmail.com. Deadline to respond: 11:59 p.m. tonight | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

### Take Action in Response to Biden's Approval of the Willow Oil Project
**** Despite public opposition into the millions and critical input from impacted Native groups, like the Native Village of Nuiqsut and [_Sovereign Iñupiat for a Living Arctic_](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDJJDHqEtQbGO_G-PIMDhY76hVPHeqjuuWkW2NS_fHWI71mA4b8nj3le3b7iNTEJ2nK-XX6V3-MJgFR23ECWDDUxq_IF9hfEJ7pX6dX3IhAJ2AHxYFt6qcwdkZaFJqLF9xQY-xr-GfaYIYbkyM_yEre2IfkoBDlXExqoDncb9YYFW-rJ3XFZkG8VsPs5cWfz73ygnx3kzu71dpDu4ec-byMT5bLXGoS3b_Kng8g_kjE_Y0MKQVDy4dbPcDNV3dD-jTXZgTU0yNwWGPTXRsmj4uZiBi2T1KUf1cIaHlPw2x3rb/3ui/K-DHHmC7Sq6RTjMDHmHZBw/h1/ocDoxiRhMdnFyq7u1vt5BddgT_O4IAVZtM98iPYzYUQ) (SILA), this week the Biden administration approved the catastrophic Willow Oil Drilling Project. Willow will devastate Alaska’s North Slope and will emit the same amount of carbon as 76 coal-fired power plants. For Biden to dismiss the ceaseless advocacy and Traditional Ecological Knowledge of Native frontline communities underscores a trend of broken promises and Sacrifice Zones signed off on by the president.

clean_body: TODAY! We're calling Biden to #STOPWILLOW - check out the simple script | | | Take Action in Response to Biden's Approval of the Willow Oil Project ** Despite public opposition into the millions and critical input from impacted Native groups, like the Native Village of Nuiqsut and (SILA), this week the Biden administration approved the catastrophic Willow Oil Drilling Project. Willow will devastate Alaska’s North Slope and will emit the same amount of carbon as 76 coal-fired power plants. For Biden to dismiss the ceaseless advocacy and Traditional Ecological Knowledge of Native frontline communities underscores a trend of broken promises and Sacrifice Zones signed off on by the president. | Take Action! Help drive calls to the Biden administration, registering our condemnation of his decision Call Department of Interior: (202) 208 1923 Hi, my name is (X). I’m outraged to hear that this administration approved the Willow Master Development Project, a disaster for our climate and the Arctic. Millions of people called and wrote in urging your Department to STOP WILLOW. At this point in the climate emergency, any new fossil fuel project is a betrayal of your promises and will drive us further into assured climate destruction. subject: The Wire: Toolkits, Toolkits, Toolkits!!

body:
| | |
---
| | _**Our goal with the MassDems Wire is to give you the tools to boost Democrats and take on the GOP and their Republican allies. Use this information on social media, as the basis for a letter to the editor of your local paper, in emails to your personal network, or in conversation with your friends and neighbors.**_
---
|
---
| | Dear Peter, Our administrations, both locally and nationally, have been hard at work issuing executive orders, passing legislation, and most importantly crafting budgets. It's a lot of information to keep up with, but don't worry – we've got you covered.
We've put together some Massachusetts-specific information, fact sheets, and graphics straight from the Healey-Driscoll administration and the Democratic National Party. Feel free to use this information in emails to your network as the basis in posts on social media, or in conversations with your friends, family, and neighbors. Let's stay informed and make a difference together! **Please forward this email to your networks and don't hesitate to reach out to me directly at brie@massdems.org about using the guidance below.**
Sincerely,

**Brie Bristol**
Digital Content Manager
Massachusetts Democratic Party
---
| | |
---
| |
# **President Biden’s Budget**
---
| | Last week, President Biden released his long-awaited budget, which details a blueprint to invest in America, lower costs for families, protect and strengthen Medicare and Social Security, and reduce the deficit by making the wealthy and corporations pay their fair share, cracking down on fraud, and cutting wasteful spending on Big Pharma, Big Oil, and other special interests—all while ensuring no one making less than $400,000 a year pays a more penny in new taxes. [Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60226341/396441518/-1681334639?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJhMTIzMy01YmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fs-pxtaVhUXYTfn0KzXiwjWCuD1WmGxE0E1vjwA52ds=&emci=c7a58cdb-7ec2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a72a1233-5bc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=17281370) to read the detailed fact sheet from the White House.
---
| | _Topline Talking Points_
---
| |
* President Biden has long believed that we need to grow the economy from the bottom up and middle out—not the top down—and that strategy is working.

* We’ve added more than 12 million jobs—more jobs in 2 years than during any president’s 4-year term.
* The unemployment rate has fallen to 3.4%—the lowest level in more than 50 years.
* The past two years were the best two years for new small business applications on record.
* Wages are rising, annual inflation is slowing, manufacturing is booming, and the economy is growing.
* The president has also delivered on his commitment to fiscal responsibility.
* While the previous administration passed a $2 trillion unpaid tax cut skewed to the wealthy and big corporations and dramatically increased the deficit, President Biden reduced the deficit by more than $1.7 trillion during his first 2 years in office—the largest reduction in American history.
* And the reforms he signed into law to take on Big Pharma, lower prescription drug costs, and make the wealthy and big corporations pay their fair share will reduce the deficit by hundreds of billions more.
* The budget details a fiscally responsible blueprint to build on this progress, deliver on the agenda the president laid out in his State of the Union, and finish the job. It’s built on four key values:

1. 1. Growing the economy from the bottom up and middle out by investing in America and our people.
2. Lowering costs for families—from child care and prescription drugs, to utilities and health insurance.
3. Protecting and strengthening Medicare and Social Security.
4. Reducing the deficit by making the wealthy and corporations pay their fair share, cracking down on fraud, and cutting wasteful spending on Big Pharma, Big Oil, and other special interests.

* Building on the Inflation Reduction Act—which some congressional Republicans are pushing to repeal—this budget will help give families more breathing room.
* It will lower everyday costs for things like health insurance, prescription drugs, child care, utilities, housing, college, clean energy, and more.
* The budget continues to grow the economy from the bottom up and middle out by investing in America.
* It invests in manufacturing, makes our communities safer, expands child care, provides national paid leave, advances research in cancer, delivers for our veterans, and more.

---
| | Looking for the breakdown statistics of American Support of bipartisan majorities? [Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60226342/396441519/-914188424?usp=sharing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJhMTIzMy01YmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fs-pxtaVhUXYTfn0KzXiwjWCuD1WmGxE0E1vjwA52ds=&emci=c7a58cdb-7ec2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a72a1233-5bc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=17281370) or the button below to review them.
---
| | [Click Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60226343/396441520/-914188424?usp=sharing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJhMTIzMy01YmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fs-pxtaVhUXYTfn0KzXiwjWCuD1WmGxE0E1vjwA52ds=&emci=c7a58cdb-7ec2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a72a1233-5bc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=17281370)
---
| | |
---
| |
# **The Corner Office’s Budget**
---
| | Governor Healey and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll know that our 351 cities and towns play an important role in helping Massachusetts reach its potential. Municipalities educate our kids, keep our neighborhoods safe, and create vibrant, healthy communities. Together, we can seize the opportunity provided by historic revenues to make a down payment on our future.
The Healey-Driscoll Administration’s budget provides nearly $55.5 billion for local aid, climate action, higher education, and transportation, and more. Read the full breakdown [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60226344/396441521/84497158?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJhMTIzMy01YmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fs-pxtaVhUXYTfn0KzXiwjWCuD1WmGxE0E1vjwA52ds=&emci=c7a58cdb-7ec2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a72a1233-5bc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=17281370).
---
_Topline Talking Points_
---
| |
* The Healey-Driscoll Administration’s budget includes $6.58 billion to fully fund the Student Opportunity Act with the largest ever increase for K-12 schools in Massachusetts’ history, a critical step towards making sure every student, regardless of zip code, gets the best education.
* The Healey-Driscoll Administration is proposing $1.26 billion, a 2% increase, in Unrestricted General Government Aid that goes beyond the expected rate of revenue growth this fiscal year.
* The Healey-Driscoll administration’s FY24 budget recommendation reflects Massachusetts’ most significant investment in environmental justice, clean energy, clean energy workforce training, and environmental safety ever.

* A $105 million increase at the Executive Office of Energy & Environmental Affairs to reach 1 percent of the overall state budget for the first time in history.
* Dedicating funding for clean energy, environmental justice, workforce training, and safety.
* Invests more than $40 million toward goals outlined in the state’s Clean Energy and Climate Plan.
* $181 million for MBTA capital investments including station accessibility and improvements, bridge repair, rehabilitation, and replacement, and design for the Red-Blue connector.

* Through funding in an upcoming supplemental budget, new hiring and training supports to help the MBTA hire an additional 1,000 positions this year to address workforce shortages cited by the Federal Transit Administration as part of last year’s safety inspection – with an emphasis on diversity, equity, and in that hiring.

---

body:

| | Our number one priority is Education. If you're a member of an organization like the rotary, chamber of commerce or home owners association you may be interested in our Train with a Parliamentarian workshop which reviews Roberts Rule of Order for effective meetings. Anyone who has a career in governance or is a member of a non-profit can benefit greatly from this program. Our next class starts 21 March 2023. We have also started our monthly Conversational Spanish and English meet-ups for serious learners. Our next meeting is 19 March, 5 PM - 7 PM, 106 Waterstone Way, Goose Creek, SC. We are working on a Summer Camp 19-23 June for Penmanship and Cursive Writing and looking forward in helping children who have lost this skillset. If you would like to volunteer, please reach out to us ASAP. Many thanks,Ingrid Centurion[info@generationsforamerica.com](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/39ORcB-De/c?w=z5z2fF3wNtswOvQJFIyHp-IgCbSNckmaNhNhSpkGavI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvQGdlbmVyYXRpb25zZm9yYW1lcmljYS5jb20iLCJyIjoiOGY5NzI3NjktZjUwZC00N2M5LTQ3MDItNDBlMTY2MjVhMmJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDM3MmIzMTktYzNhZi00ZTE1LWEyMTYtNDkwMWNhNWFkNTNkIn0)[www.generationsforamerica.com](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/39ORcB-De/c?w=Yld35wV80PjCctFF5M-qKvW1Qj65xlOK5VU02uvj7v8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhLmNvbS8iLCJyIjoiOGY5NzI3NjktZjUwZC00N2M5LTQ3MDItNDBlMTY2MjVhMmJjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDM3MmIzMTktYzNhZi00ZTE1LWEyMTYtNDkwMWNhNWFkNTNkIn0)

subject: Not the most fun part of the job…

body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTgwH4HBgfNd2zqDaMyEfFWfmOgclPUzie_Gl_P24lKrhu-Y9kya1dDLiYj9BGqcgJ2jHpbVgawV44Lxeejt8-RILKpyyeLXGiPvEBBlrsuoECILMaq2PdU0qAAN363-37840Wpn2JAbdad68KyAOLvdA/3ui/5Fv-6ax4SR6hrvQ-deVtPg/h0/_JrOggfQkyK5RvaiPMXX_OOeWSowRvOQdQWjay0Ua8Q) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
---
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqdCIYIFLfrj38sDGEOZ2y-yeT7jPu0hsumt_vfX5DT9rwtqy320ftLUz8J6kQsWZZ6TyfJTMgG3KuM8xJn45w9GpWOGLLDHnHbLAPEdhc-xg-utZYi1gPl6UtajoC30VO3Q6-N0vpokFNuuaDOsKlei7g9Lv7gjAKMPT5dfw9k1A/3ui/5Fv-6ax4SR6hrvQ-deVtPg/h1/naJyHuENwm4Dk45skNOKjT1fbW65a8nknxmZQqWeums)
**Folks, we have to be honest.
**
Pestering you with fundraising emails this early in an election cycle is not fun.

We know there are plenty of other things you’d like to read than a fundraising plea.

Congressman Ruiz knows this – reaching out like this to ask you to donate is never his favorite thing to do. And it’s honestly a struggle to convey the sense of urgency that gets hard-working folks like you to click donate in March of a non-election year.

**But the unfortunate truth is that if we don’t stay on track with our fundraising targets, even this far out from Election Day, we’ll find ourselves in the House Minority once again.
**
[**So before we explain a little more about what your donation today will mean, can we count on you to chip in just $5 right now and boost our efforts to retake the House Majority? »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad1UPDKtbU9VdBnKa54UyDTE9qSPD6r46--IyW2nb-dkLhGoyKoZ1iyAHORqHTQtlqh1j_Md88TA29Zb0IjTyf0eBKLvOVRlflwI1TbKPO_ooOLWrAbb0LbqxqmOtafncB4apjv0XYgs50DmzmollfNdWMfzUKH5E-O-xCGyrTASLCvj-IPq9iyGe4aQ_e1Hjk58vTWDhTQYpYQdIgRcQhrb3EmK2D38aJ7puPyA7Zh44xAoDwM2Uh4mdQGw5MYn1rNdC5f95CVIu2fTaZcnW4R-HQOJEquqMqWNiqpZTd-jdAjeEHs8UWkF27z17D7PXcwSMBy71kz_hT8AJrzCW176gWqPC6kiSY4xDhAGmFQmS/3ui/5Fv-6ax4SR6hrvQ-deVtPg/h2/O8WO33XF6mHADGtv5DA1DgkYi7Uk5qfSxKgPXQxGOWg) | [CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad1UPDKtbU9VdBnKa54UyDTE9qSPD6r46--IyW2nb-dkLhGoyKoZ1iyAHORqHTQtlqh1j_Md88TA29Zb0IjTyf0eBKLvOVRlflwI1TbKPO_ooJdRwDjbkHnyv7jCzJbq50ASmzKxKjVRavOwWlqDN5tmk3-ex-s_Tfl96FqGiS4ExJRAWS8nyVJxjf8rxtERrx6o7rjzlrD7pOcJnFtVsASg3oMhWPVmHcJVJHcOUwm7GeiLsm4-8K4DbJN5Lrmswq6X_VrW-nzGTJ1VtgJZ082b5WdgM07RkJAfXQrd6phLPIV9VLoy15HeWwq44ZHdZa7TsCdrznS9am0gZBJdifTVamNi0WXI938o7dIqry8Gm/3ui/5Fv-6ax4SR6hrvQ-deVtPg/h3/q_VeY5nHzANfTszZkCGFh-W8yJVN_cWt9j21NdGYumQ)
---
If there’s anyone to blame for fundraising emails like this one, it’s the conservative justices of the Supreme Court who opened the floodgates on campaign finance, effectively allowing unlimited campaign contributions in the now infamous _Citizens United_ case.

Because of that ruling, individual House races will routinely cost upwards of $5 million dollars.

**This means conservatively speaking, our campaign has to raise about $100,000 each month to stay competitive with our GOP opponents.
**
Now look, team, our Democratic caucus is working tirelessly to rewrite our campaign finance laws so that the rich and powerful don’t decide elections in smoke-filled backrooms.

**But we can’t do that when dark money Republicans run the show in Washington.** So we need to get to work now and do everything we can to flip the House, and usher in a new era with less dark money influence, and fewer anxiety-inducing campaign emails.

[**And we know it’s ironic to now ask you to chip in a few bucks, but our grassroots supporters are the strongest weapon we have in the fight against dark-money GOP mega-donors, so we’re asking for you to step up. »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad1UPDKtbU9VdBnKa54UyDTE9qSPD6r46--IyW2nb-dkLhGoyKoZ1iyAHORqHTQtlqh1j_Md88TA29Zb0IjTyf0eBKLvOVRlflwI1TbKPO_ooq28GgtaFwl0RQtiCEphT2sKmsmdQmxpcwVIsTJ_5vXpqxU2EvPVGiBIfRSiQo6Gw4Hxzv-VWvr3xjfDjXQIRSz4em3P5PK9ewW8QnzbwuBUp3UQTkYj3zmVxTpUOqT-Exph3nTrmhBTLzQl2cbcjUtwW-Fjrc1h1gsc34aSJVs1rvdyMz016CQYCDPN02_cJw7vWTDkBnnsAcz4B4Hx0MivJeTw7fzE_DChydrrN04A7JSYu4tIrdwwzsjDPp6VJ/3ui/5Fv-6ax4SR6hrvQ-deVtPg/h4/oThz6fejSUUMG0y9tV7oY9cJf1ze4rjvZY0XKFJR1hU)

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks, we have to be honest. Pestering you with fundraising emails this early in an election cycle is not fun. We know there are plenty of other things you’d like to read than a fundraising plea. Congressman Ruiz knows this – reaching out like this to ask you to donate is never his favorite thing to do. And it’s honestly a struggle to convey the sense of urgency that gets hard-working folks like you to click donate in March of a non-election year. But the unfortunate truth is that if we don’t stay on track with our fundraising targets, even this far out from Election Day, we’ll find ourselves in the House Minority once again. | If there’s anyone to blame for fundraising emails like this one, it’s the conservative justices of the Supreme Court who opened the floodgates on campaign finance, effectively allowing unlimited campaign contributions in the now infamous Citizens United case. Because of that ruling, individual House races will routinely cost upwards of $5 million dollars. This means conservatively speaking, our campaign has to raise about $100,000 each month to stay competitive with our GOP opponents. Now look, team, our Democratic caucus is working tirelessly to rewrite our campaign finance laws so that the rich and powerful don’t decide elections in smoke-filled backrooms. But we can’t do that when dark money Republicans run the show in Washington. So we need to get to work now and do everything we can to flip the House, and usher in a new era with less dark money influence, and fewer anxiety-inducing campaign emails. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, — Team Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 Please, consider making a . To make the most powerful lasting impact, make a. to receive fewer emails. | | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132900?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**There are only a few weeks left of the session, and the Mississippi Legislature is deciding which bills to take to conference. **

Conference weekend is set for March 25, but many are saying that lawmakers may not meet on that day. Instead, they may discuss bills set to go to conference during the week prior to March 25.

Here is what has been going on this week in the Capitol!

**Gov. Tate Reeves signed the protectionist "EV bill," or[ HB 401](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d43afd4435&e=5703353baa), yesterday, and we are greatly disappointed in his decision. **

This bill revises certain provisions relating to a manufacturer's ownership of motor vehicle dealerships. It is an anti-free market policy because it prevents electric vehicle manufacturers from locating dealerships in the state. It discourages competition, and now because of its passage, EV companies will choose other locations outside of Mississippi to build their sites and not bring jobs into our state.

Medical marijuana officially became legal during the 2022 Legislative Session, but several changes were made this year to ensure the program's efficiency and readiness.

**[HB 1158](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a9f0aa1ec4&e=5703353baa) made around 30 small adjustments to the program.** Changes include not requiring physicians prescribing medicial marijuana to obtain additional certifications, but requiring patients to have identification cards for purchasing.

**[SB 2079](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a434648a85&e=5703353baa) from Sen. Angela Hill allows for firearms in schools.** This bill establishes the "Mississippi School Protection Act," a program in which school employees can be trained to act as "guardians" and conceal carry on school grounds for the purpose of defense against active shooters.

We believe this is a good policy and will help students and teachers in the case of an emergency. This bill has passed the Senate, House and has been returned to the Senate for concurrence.

Mississippians may soon be voting on approval of a ballot initiative process. After the 2021 Supreme Court ruling striking down the state's previous initiative process, lawmakers have been debating the proper way to bring back an initiative process in the state.

**[SCR 533](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=615a1187ed&e=5703353baa) amends the state constitution to allow for citizens to bring forward ballot initiatives.**

In the original version of the bill, it called for 12% of the entire Mississippi electorate, but it was amended last week in the House to go back to the original requirement of 12% of Mississippians who voted in the last presidential election.

While we are glad the threshold has been lowered, we do not completely support this legislation because it excludes particular topics from being considered through the process. Regardless of someone's stance on a specific issue, these prohibitions prove to be undemocratic.

The main topic of discussion during this year's session has been the controversial Jackson bills.

A bill to establish the Mississippi Capitol Region Utility Act died last week. **[SB 2889](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=574297072b&e=5703353baa) would have placed the long-term control of Jackson water, wastewater and sewer under a nine-member board. **

**Although this water bill died,[HB 1168](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7e56d5482c&e=5703353baa), which** **seeks to limit special sales taxes to pay only for upgrades and improvements on water infrastructure, passed the Senate and has been returned to the House for concurrence.

[SB 2343](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=aba48a72c3&e=5703353baa) extends Capitol Police jurisdiction into parts of northern Jackson up to the Madison county line.** It passed the House last week, but the Senate declined to concur, so it will be debated in conference.

**Even though this bill passed the House, [HB 1020](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fda7792a04&e=5703353baa), commonly known as the "CCID bill," also passed the Senate with an amendment which would give Capitol Police jurisdiction over the entire city.** If the House concurs with the Senate's changes to HB 1020, then the Capitol Police would be governing the entire city of Jackson, rather than just the areas outlined in SB 2343.

Have a great rest of your week!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0f97d5a2bc&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bae3499d40&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=0aa03210e0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=0aa03210e0).

| | Peter, **We need to issue an urgent warning: A dangerous judge is running to fill Wisconsin's vacant Supreme Court seat. ** Judge Janet Protasiewicz is an activist judge. She has no intention of upholding law and order or keeping our communities safe.

body:
A new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4223ac3a0e384ea0afedd2fe8422ae0b&_e=zWPTTv-H-0bgJXnd5ygA6Apc8vMVwxf5d0JSe-jDWPdFA-4hQ4M-U0Zj80_Mt0xWJ0GIKgJyc4b56a9cETPyz-oMae1IIk_oBUXQWlYshg2SiehmGZG4EccmMjyx3wnKiFdwAiccLAL8AHXBbN8x2nEuzyP--ewXM6ADqXDCZcE6ZR1ZkKy9yLrAso-17_ZPDFqiyePxZe_lBtvWUfq_Yz4zSx9PJMyIO8eV7RTFCNw0IomIvg9zw4dQxN5VAV7xa-fMkc5_OliUfwOSWmzqbyfvSXLoQtK8icNVIxivz1tGr402LEMYfQIsPsnUvC9_uhcF_3aRgs0mzK2Coy3bMpmdDN2pGEEk6gVxBQPlZNk6M-Jzi23Y_sSW5hfYxI5peYiiM43ZghlpfbLS-n9sf8h2T342x31alDWLaJrWaK4%3D)
---
**2023 Senate Survey**
---
| | Peter,
---
I know we haven’t touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track. Despite giving it our all last year, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats still hold the Senate majority. But let me make something abundantly clear, Peter -- we will NEVER stop fighting for you and the issues that matter to you most. Which is why I’m reaching out today. [**I want to hear directly from you about what policies you think the Senate needs to focus on first this year.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4223ac3a0e384ea0afedd2fe8422ae0b&_e=zWPTTv-H-0bgJXnd5ygA6Apc8vMVwxf5d0JSe-jDWPdFA-4hQ4M-U0Zj80_Mt0xWJ0GIKgJyc4b56a9cETPyz-oMae1IIk_oBUXQWlYshg2SiehmGZG4EccmMjyx3wnKiFdwAiccLAL8AHXBbN8x2nEuzyP--ewXM6ADqXDCZcE6ZR1ZkKy9yLrAso-17_ZPDFqiyePxZe_lBtvWUfq_Yz4zSx9PJMyIO8eV7RTFCNw0IomIvg9zw4dQxN5VAV7xa-fMkc5_OliUfwOSWmzqbwJOQBydvpfu0bHZyYDL3ELqVyWqfWlj-d0iqn88PSksnFOjhs76E8vb1kDAHBK_psYJqTh-mOQ6Rhci36FOb2zBR5UvMdA3qLOAlxLWiT75RzOy2gALGF0BAyWXyhTJG7OSEb04KKVnQaPk-20rqgM%3D)
---
[** Open Your Survey >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4223ac3a0e384ea0afedd2fe8422ae0b&_e=zWPTTv-H-0bgJXnd5ygA6Apc8vMVwxf5d0JSe-jDWPdFA-4hQ4M-U0Zj80_Mt0xWJ0GIKgJyc4b56a9cETPyz-oMae1IIk_oBUXQWlYshg2SiehmGZG4EccmMjyx3wnKiFdwAiccLAL8AHXBbN8x2nEuzyP--ewXM6ADqXDCZcE6ZR1ZkKy9yLrAso-17_ZPDFqiyePxZe_lBtvWUfq_Yz4zSx9PJMyIO8eV7RTFCNw0IomIvg9zw4dQxN5VAV7xa-fMkc5_OliUfwOSWmzqb088YSfeeS6Q2rDZ_M4RTZq54T96hLg16dP7grKtBttlQM1ujY0ORVTaEGcid8aW-0hwn1-F4POfKzPf62cIOQ28f7KTl-7HCiIxEODpXRbbJRy0sgXckdvCNP0eFlmw_gPoTxh8xoDlRyh8ZVYiPUs%3D)
---
| | Peter, it doesn’t take a rocket scientist to know the Democrats liberal agenda is crippling our country. Now more than ever what Washington needs is problem solvers who are willing to do whatever it takes to get things done for the American people. I’ve seen firsthand that my Republican colleagues in the Senate are up for the challenge, but now we need to hear from you. clean_body: A new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.| | | 2023 Senate Survey | | Peter, I know we haven’t touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track. Despite giving it our all last year, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats still hold the Senate majority. But let me make something abundantly clear, Peter -- we will NEVER stop fighting for you and the issues that matter to you most. Which is why I’m reaching out today. | | Peter, it doesn’t take a rocket scientist to know the Democrats liberal agenda is crippling our country. Now more than ever what Washington needs is problem solvers who are willing to do whatever it takes to get things done for the American people. I’ve seen firsthand that my Republican colleagues in the Senate are up for the challenge, but now we need to hear from you. Thanks, Lindsey Graham Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC.
