It’s been a phenomenal first month on the campaign trail. Grassroots supporters have helped fuel our effort, and I need support from people like you to help us continue to spread our message. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a17ebc0abd70e42cd35ebbe664036f5dc2d71bba855d7d73cb441b3f050dd2211e0127dc5c59108019978b5af3577da2ce91ee3539e7f3db3 That’s why it is critical that I have you by my side to continue to build a winning campaign and fight to save our country’s future. I want to show you just some of the things we’ve been able to do because of our grassroots supporters, and let you know how your donation would make a significant impact. TAKE A LOOK: I launched my campaign for President one month ago in Charleston, SC. I’m on a mission to make America strong and proud again. Our country is slipping and our leaders are failing us, but I know we can unite and fight to save our country. After I announced, I hit the campaign trail running. I headed to New Hampshire for two incredible standing-room-only town halls in Exeter and Manchester, met with hundreds of Americans, and answered questions from proud patriots across the state. After my stops in New Hampshire, I headed to Iowa to meet with voters, answer questions, host packed standing-room-only town halls, and continue to spread my message. From Urbandale and Marion, to Council Bluffs to Nevada to Clive, I traveled across Iowa and spent time speaking with voters, meeting with farmers and state legislators, and sharing my mission to save America’s future. On Monday, I held a rally in Myrtle Beach, SC with over a thousand patriots in attendance. Everyone was fired up. It was incredible to see the excitement and momentum for our mission to save America. I wouldn’t be sending this message today without the help from grassroots supporters who have stepped up to join our campaign over the past month. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a17ebc0abd70e42cd35ebbe664036f5dc2d71bba855d7d73cb441b3f050dd2211e0127dc5c59108019978b5af3577da2ce91ee3539e7f3db3 > ">If you want to help me continue to spread my message, please send a gift of just $5, $25, $50 or more. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a17ebc0abd70e42cd35ebbe664036f5dc2d71bba855d7d73cb441b3f050dd2211e0127dc5c59108019978b5af3577da2ce91ee3539e7f3db3 If you donate $25 or more, I will send you a commemorative “Campaign Kickoff Tour” t-shirt. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a17ebc0abd70e42cd35ebbe664036f5dc2d71bba855d7d73cb441b3f050dd2211e0127dc5c59108019978b5af3577da2ce91ee3539e7f3db3 DONATE NOW No matter the amount, your gift will play a KEY role in saving the future of our great nation. My very best, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a17ebc0abd70e42cd35ebbe664036f5dc2d71bba855d7d73cb441b3f050dd2211e0127dc5c59108019978b5af3577da2ce91ee3539e7f3db3 Nikki R. Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a17ebc0abd70e42cd35ebbe664036f5dc2d71bba855d7d73cb441b3f050dd2211e0127dc5c59108019978b5af3577da2ce91ee3539e7f3db3 DONATE NOW GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a44cfcb4638a2572a10d91e63a1fe400aea79a0e3768089877beb4c2f2d9c2c83c28971c1eb3f08fdc7731cabeebe92c212b779bf4309a12b >">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a44cfcb4638a2572a10d91e63a1fe400aea79a0e3768089877beb4c2f2d9c2c83c28971c1eb3f08fdc7731cabeebe92c212b779bf4309a12b Claim Your Shirt JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a5251b16bcf7deac5bbf2be00d9eb37a41402ea0657508a40611e14c6cf988b582ed17b9711ce587cfaf438a788a812381a1253f16965926f Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations…and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? Thank you in advance for your support. Thank you, Team Haley P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a5251b16bcf7deac5bbf2be00d9eb37a41402ea0657508a40611e14c6cf988b582ed17b9711ce587cfaf438a788a812381a1253f16965926f DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=53332d9470d86a2a889f09793089144d3277c8a076d512b4a27207103c48bb938e66e75f03bb1b8bb0ee7ab6436350cec4ccfff212dd224c5fbfdddcfa48ddca www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Inc. and Ambassador Nikki Haley (28786) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Biden’s Migrant Catch-and-Release Policy Unlawful, Trump-Appointed Judge Rules
body:
The Biden administration has turned the southwest border into a
meaningless line in the sand and little more than a speedbump for
aliens flooding into the country, according to a scathing federal
court order blasting the president’s controversial catch-and-release
policy.

[alt_text]

[*****]
March 15, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62538&L=29098&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW5zLW1pZ3JhbnQtY2F0Y2gtYW5kLXJlbGVhc2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c8c8c713aca682944c3a31ef6d24d2047516bbf20d20a7bb6caffe28b7464ce5]

The Biden administration has turned the southwest border into a
meaningless line in the sand and little more than a speedbump for
aliens flooding into the country, according to a scathing federal
court order blasting the president’s controversial
catch-and-release policy. Known as Parole Plus Alternative to
Detention (Parole+ATD) the program released over a million illegal
immigrants in the U.S. in a year, supposedly tracking them with
technology and other tools.

clean_body: The Biden administration has turned the southwest border into a meaningless line in the sand and little more than a speedbump for aliens flooding into the country, according to a scathing federal court order blasting the president’s controversial catch-and-release policy. [alt_text] [*****] March 15, 2023 [article-image] [] The Biden administration has turned the southwest border into a meaningless line in the sand and little more than a speedbump for aliens flooding into the country, according to a scathing federal court order blasting the president’s controversial catch-and-release policy. Known as Parole Plus Alternative to Detention (Parole+ATD) the program released over a million illegal immigrants in the U.S. in a year, supposedly tracking them with technology and other tools. subject: FWD: Final Reminder to Sign Up For Our Virtual Lobby Days!

body:
| | | Dear Peter, Our Virtual Lobby Days are less than a week away! Join us on Zoom for a couple hours on March 21st and a couple more on your day of lobby meetings. In the coming days, we will send out links and more information to those who RSVP. [This is your last chance to sign up, so if you can make it, please RSVP today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60228883/396449153/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTA5Y2Y3LTYyYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afuWPKr_MRPpbUIWww6zdjOaa7nt9DBDtZwqC_lOgcA=&emci=af9c1177-60c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=29109cf7-62c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you, and I hope to see you there! Sincerely, Britney VanCitters
OLCV Organizing Manager [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60228884/396449154/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTA5Y2Y3LTYyYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afuWPKr_MRPpbUIWww6zdjOaa7nt9DBDtZwqC_lOgcA=&emci=af9c1177-60c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=29109cf7-62c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, We have just two weeks until the start of [virtual lobby days for the environment!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60228885/396449155/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTA5Y2Y3LTYyYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afuWPKr_MRPpbUIWww6zdjOaa7nt9DBDtZwqC_lOgcA=&emci=af9c1177-60c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=29109cf7-62c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) And it comes at an important time in the legislative session. With an important bill deadline approaching, we need your help to ensure this year’s biggest environmental priorities don’t die in committee, and the anti-environment bills don’t gain traction. [**Can you join us for OLCV/OCN 2023 Virtual Lobby Days?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60228886/396449156/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTA5Y2Y3LTYyYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afuWPKr_MRPpbUIWww6zdjOaa7nt9DBDtZwqC_lOgcA=&emci=af9c1177-60c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=29109cf7-62c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) All it takes is a couple hours of your time on March 21st and a couple more on your day of lobby meetings. All of it done over Zoom. All of it adding up to a big virtual splash for the environment! **OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd**
The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon
**Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm** – Priority Presentations & Training (all participants)
**Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm** – Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16
**Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm** – Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30
You can look up your senate district (SD) [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60228887/396449157/1765198759?appid=fd070b56c975456ea2a25f7e3f4289d1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTA5Y2Y3LTYyYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afuWPKr_MRPpbUIWww6zdjOaa7nt9DBDtZwqC_lOgcA=&emci=af9c1177-60c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=29109cf7-62c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)
Place: **Entirely on Zoom** (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior)
[**RSVP today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60228888/396449158/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5MTA5Y2Y3LTYyYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afuWPKr_MRPpbUIWww6zdjOaa7nt9DBDtZwqC_lOgcA=&emci=af9c1177-60c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=29109cf7-62c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) On March 21st, we will do a training that covers all the official Priorities for a Healthy Oregon, which are Resilient, Efficient Buildings Bill Package; Toxic-Free Bill Package; Factory Farm Moratorium; Zero Waste Bill Package; Natural Climate Solutions; and the budget. Then, on either March 22nd or 23rd, you will get to meet with your state representative and senator to ask for their support on these important bills! What makes our environmental lobby days fun, powerful, and rewarding is people like you. clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, Our Virtual Lobby Days are less than a week away! Join us on Zoom for a couple hours on March 21st and a couple more on your day of lobby meetings. In the coming days, we will send out links and more information to those who RSVP. Thank you, and I hope to see you there! Sincerely, Britney VanCitters OLCV Organizing Manager Dear Peter, We have just two weeks until the start of And it comes at an important time in the legislative session. With an important bill deadline approaching, we need your help to ensure this year’s biggest environmental priorities don’t die in committee, and the anti-environment bills don’t gain traction. All it takes is a couple hours of your time on March 21st and a couple more on your day of lobby meetings. All of it done over Zoom. All of it adding up to a big virtual splash for the environment! OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm – Priority Presentations & Training (all participants) Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm – Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16 Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm – Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30 You can look up your senate district (SD) Place: Entirely on Zoom (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior) On March 21st, we will do a training that covers all the official Priorities for a Healthy Oregon, which are Resilient, Efficient Buildings Bill Package; Toxic-Free Bill Package; Factory Farm Moratorium; Zero Waste Bill Package; Natural Climate Solutions; and the budget. Then, on either March 22nd or 23rd, you will get to meet with your state representative and senator to ask for their support on these important bills! What makes our environmental lobby days fun, powerful, and rewarding is people like you. Thank you, Britney VanCitters OLCV Organizing Manager | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy -but that takes grassroots support! = | = = = = = = Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

[ During a recent episode of her talk show, actress Drew Barrymore knelt down in front of transgender male-to-female activist Dylan Mulvaney. Mulvaney appeared on the show to discuss their popular TikTok series “Days of Girlhood,” which documented his transition process day by day. The moment was captured on video and circulated on Twitter, with some users criticizing Barrymore for “worshipping at the feet” of Mulvaney. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652113%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qsqfFj7TplzJR6ePZ2a23g&sysid=1)

name: Indiana Dems
subject: 2023 is flying by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, 2023 is zipping past us. And if we don’t stop and take stock of where we are, we’re going to find ourselves losing important elections to Republicans this year. Before too much of the year passes, we need to make important decisions about where to invest our resources this year. We have a strategy to improve the lives of Hoosiers by winning at the local level and building the political infrastructure to win even more races over the coming years. From Michigan City along Lake Michigan to Evansville along the Ohio River, there are some really great Democrats running for local offices across Indiana. [**But our plan only works if we have the resources we need to execute it. name: Team Kilmer
subject: Taking a moment to express our gratitude to Secretary Haaland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
After making history as the first Native American to serve as a cabinet secretary, Secretary Deb Haaland has worked tirelessly to deliver results for folks in our region and across the country.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60229653/396452184/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJjN2U4NDgtNjRjMy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s3DL1Sj9t-l5F8YU702fYwvw--N_UknrAJrcJjGIKWM=&emci=2ea3e019-48c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d2c7e848-64c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)
&
Peter,

It's Women's History Month, and today, we want to celebrate Secretary Deb Haaland.

On this day in history, she was appointed Secretary of the Interior, becoming the first Native American cabinet secretary. Since her appointment, Secretary Haaland has worked tirelessly with Derek to deliver results for folks in our region and across the country.

**[It's changemakers like Secretary Haaland who are helping Derek fight for key investments in our region. On today's anniversary of Secretary Haaland's historic appointment, join us in thanking her for her service:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60229655/396452186/-1351949090?ms=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=yJW/aLB4h+4mqEG70PLHbtBosjPm1HIUrBY1195k3IuDQEl+RouTIpFw+F0lhbeDoVEzd5iQTR7jGl2fTEb/+rblhpaKynybHmhivdlsXbYkV+Jigo5mo/V+rK8RzCatR1bZ89YPvOX36SH5kMALT1XKJAXVLH+cqkwPK8tPygM=&refcode2=d2c7e848-64c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJjN2U4NDgtNjRjMy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s3DL1Sj9t-l5F8YU702fYwvw--N_UknrAJrcJjGIKWM=&emci=2ea3e019-48c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d2c7e848-64c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60229657/396452188/-1351949090?ms=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=yJW/aLB4h+4mqEG70PLHbtBosjPm1HIUrBY1195k3IuDQEl+RouTIpFw+F0lhbeDoVEzd5iQTR7jGl2fTEb/+rblhpaKynybHmhivdlsXbYkV+Jigo5mo/V+rK8RzCatR1bZ89YPvOX36SH5kMALT1XKJAXVLH+cqkwPK8tPygM=&refcode2=d2c7e848-64c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJjN2U4NDgtNjRjMy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s3DL1Sj9t-l5F8YU702fYwvw--N_UknrAJrcJjGIKWM=&emci=2ea3e019-48c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d2c7e848-64c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)
Secretary Haaland and Derek share a deep commitment to ensuring the federal government fulfills its unmet and long-overdue trust and treaty obligations to tribal communities. And since Secretary Haaland's appointment, Derek has re-introduced her historic legislation — the Honoring Promises to Native Nations Act — alongside Senator Elizabeth Warren.

**[Will you join us in thanking Secretary Haaland for her service to our nation and region? Add your name to her card today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60229659/396452190/-1351949090?ms=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230315_debty_ecrd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=yJW/aLB4h+4mqEG70PLHbtBosjPm1HIUrBY1195k3IuDQEl+RouTIpFw+F0lhbeDoVEzd5iQTR7jGl2fTEb/+rblhpaKynybHmhivdlsXbYkV+Jigo5mo/V+rK8RzCatR1bZ89YPvOX36SH5kMALT1XKJAXVLH+cqkwPK8tPygM=&refcode2=d2c7e848-64c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJjN2U4NDgtNjRjMy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s3DL1Sj9t-l5F8YU702fYwvw--N_UknrAJrcJjGIKWM=&emci=2ea3e019-48c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d2c7e848-64c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)**

clean_body: After making history as the first Native American to serve as a cabinet secretary, Secretary Deb Haaland has worked tirelessly to deliver results for folks in our region and across the country. & Peter, It's Women's History Month, and today, we want to celebrate Secretary Deb Haaland. On this day in history, she was appointed Secretary of the Interior, becoming the first Native American cabinet secretary. Since her appointment, Secretary Haaland has worked tirelessly with Derek to deliver results for folks in our region and across the country. Secretary Haaland and Derek share a deep commitment to ensuring the federal government fulfills its unmet and long-overdue trust and treaty obligations to tribal communities. And since Secretary Haaland's appointment, Derek has re-introduced her historic legislation — the Honoring Promises to Native Nations Act — alongside Senator Elizabeth Warren. Thank you, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

name: S. Justice Foundation
subject: AOC will force Biden into the Potomac 2-Step
body:
Joe Biden's tweet about the D.C. Crime Bill is not the nail in the coffin for D.C. Statehood.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62437374:JoKjcMGNO:m:1:3331421248:56D947D4EEF89FD4E725E6D90824D5CE:r "Headline") Peter: Here's more proof as to why we can't believe the media. Joe Biden's tweet about the D.C. Crime Bill is not the nail in the coffin for D.C. Statehood. AOC and her progressive allies are accusing Biden of betraying them, and we all know they'll just keep pressuring him until he caves. After all, he needs their support for the 2024 Election and for his upcoming spending programs. They'll demand he make good on his support for their D.C. Statehood Bill to earn their support--it's called the Potomac 2-Step. **[Please chip in $50, $100, $250, or even $500 to help us keep Americans from being duped by the Media. We can't be caught flat-footed when Biden starts pressuring the U.S. Senate to vote in favor of D.C. Statehood.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62437374:JoKjcMGNO:m:1:3331421248:56D947D4EEF89FD4E725E6D90824D5CE:r "Please chip in $50, $100, $250, or even $500 to help us keep
Americans from being duped by the Media. We can’t be caught flat-footed when Biden starts pressuring the U.S. Senate to vote in favor of D.C.
Statehood.")** D.C. Statehood is unconstitutional, but the left doesn't care. They'll threaten Biden's political career to get it done. **It would effectively make D.C. a state that votes with the far left 100% of the time.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62437374:JoKjcMGNO:m:1:3331421248:56D947D4EEF89FD4E725E6D90824D5CE:r "Tweet")The radical left knows they can't win on the issues, so they want to change the rules and institute a power grab by any means necessary.
* Abortion
* Gun Control
* Defund the police
* More Progressive Judges

These are just some of the policies they'll focus on to make America unrecognizable. **[Do not forsake our warning and let progressives and the media deceive America! Donate TODAY and help us stop the D.C. Statehood bill from passing in the U.S. Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62437374:JoKjcMGNO:m:1:3331421248:56D947D4EEF89FD4E725E6D90824D5CE:r "Do not forsake our warning and let progressives and the media
deceive America! Donate TODAY and help us stop the D.C. Statehood bill from passing in the U.S. Senate.")** With 51 Democrats in the U.S. Senate, the odds of defeating it get slim if we remain on the sidelines waiting for Biden's next move. We cannot stress how important it is that we do not give up for a moment but that requires resources. You MUST help us defeat DC Statehood. **With the fate of Biden 's political career at stake, there's no way he doesn't end up caving into the demands of the radical left and pushing hard on Senators to pass D.C. Statehood.** **[Please rush a donation of $50 or more to help us STOP DC STATEHOOD before it's too late! Your support will help us continue our efforts to educate Americans whom the media is trying to deceive.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62437375:JoKjcMGNO:m:1:3331421248:56D947D4EEF89FD4E725E6D90824D5CE:r "Please rush a donation of $50 or more to help us STOP DC
STATEHOOD before it’s too late! Your support will help us continue our efforts to educate Americans whom the media is trying to deceive.")** Thank you, James V. Lacy
President, U.S. Justice Foundation

clean_body: Friend: Don't miss Wednesday afternoon's top conservative news! | | | | | | | | | Your input is critical to us and to the future of conservatism in America. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## ## ## | ## ## ## ## ## ## | | | ## ## ## You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- ## ## ## ##

name: Polling @ FP
subject: Are voters the key to progress when Washington refuses to act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60230277/396454805/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIwZDRjYy02NmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WjN5VBv1MNKUCGEUR0xZs63UscH2BIGUoo7b_RWunVQ=&emci=2b5a7c97-56c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cfb0d4cc-66c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60230278/396454806/-1203789537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIwZDRjYy02NmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WjN5VBv1MNKUCGEUR0xZs63UscH2BIGUoo7b_RWunVQ=&emci=2b5a7c97-56c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cfb0d4cc-66c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) Team — you may have already seen the feature NPR published on us a few weeks ago, but there is one thing our Executive Director, Kelly Hall, said in the article that is sticking with us: _**“Folks who can separate these issues from their partisan identity are the folks that get us over the finish line in these conservative states.”**_ And it’s true! Putting partisan politics to the side and voting for the policies we all need is what’s helped us to pass a $15 minimum wage in Nebraska, Medicaid expansion in states like Oklahoma and Missouri, and more. At a time when political division is keeping any of our elected officials from passing policies we need, we believe in the power of voters to get things done. **We want to know if you agree, team:** **Do you think voters are the key to passing progress when Washington refuses to act? ** [YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60230279/396454807/-1203789537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIwZDRjYy02NmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WjN5VBv1MNKUCGEUR0xZs63UscH2BIGUoo7b_RWunVQ=&emci=2b5a7c97-56c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cfb0d4cc-66c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) [NO →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60230280/396454808/-1203789537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIwZDRjYy02NmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WjN5VBv1MNKUCGEUR0xZs63UscH2BIGUoo7b_RWunVQ=&emci=2b5a7c97-56c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cfb0d4cc-66c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) We’ve run 33 voter-driven ballot measure campaigns, and with 31 victories under our belt, we’re pretty sure that we’ve cracked the code! **But we want to know what you think, team: Do you think voters are the key to passing progress when Washington refuses to act? ** [YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60230281/396454809/-1203789537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIwZDRjYy02NmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WjN5VBv1MNKUCGEUR0xZs63UscH2BIGUoo7b_RWunVQ=&emci=2b5a7c97-56c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cfb0d4cc-66c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) [NO ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60230282/396454810/-1203789537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIwZDRjYy02NmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WjN5VBv1MNKUCGEUR0xZs63UscH2BIGUoo7b_RWunVQ=&emci=2b5a7c97-56c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cfb0d4cc-66c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) Thanks for your feedback,

clean_body: | | Team — you may have already seen the feature NPR published on us a few weeks ago, but there is one thing our Executive Director, Kelly Hall, said in the article that is sticking with us: “Folks who can separate these issues from their partisan identity are the folks that get us over the finish line in these conservative states.” And it’s true! Putting partisan politics to the side and voting for the policies we all need is what’s helped us to pass a $15 minimum wage in Nebraska, Medicaid expansion in states like Oklahoma and Missouri, and more. At a time when political division is keeping any of our elected officials from passing policies we need, we believe in the power of voters to get things done. We want to know if you agree, team: Do you think voters are the key to passing progress when Washington refuses to act? We’ve run 33 voter-driven ballot measure campaigns, and with 31 victories under our belt, we’re pretty sure that we’ve cracked the code! But we want to know what you think, team: Do you think voters are the key to passing progress when Washington refuses to act? name: Team Tina
subject: A few highlights from Tina’s first 60 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, In recognition of Tina’s first two months in office, we wanted to share a list of 60 highlights from her first 60 days in office. Here’s a sample of some of our favorites:
* Declared a homelessness state of emergency on day one in office
* Introduced her first bills as Governor
* Moved to Salem with First Lady Aimee Kotek Wilson and their dogs Teddy and Rudy
* Released her recommended budget, with a mission-focused approach to building more housing and reducing homelessness, improving access to mental health and addiction services, and improving outcomes in early literacy and K-12 schools
* Held her first cabinet meeting
* Traveled to Washington, D.C. and met one-on-one with U.S. Housing and Urban Development Secretary Marcia Fudge, U.S. Health and Human Services Secretary Xavier Becerra, and U.S. Education Secretary Miguel Cardona
* Met with members of the legislature, mayors, and other governors to find new ways to work together
* Uplifted small businesses, local organizations, and community events
* .... and so much more!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60230362/396455163/-1166796411?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmUzMTQ3ZS02N2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FYEDQrLfpm7uBnnUeVMmI7FGtsw9XW8o-HgkoS6Qaxs=) Tina hit the ground running on day one to tackle the homelessness crisis, improve mental health and addiction services, and uplift educational outcomes throughout Oregon. In her first 60 days, Tina has laid the groundwork to do all this and more throughout her term. We know that we can do more when we work together. Tina has plans for all the days of her term yet to come, but she’ll be more successful with you by her side. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They used her like a lab rat
body:
Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar __industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88787786580f480098be6a0b403f8e7f&_e=xBQNhjjCqaRCZ3EiuUSdcv78a-it-m0te9j23oBc2NNBazGLwOS1FjP21g3ZzCp8AuoiqkgX-25Kn6CGgM5-vxKADe8VeOUqMGEhhizgWT_FAAxAbJUrIv4fWKFZ9a9A62olrj8ZSAtCS8otNx71deet8dRA_exn9AIq6_-zPFTAY1Uz9boPTXuhaBBZAXaMhTYpF0cdqGLVIrhX2ljFFcyhbJfsYMrxOm008Ytjwzgb8zgOYnP-E7J0tkrYQnRWi_gttpC6KQmSZ2SuEa36y2qyvHBWX9EyYRSeNoOCi1fbq5gRMJ2KPSnekksVrxQl-Xx_wBGafvMD2PSO5HQcuf6DlMIzRX8A-fIclIybM7mU4oLHduPikJJ3LY0iZRFrwbsbHFurIc7fEaGgHzpmpg%3D%3D)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care."** Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit.** **And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. ** [**I 'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation of $35 to the case's legal fund.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88787786580f480098be6a0b403f8e7f&_e=xBQNhjjCqaRCZ3EiuUSdcv78a-it-m0te9j23oBc2NNBazGLwOS1FjP21g3ZzCp8AuoiqkgX-25Kn6CGgM5-vxKADe8VeOUqMGEhhizgWT_FAAxAbJUrIv4fWKFZ9a9A62olrj8ZSAtCS8otNx71deet8dRA_exn9AIq6_-zPFTAY1Uz9boPTXuhaBBZAXaMhTYpF0cdqGLVIrhX2ljFFcyhbJfsYMrxOm008Ytjwzgb8zgOYnP-E7J0tkrYQnRW3mPdKIjg0p9Xb0ohxRFgmtfRYrLazf774AqFjXYZ0tPrXw1B-_Il-eGr8RI2FUbtrPzZJHitGy2dNN8Ddo1hc4bgs0zzK3Ec6xSvisHsbPXRkdr69vA-fCgAQaais2XkbEp6gow2u6WMAj4pfXd5WQ%3D%3D) Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. clean_body: Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. | | | | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy. | | | She was given weekly testosterone injections. She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders. And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy. | | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care." Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit. And this is happening to children across America. My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... ... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down.** Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat. | | Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country. | | Thank you and God Bless, | | Harmeet K. The GOP knows this, and that’s why they’re already launching attacks. Marcy Kaptur is fighting for you. From voting to pass the Inflation Reduction Act to the American Rescue Plan to the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, Marcy is getting it done for Ohioans. But with EVERYTHING on the line, we can’t afford to come up short in this election. We know it’s early, but early investments in races like ours make a significant difference in the outcome. If we can build up our campaign today, we can take on any attacks, opponents, and dark money that the GOP will throw at us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Kaptur | | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. name: Dan Goldman
subject: My different fundraising approach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Hi Peter — I wrote to you shortly after I was sworn in to describe a new kind of digital fundraising program that we implemented, and I hope you have enjoyed the less frequent, more substantive emails you’ve been receiving. But digital fundraising is still very important — not just to raise money — but to show Republicans that there is a groundswell of support for the work we are doing in Washington to protect and preserve our democracy and enact the progressive policies we so desperately need. As you probably know if your inbox looks anything like mine, the FEC end-of-quarter deadline is just two weeks away. **This is the most important fundraising deadline of my short time in Congress because we need to show the country that Americans care about our democratic foundations and the rule of law.** **Before I explain why this deadline is so important, I would be grateful if you could immediately show your support of my work by chipping in a little right now. You can use this personal link:[secure.actblue.com/donate/dpwillis67@gmail.com_EOM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60231116/396456945/160930933?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJlMjQ3OC02OGMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sEWpMbP2s-O9_-zb97ZG1tOe_4z_yYfsaN288HZxbtM=)** At the end of each quarter, the Federal Elections Commission requires campaigns like ours to disclose how much we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received. These quarterly reports are designed to bring transparency to our elections and ensure that campaigns aren’t running afoul of the law. For example, it was only after I personally examined these reports belonging to George Santos that I realized the depths of his deception to trick his voters into voting for him. So they are essential for transparency and accountability. At the same time, these reports show how much grassroots strength campaigns have behind them. And as soon as these reports get released, Republicans pore through them to determine which seats they should target, craft new lines of attack, and shift their strategy on the campaign trail. So your support of the work we are doing sends a message to Republicans around the country about what matters to the people. Peter, now that our work defending our democracy and holding the GOP accountable is scaling up, Fox News has begun launching attacks at me and my family — and many more are sure to follow. **[Finishing the quarter with a strong report will show MAGA Republicans that I have a strong, grassroots movement behind me that can help me fight back against their lies and lawlessness. So, will you help us get a head start on hitting our end-of-quarter goal by pitching in a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60231117/396456946/160930933?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJlMjQ3OC02OGMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sEWpMbP2s-O9_-zb97ZG1tOe_4z_yYfsaN288HZxbtM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60231118/396456947/160930933?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJlMjQ3OC02OGMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sEWpMbP2s-O9_-zb97ZG1tOe_4z_yYfsaN288HZxbtM=)

clean_body: | Hi Peter — I wrote to you shortly after I was sworn in to describe a new kind of digital fundraising program that we implemented, and I hope you have enjoyed the less frequent, more substantive emails you’ve been receiving. But digital fundraising is still very important — not just to raise money — but to show Republicans that there is a groundswell of support for the work we are doing in Washington to protect and preserve our democracy and enact the progressive policies we so desperately need. As you probably know if your inbox looks anything like mine, the FEC end-of-quarter deadline is just two weeks away. This is the most important fundraising deadline of my short time in Congress because we need to show the country that Americans care about our democratic foundations and the rule of law. Before I explain why this deadline is so important, I would be grateful if you could immediately show your support of my work by chipping in a little right now. You can use this personal link:= At the end of each quarter, the Federal Elections Commission requires campaigns like ours to disclose how much we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received. These quarterly reports are designed to bring transparency to our elections and ensure that campaigns aren’t running afoul of the law. For example, it was only after I personally examined these reports belonging to George Santos that I realized the depths of his deception to trick his voters into voting for him. So they are essential for transparency and accountability. At the same time, these reports show how much grassroots strength campaigns have behind them. And as soon as these reports get released, Republicans pore through them to determine which seats they should target, craft new lines of attack, and shift their strategy on the campaign trail. So your support of the work we are doing sends a message to Republicans around the country about what matters to the people. Peter, now that our work defending our democracy and holding the GOP accountable is scaling up, Fox News has begun launching attacks at me and my family — and many more are sure to follow. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your continued support. In this together, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

| The ATF has law-abiding gun owners in their crosshairs...
The IRS is forming its own private arsenal to go after working-class citizens...
The CDC wanted the power of the CIA yet ended up with the credibility of CNN...
And the DOJ? Well - just look at what they did to President Trump with the Russia Hoax, the armed raid of his personal home, and more...
They are CORRUPT and COMPROMISED, Peter!
And that's why I know that the time for waiting to reign in this Deep State is OVER.
We either get these Swamp agencies back on our side right now... or we SHUT THEM DOWN NOW!!!
YOUR GOVERNMENT IS BEING WEAPONIZED AGAINST YOU.

| Peter, I don't believe it's too much to ask that we get the American government back on the side of the American people.
See, I'm not in the Swamp to be a human husk for some lobbyist... I am ready to fundamentally change this town if that's what it takes to finally bring a corrupt Deep State to heel.
And here's the thing - I don't care if they count us out in this fight. I don't care if they say MAGA is outnumbered.
I saw how it took only 20 of us brave representatives - supported by the grassroots base of patriots like you - to completely shake up the status quo in Washington just a short time ago during the Speaker vote.
We can do so again in a heartbeat if that's what it takes. We can even SHUT DOWN and DEFUND these bureaucracies altogether if they continue to weaponize against us!
All that we need to do is stand united... Because the truth is that the Swamp doesn't stand a chance against the strongest political force in the history of our country:
THE GRASSROOTS AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT!!!

name: Katie Porter
subject: Loud voices and democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
When my congressional office hosts town halls, nearly everyone there has a question.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19415%2E3422442%2EIXrYbb)
Derek,
When my congressional office hosts town halls, nearly everyone there has a question. **And as a former teacher, I know that if you only call on the loudest, highest hands—you will only be hearing the voices of a select few.** Oftentimes those voices skew privileged and powerful.
To make sure everyone’s voices are heard during congressional town halls, my office uses a bingo wheel to call on people at random–we literally democratized the process!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230315-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF15_1_BIN_20230315_V1_F&refcode2=19415_3422442_IXrYbb&akid=19415%2E3422442%2EIXrYbb)
Too often elected officials only hear from the people with the highest, loudest hands–-lobbyists or those with wealth and power and connections. _That’s not how our campaign will operate._
I want to hear from everyone. That means reaching people in every part of California, from our cities to rural areas, talking with people of all backgrounds and races and ages. While I know I can’t personally talk to every single voter, that doesn’t mean I won’t try. Whether it’s a mom from the opposing water polo team, the cashier at Albertsons, or the person in the seat next to me as I fly back and forth from DC to LAX.
Campaigning is one of my favorite things. Knocking doors and talking directly with voters is a part of how I won three competitive races in Orange County. **[Now, your contributions are laying the groundwork for what will be a robust campaign to reach and hear from all Californians. Consider chipping in today to power our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230315-1?refcode=em20230315-1&refcode2=19415_3422442_IXrYbb&akid=19415%2E3422442%2EIXrYbb)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230315-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF15_1_BIN_20230315_V1_F&refcode2=19415_3422442_IXrYbb&akid=19415%2E3422442%2EIXrYbb)**
Thanks for being a part of Team Porter!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF15_1_BIN_20230315_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19415_3422442_IXrYbb&akid=19415%2E3422442%2EIXrYbb)**

clean_body: When my congressional office hosts town halls, nearly everyone there has a question. Derek, When my congressional office hosts town halls, nearly everyone there has a question. And as a former teacher, I know that if you only call on the loudest, highest hands—you will only be hearing the voices of a select few. Oftentimes those voices skew privileged and powerful. To make sure everyone’s voices are heard during congressional town halls, my office uses a bingo wheel to call on people at random–we literally democratized the process! Too often elected officials only hear from the people with the highest, loudest hands–-lobbyists or those with wealth and power and connections. That’s not how our campaign will operate. I want to hear from everyone. That means reaching people in every part of California, from our cities to rural areas, talking with people of all backgrounds and races and ages. While I know I can’t personally talk to every single voter, that doesn’t mean I won’t try. Whether it’s a mom from the opposing water polo team, the cashier at Albertsons, or the person in the seat next to me as I fly back and forth from DC to LAX. Campaigning is one of my favorite things. Knocking doors and talking directly with voters is a part of how I won three competitive races in Orange County. Thanks for being a part of Team Porter! Katie Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Erin Van Natta
subject: Meet Matt Gaetz and Raheem Kassam /w Joe Kent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Friend,
We are excited to share with you two major events for Joe Kent next week.

**Congressman Matt Gaetz is hosting a reception for Joe Kent in Downtown DC** on Thursday, March 23rd from 6-8:30 PM Eastern, and event chairs, co-chairs, and host committee members are also invited to an exclusive lunch at the Army Navy Club earlier that day. Space is limited so please lock in your tickets today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Gaetz](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/t3BAA0vvqmD8y0jZu2q763Ag/tmO3bE9uDu7nipUtoPrhwg).
**Raheem Kassam is hosting a reception for Joe Kent in Chehalis, Washington State** on March 25th from 5-7 PM Pacific with a limited private reception starting at 4 PM. Get your tickets at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Raheem](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/V9UjRfgqQVpmAyCaqPf5Bg/tmO3bE9uDu7nipUtoPrhwg).
I've also attached social media graphics for these two events that we encourage you to post.
We're right now getting close to the end of the quarter so if you can't attend these events but want to help, please make a direct contribution at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/9z763sDQdGqOoUSHYOiX6rcg/tmO3bE9uDu7nipUtoPrhwg).
Please email me if you have any questions.
Thank you,
Erin

Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

body:
I'm so proud of my son.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60231444/396458079/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmEwNTk5Mi02YWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=23Mo__WzuK1eHhmy2VNGTGwvQqVsroXmF4PdXlpSnjg=)

Peter,

My name is Willie Takano – Mark’s dad. I’m so proud of my son and everything he’s accomplished – but I know he didn’t do it alone. It’s because of each of you, his supporters, that have helped him get elected to Congress where he has been able to do so much good work.

**But that work is at risk.** That’s because he’s behind on his fundraising goals and Republicans are eager to overtake his seat.

Look, I’ve seen America’s dark side before. When I was young, my family was forced into a Japanese American internment camp. Those were hard days. But since then, we’ve come a long way.

Now, I worry about that dark side emerging again. Extremist Republicans have spread hateful rhetoric and anti-Asian sentiment has reared its head once more.

**But seeing my son fighting for progress and justice as a lawmaker gives me hope. I know that good Democrats like you and Mark can make a difference.**

[**Peter, Mark has a huge fundraising deadline tonight and he still needs to raise $2,000. clean_body: I'm so proud of my son. | = Peter, My name is Willie Takano – Mark’s dad. I’m so proud of my son and everything he’s accomplished – but I know he didn’t do it alone. It’s because of each of you, his supporters, that have helped him get elected to Congress where he has been able to do so much good work. But that work is at risk. That’s because he’s behind on his fundraising goals and Republicans are eager to overtake his seat. Look, I’ve seen America’s dark side before. When I was young, my family was forced into a Japanese American internment camp. Those were hard days. But since then, we’ve come a long way. Now, I worry about that dark side emerging again. Extremist Republicans have spread hateful rhetoric and anti-Asian sentiment has reared its head once more. But seeing my son fighting for progress and justice as a lawmaker gives me hope. I know that good Democrats like you and Mark can make a difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for your support. It means so much. Sincerely, Willie Takano Mark’s dad | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Big enemies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230315-4008-header&t=1&akid=4008%2E2526796%2EolC-CO)
Alexandria and our team of volunteers and staff are hard at work building a powerful progressive movement to ensure we change the status quo in Washington. But we have some powerful enemies.
**We’re up against dark money and the political establishment machine.** The entire GOP wants AOC out of Congress. So does Wall Street. That’s why AOC has corporate Democrats, Trump Republicans, and dark money groups that bankroll conservative campaigns aligned to beat her.
[And, that’s why our team is setting a 5,780 end-of-quarter contributions goal – so we can out-raise what Trump donors and Wall Street executives are giving to our right-wing colleagues. Can you help with a $3 donation?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230315.LJV79Z&refcode=em20230315-4008-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4008%2E2526796%2EolC-CO)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230315.LJV79Z&refcode=em20230315-4008-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4008%2E2526796%2EolC-CO)**
**Congress needs AOC’s political courage more than ever.** Student debt cancellation, a stop to new fossil fuel projects, a Green New Deal, Medicare for All... AOC is fighting for these policies for _all of us._
**This kind of change is possible, even if it’s not guaranteed.** But we have to work for it, so our digital team is dedicating the next 16 days of our lives to meeting our goal.
**No amount is too small.** Right now, the most important thing is to be in this together. Every donation gets us closer to winning and sends a message that you’re not backing down from our fight for the working-class of this country.
[Let’s show that we will support AOC and win not just for a candidate or campaign – but for a movement built by everyday, working people chipping in $5, $15, or $25 at a time. Please contribute here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230315.LJV79Z&refcode=em20230315-4008-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4008%2E2526796%2EolC-CO)
We have just 16 days to meet this critical fundraising goal. Let’s give our movement and our priorities all of the urgency they demand.
Thank you for everything so far,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230315?refcode=em20230315-4008-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=23&refcode2=4008_2526796_olC-CO&akid=4008%2E2526796%2EolC-CO)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230315-4008-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=24&akid=4008%2E2526796%2EolC-CO)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Thank you for everything so far, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Another bank bailout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
The level of grace and understanding given to depositors at SVB and Signature Bank should also be extended to those with student debt.
#
Did you see Cori’s latest tweets regarding Silicon Valley Bank, Peter?
| **Cori Bush** @CoriBush
---|---
| | | Are we supposed to ignore the fact that the people advocating for the bailout of banks are the same people who want to see student debt cancelation to fail?

It’s never been more clear that opposing student debt cancelation is rooted in racism, sexism, and classism.
---
| **Cori Bush** @CoriBush
---|---
| | | The level of grace and understanding given to depositors at SVB and Signature Bank should also be extended to those with student debt.
---
**Cori is a leader in student debt cancelation and advocating for working people — _not big banks and Silicon Valley millionaires and billionaires._ [If you agree, can you chip in a donation of $5 today to keep her voice on the frontlines of our movement?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230315.1KksiO&amount=5&refcode=em20230315-2336&t=1&akid=2336%2E1082990%2EUk_m1W)**

body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=51%2E35263%2Ey0zq0J ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Did you see this, Peter?

“Former Sheriff David Clarke floats a challenge
to Tammy Baldwin for Senate in 2024”
— Milwaukee Journal Sentinel

That’s right, the former right-wing Milwaukee Sheriff who’s so extreme,
even Fox News banned him, is considering running to try to flip Tammy’s
Senate seat.

His outrageous record speaks for itself... Just take a look:

* Defended January 6th rioters and urged them not to cooperate with
authorities.
* Supported Steve Bannon’s “build the wall” scam.
* Tweeted that he was proud of Trump after he praised white supremacists
in Charlottesville.

We need to make sure this GOP extremist doesn’t get anywhere near the
Senate. But the only way to stop dangerous right-wing candidates like
Clarke from winning in Wisconsin is to build the resources our campaign
will need to fight back. That’s why we’re asking:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1766?t=1004&akid=51%2E35263%2Ey0zq0J ]Will you pitch in a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to help
us keep this seat out of the hands of GOP extremists like David Clarke?
Anything you can pitch in before our mid-month deadline tonight would make
a huge difference.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

His outrageous record speaks for itself... Just take a look: Defended January 6th rioters and urged them not to cooperate with authorities. Supported Steve Bannon’s “build the wall” scam. * Tweeted that he was proud of Trump after he praised white supremacists in Charlottesville. We need to make sure this GOP extremist doesn’t get anywhere near the Senate. But the only way to stop dangerous right-wing candidates like Clarke from winning in Wisconsin is to build the resources our campaign will need to fight back. body:

| Friend,
---
| Anyone running for the office of President of the United States should agree to take a full and complete mental competency test.
---
| _Leading the greatest country in history requires great mental acuity and physical stamina and strength._
---
| 350 million Americans are relying on ONE PERSON to make our country prosperous, safe, and free. That’s a big job! And Americans have a right to know if our leader can handle it.
---
| _**[Please sign my petition to join me in calling for 2024 presidential candidates to take a mental competency test to PROVE they’re capable of leading for the most important job in America.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMFuwyAQRL_GvtnCCzZw8KGplVRK00MvrXqJMGwSUoNdGzfK3xdHSSUE4u3swA7WRcWFLIAISE0NWoDWqa2BACW0KONZEZ6TggIoxSgaKbhQCSMX63PTe9WZcxhnN-S6d-mpZqQoBJYcSalkeziURFVMGiMBNbRSp119CmGYEvqUwDquCfU8Yh7tRjSLycLUL2bK4Wi1ys699SE7zN6Myk7WH7MocjYExCj1uqOaMc7bijEFnEu5-NL1HNzeobGzS2iDTtkugWqBUz-PGiPUdq_uTCs3KHv0kT4mf1R6H9CHWBBUiAj3vrMmXumGq-O7EJLe4MmaOFPz9bPZvQj2bdKxNsPFdp2dKh7jOi4_uGUUn-rs4VonfJUA3PoAbnHAlq0-36rtx7bJ2td2lzVVyS5LFZ7jHq4D_kvvLvl9Mkh48wdV0oyB "Please watch my THANK YOU VIDEO and – if you can – make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,400% impact.")**_

| I took the test two years ago – and I aced it.
---
| In fact, I’d love to take it again because I think I’d do even better now.
---
| Our country is facing some of the biggest problems in history.
---
| We’re on the brink of World War III, our economy is crumbling, our southern border doesn’t even exist anymore, crime is out of control, and our citizens are losing hope for the future.
---
| **_America cannot afford a president who lacks the mental stamina and strength to lead._**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Governor=20Chris=20Christie?=
subject: ICYMI: You're Invited to a Conference on Criminal Justice and Bail Reform
body:
Law enforcement is a top issue on the minds of all New Jerseyans, in fact, of all Americans. | | |
---
|
---
| | | **Friend,**

I wanted to make sure you saw my last email about our upcoming Christie Institute for Public Policy panel discussion next **Tuesday, March 21, at 7:00pm.** We have a great panel of experts lined up for the discussion and complimentary tickets are still available.

---
|
---
| [Reserve Free Tickets](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=22d28e5482&e=65ae29fa7e "Reserve Free Tickets")
---
|
We hope you can join us,
---
|
---
| Chris Christie
---
|
---
| Original Message: **From:** Governor Christie
**Subject:** You're Invited to a Conference on Criminal Justice and Bail Reform

---
| The Christie Institute for Public Policy cordially invites you to a conference on:
## Criminal Justice and Bail Reform - A New Jersey Case Study
---
|
---
| Law enforcement is a top issue on the minds of all New Jerseyans, in fact, of all Americans. There are current ongoing discussions about how bail reform has failed in New York and succeeded in New Jersey. While nothing is ever perfect, we thought it would be an appropriate time to review and critique our bail reform program after five years in existence.

We would be grateful for your input by attending our upcoming Christie Institute for Public Policy panel discussion at **Seton Hall Law School** in Newark on **Tuesday, March 21, at 7:00 p.m.** , preceded by a reception beginning at 6:00 p.m., also at the law school. We will have a substantial period for questions, answers, and audience commentary after our panel presentation. We have a great panel of experts who will take us through the last five years, from original ideas for reform through its implementation in our state.

Kindly register for the event at [www.christieinstitute.com](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=c19e7ca7a7&e=65ae29fa7e). Tickets for the event for all our guests are complimentary. If you have any questions, please reach out to the Institute’s Executive Director Michele Brown at [mbrown@christieinstitute.com](mailto:mbrown@christieinstitute.com).

We hope you can join us.
---
|
---
| Chris Christie
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=382d117d81&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
| | [](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=d1caa55f50&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Christie 55 Solutions, All rights reserved._
We send emails to individuals who had previously expressed interest in receiving our content.

**Our mailing address is:**
Christie 55 Solutions15 Maple AveMorristown, NJ 07960-9440
[Add us to your address book](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=a88f03c1eb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=a88f03c1eb&e=65ae29fa7e&c=3096701a82) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=a88f03c1eb&e=65ae29fa7e&c=3096701a82).

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Senator Rick Scott, who threatened to gut Social Security & Medicare, is trying to destroy our banking system. Scott's greed helped lead to the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) crash, as he fought to deregulate everything. Can you help get him out of office?
body:
A very expensive Senator
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb14185d-580c-43a1-ab34-95a475d2694c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Senator Rick Scott, who threatened to gut Social Security & Medicare, is trying to destroy our banking system. _Scott's greed helped lead to the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) crash, as he fought to deregulate everything._** **[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to protect our banking system by getting Scott out of the Senate?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e7446a3-a152-41a1-9c57-c693a3e77b55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** __As Florida Governor and U.S. Senator, Scott reveled in deregulation of damn near everything. He was even thoroughly rebuked for it by FL's Supreme Court, as reported in FlaglerLive:__
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13200471-a570-4136-b713-faccaab89978/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _This is who Rick Scott is_ _a hospital CEO_ _ who oversaw the largest case of Medicare fraud in U.S history, leading to a record $1.7 billion fine. Which he hid by taking_ the 5th Amendment a ridiculous 75 times during his civil trial, which allowed him to keep much of his ill-begotten wealth. **_Makes sense he's for deregulating banks, oil companies, railroads & more--it allows corporate CEOs to do what he did, while the rest of us pay for it. It also explains his plan for Social Security & Medicare "sunsets."_** **_Rick Scott's never won a race by more than 1.2%, even with all his wealth. He is very beatable. _[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to protect our banking system by getting Scott out of the Senate?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95b97411-ea5c-4b68-8d33-07e679d7a19a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _Thank you for taking this blight on Congress and our democracy out of office._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Silicon Valley Bank executives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek —

Last week, a very important California bank went bust, threatening the
paychecks of thousands of California workers who were not even aware that
their payroll was being handled by the bank. The failed financial
institution was a vital part of the entrepreneurial ecosystem in the tech
sector, helping to fund a host of start-ups that fueled the state’s robust
economy. That bank was, of course, the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB), and its
collapse sent shockwaves through the financial system.

Those shockwaves continue to rattle markets across the country and also
helped bring down yet another institution, Signature Bank.

How we got here is the result of Congressional malfeasance, poor
regulatory oversight, and terrible bank practices.

First Congress. After the last financial meltdown, Congress passed
regulatory reform which strengthened oversight of banks that were “too
large to fail,” and which included capital requirements, stress testing of
institutions, and other reforms to ensure the government would never again
have to bail out large financial institutions.

A decade later, during the Trump Administration, Congress loosened
regulation of some of these banks, especially banks like SVB. I opposed
this partial repeal of Dodd-Frank protections, but it passed nonetheless,
with overwhelming Republican support, and with the support of a sizable
number of Democrats as well.

As a result, when SVB executives decided to maximize their short-term
profits by investing in a lot of long-term, fixed-rate instruments,
regulators were not on top of the risks this posed at a time of rapid
interest rate hikes. Regulators also paid insufficient attention to the
fact that a huge percentage of depositors had amounts over $250k in their
accounts and therefore were not fully insured against a run on the bank.

This combination of poor oversight and greedy management of the bank
proved catastrophic.

Over the last few days I have been in meetings with FDIC and Treasury
officials, along with many of my colleagues in the California delegation —
first trying to understand how to protect innocent workers, and then
brainstorming on how to protect our economy in the future from other such
failures.

Over the weekend, I started drafting a bill to respond, in particular to
bank executives who traded stock and received bonuses in the run-up to the
bank’s failure. And just hours ago, Senator Richard Blumenthal and I
introduced a big new bill to claw back all profits from stock sales made
by bank executives in the weeks before a bank collapse and to take back
any bonuses they received. We must eliminate the incentive for bank
executives to put their own compensation ahead of the interests of their
depositors and the country. Clawing back their ill-gotten gains is the
best way to do so.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230315-svb-deposit-act.IE4nuz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]Can you sign on today as a citizen co-sponsor of the Deliver Executive
Profits on Seized Institutions to Taxpayers (DEPOSIT) Act?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230315-svb-deposit-act.IE4nuz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]ADD YOUR NAME

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230315-svb-deposit-act.IE4nuz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ][IMG]

In the lead-up to the bank’s failure, its CEO Greg Becker sold a reported
$3.6 million in SVB stock, profiting off the demise of the very bank he
managed. Another executive sold $575,000 worth of stock the same day. My
bill would return this money to the FDIC insurance fund to pay back
depositors and ensure paychecks are delivered.

Second, we need to repeal S. 2155, legislation pushed by Big Banks to
lessen regulations put in place by Dodd-Frank. I voted against S. 2155
back in 2018, which raised the asset limit at which a bank was subject to
regular stress testing up to $250 billion. That in turn exempted a lot of
medium-sized and regional banks. This needs to be repealed.

Third, the Securities and Exchange Commission and potentially the
Department of Justice need to investigate all of this mess. The timing of
the stock sales and bonus payments to executives are suspect — at best.

Finally, we need to consider other systemic reforms to ensure that this
doesn’t happen again and that workers whose companies rely on banks for
their paychecks or their retirement planning aren’t put in the crosshairs
by bad bank decisions.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230315-svb-deposit-act.IE4nuz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]I’ll have more to share soon, but in the meantime, I hope you’ll
consider adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor to my bill — the DEPOSIT
Act — to take back bank executives’ stock sales and bonuses in the wake of
these collapses.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230315-svb-deposit-act.IE4nuz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]ADD YOUR NAME

Thanks for reading this email, and for helping to protect consumers and
the economy from another such trauma to our system.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1951%2E5257348%2EHSuRcQ

name: Lashrecse Aird for Senate
subject: Lashrecse Aird’s Statement on Tragic Death of Irvo Otieno
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/AIRD-%20Senate%20LogoArtboard%201-web.png]
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Wednesday, March 15, 2023
Contact: Alex Centeno [alex@lashrecseaird.com]
aird@lashrecseaird.com
804-452-7076
Lashrecse Aird’s Statement on Tragic Death of Irvo Otieno
PETERSBURG, VA — Today, Lashrecse Aird, Democratic candidate for Virginia Senate District 13, released the following statement regarding the death of Irvo Otieno:
“My deepest condolences are extended to Ms. Caroline Ouko, mother of Irvo Otieno, and his entire family. Ms. Ouko did everything right in swiftly trying to get her son the mental health care he needed during his time of crisis, and this heartbreaking incident shows that our systems of care failed him. No loss of life is easy to accept, but the alleged circumstances are deeply concerning and deserving of answers. I join the Otieno family in demanding more information be brought forward and all those involved in this tragic crime be held accountable. “
First elected to the Virginia House of Delegates in 2016, Lashrecse Aird previously represented the 63rd District. For more information about Lashrecse please visit: www.lashrecseaird.com [http://www.lashrecseaird.com]
###

body:
Together we can make the next 525,600 minutes even more impactful than the last.

| Rosario Dawson here! I'm thrilled to join Jane Fonda and the thousands of supporters like you in celebrating the one year anniversary of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. [_**Will you contribute $10 to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC today and join the fight against climate change?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60234553/396470732/-103786068?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230315-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNzAyYTgxLTczYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZECatfLHyWOJF9Wvq37UN0De4bA9h3XbPioByK3Gk_U=)
