---
My good friend Jane Fonda has been a fierce advocate for our planet for decades. Jane started her climate PAC last year with one core mission: to elect climate champions and end the reign of the fossil fuel industry.

I’m sure by now you have heard thousands of answers to the age old question, "how do you measure a year?" (I know I have!).

Of course, you could measure it in daylights, sunsets, midnights, and even cups of coffee. But because of your support, the Jane PAC team can add to the list. Since the launch of the PAC one year ago:
* They supported 70 candidates throughout the 2022 campaign cycle.

* They endorsed candidates at every level of government.

* 42 of those candidates are now elected officials, ready to get to work to tackle the climate crisis.

[_**Will you contribute $10 to support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC today and lay the groundwork for more climate victories?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60234556/396470735/-103786068?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230315-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNzAyYTgxLTczYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZECatfLHyWOJF9Wvq37UN0De4bA9h3XbPioByK3Gk_U=)

clean_body: Together we can make the next 525,600 minutes even more impactful than the last. | Rosario Dawson here! I'm thrilled to join Jane Fonda and the thousands of supporters like you in celebrating the one year anniversary of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. = | = | = My good friend Jane Fonda has been a fierce advocate for our planet for decades. Jane started her climate PAC last year with one core mission: to elect climate champions and end the reign of the fossil fuel industry. I’m sure by now you have heard thousands of answers to the age old question, "how do you measure a year?" (I know I have!). Of course, you could measure it in daylights, sunsets, midnights, and even cups of coffee. But because of your support, the Jane PAC team can add to the list. Since the launch of the PAC one year ago: They supported 70 candidates throughout the 2022 campaign cycle. They endorsed candidates at every level of government. 42 of those candidates are now elected officials, ready to get to work to tackle the climate crisis. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks to your generous support, these elected officials now have the opportunity to protect our planet and secure a sustainable future for generations to come. But we still have a long way to go, and we need your help to continue making progress. As we gear up to announce endorsements in key down ballot races this year, we hope you’ll join us. Together we can make the next 525,600 minutes even more impactful than the last. name: Team Brown
subject: AG Yost ignores the facts on healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Women should be allowed to purchase FDA-approved medications at their local pharmacy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60235023/396472605/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_230315YostPET_RR_TB_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMwYzA4MC03NGMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=apIKI14cAJfsy6Gs-G71N8QKUN6VXnRlhQIoRVHiRSA=) Peter – There’s no limit to the depravity of the GOP.

As if things aren’t bad enough in Ohio under one of the most restrictive abortion bans in the nation, the GOP is going even further.

Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost has led a charge of Republican Attorneys General threatening pharmacies who are preparing to carry medicated abortion pills according to new FDA guidelines. Yost and his cronies have pressured Walgreens, one of the nation’s largest pharmacies, into withholding medicated abortion pills in certain states.

Peter, the GOP’s radical anti-abortion policies are a threat to public health. Medicated abortion is a safe and widely used method for terminating a pregnancy during the first trimester. In Ohio last year, more than half of all abortions provided used medication. _**Allowing retail pharmacies to dispense the drug in stores and through the mail under new FDA guidelines expands healthcare choices to millions of Americans.**_ Now, Yost and the GOP want to strip women of this critical healthcare tool, and leave them with little to no access to safe abortion care.

[**_We can’t remain silent. Will you sign our petition demanding Congress protect abortion rights on a federal level to keep Attorney General Yost and the GOP off our healthcare? We cannot allow the GOP to continue their assault on women's healthcare. clean_body: Women should be allowed to purchase FDA-approved medications at their local pharmacy. = Peter – There’s no limit to the depravity of the GOP. As if things aren’t bad enough in Ohio under one of the most restrictive abortion bans in the nation, the GOP is going even further. Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost has led a charge of Republican Attorneys General threatening pharmacies who are preparing to carry medicated abortion pills according to new FDA guidelines. Yost and his cronies have pressured Walgreens, one of the nation’s largest pharmacies, into withholding medicated abortion pills in certain states. Peter, the GOP’s radical anti-abortion policies are a threat to public health. Medicated abortion is a safe and widely used method for terminating a pregnancy during the first trimester. In Ohio last year, more than half of all abortions provided used medication. Allowing retail pharmacies to dispense the drug in stores and through the mail under new FDA guidelines expands healthcare choices to millions of Americans. Now, Yost and the GOP want to strip women of this critical healthcare tool, and leave them with little to no access to safe abortion care. We know we can count on you, Team Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. subject: Critical is an understatement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
The future success of this campaign and our movement is riding on us being able to show that we have momentum and broad support from Americans who are fed up with the woke takeover of our country.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=70540003f3a5460083bd841dbad58100&_e=1EnsS4atwr211dHcefbqoWQEdzUjm6ML7WDB-7Em37RiMcCtruLHbrYWxNOjqma9QEHfg4hiuU5q-n9gbL7eLoOHTYAYJL-krw_m24jj-V7KdoC_Z6x47xflzXEErTeQgU98WlkR12AMNgBHcPHids-abYyS6jMxtQZ4uKjSfj25u3jd2bmCQg7WjZy6PqxGCDnDQRbTPCD0Dcz7KJb7Q9Nd13XOUBjUbCLjol1CsT898PHQe4rsl5ROMXw81oE6kvwwn3NhPmsJxYajYr1EYbYifH6Lrv0EWytlrpskyjYZtabxpu4avpHAfhK_hBaWNOgWOxW60Xlcc435D3HlKsBaDIsohKp1Be_NDFHAxlVRG5ejVkOTlR_veemyqN4ag2HqGco6czBUKJjtEYw1ug%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

I'm going to be straight with you. Our mid-month deadline is tonight. If we're going to stay on track for March, we need 623 folks to step up before midnight to reach our mid-month goal.

**I cannot overstate how critical this deadline is!**
To ensure we're on track to hit our goal before this first quarterly deadline, **we first need to meet our mid-month target.**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I learned at the Naval Academy that you never get a second chance at a first impression, Peter.

Every day, I ironed my uniform, stood up straight, and put my best foot forward.

_I’m not about to start slacking off now that I’m out of the service._

**This is our ONLY CHANCE to show up strong for our FIRST quarter, and I need all hands on deck from my top freedom-loving patriots.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Our mid-month deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59 PM, and I need to know if you’re still on board with our mission to Unleash America. I said it before and I’ll say it again: this is our last chance to come out of the gates STRONG in this campaign, Peter. We need BIG numbers for our first quarter if we’re going to help elect leaders who embody the American Spirit. I can’t take everyone on my A-team, and I need to know I can depend on you. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) \-------Forwarded Message------- From: Hung Cao Date: March 14, 2023 Subject: This is our FIRST test Peter, Our mid-month deadline is TOMORROW at 11:59 PM. But this isn’t just any deadline... ... this is the FINAL deadline before our FIRST end of quarter deadline of our campaign. Our entire mission has been about helping elect strong leaders for America - so we can’t show up with WEAK end of quarter numbers. I learned at the Naval Academy that you never get a second chance at a first impression, Peter. Every day, I ironed my uniform, stood up straight, and put my best foot forward. I’m not about to start slacking off now that I’m out of the service. This is our ONLY CHANCE to show up strong for our FIRST quarter, and I need all hands on deck from my top freedom-loving patriots. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Friend, It seems that every time the wealthy and powerful create a financial crisis through their greed and risky behavior, they get bailed out by U.S. taxpayers. But when we fight for critical policies for working and low-income people, such as student debt relief and Medicare for All, we’re told we can’t afford it. In the wake of the failures of Silicon Valley Bank in California and Signature Bank in New York, I will hold President Biden to his word that no taxpayer dollars will be used to bail out these irresponsible financial institutions. I am also working with my colleagues in the House and Senate to immediately repeal the 2018 banking deregulation law, which banks spent nearly $2 billion advocating for through direct lobbying and campaign contributions in the 2018 election cycle.1 **The American people are sick of our government only addressing the interests of the wealthy and corporations while ordinary people are continuously rejected in our fight for livable wages, affordable housing, and access to higher education.** [**Pitch in today to hold these “too big to fail” banks accountable and fight for policies that support working and vulnerable people, not the rich and corporations.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zLUh_f6AyzNchCpCJyBIYXOtFFK0XzoXXD1rLRSekwoDKkgyTQ4PWz9-T0bDEHyII5Uisb3l9AtrGwUa8AQ2CI5WtmdEb-NRFVndPKnmmWMRVuw83WqbcD3lXpcGNOBoReAbHoAydFs7crJI74NCyTHRozIsxOA_uex5wCM-vEkwo5xp8vvEhZufnsfkopDhe-VjWVqLFas7lQ0fMpSq6-a6meD_uKWfU4QVT_giUTwbr2LnOFJD7jCCuW-w7-YUq0DgjJB0fhcVH-yR96iwXk34dRXJFeUsYf9LxotffnOp2krKNaOF9WXPRXvuh1wcufMvMNuwcuUEK5-Vye-H9YCexYIpdJiGkRheaJRFdBxQLwGe_fZ4DAbgIImn0bQav9w9vDoBKi2bJ6PIXop0yum0_qKsrVJe81xb4PAdDMQVC2uLDuMbT7I1xDka9NwKdB1qQ-muO-D2jA5WvdGQolsy3NgSHstxvRBDnIezBNQYP2DkEuV51L9p6HT6l-Yv5YMWkRShoXwd8X1IZa5BvCJczBaxQnHt_EMb5oyBcB6g/3ui/mMVham3BQYuNpYmSsn5dEw/h1/wsCkY2DjoivAc4qGSDWk4ZuMM13eARjHrPe_vBFsxjc) I have not been shy about taking on the big banks.**During the last session of Congress, I held executives at J.P. Morgan Chase, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, Bank of America, Morgan Stanley, and CitiGroup accountable for their lack of knowledge about how their investments in dirty fossil fuel projects are contributing to environmental racism, which lead to increases in pre-existing conditions of residents in frontline communities due to poisoning our air, water, and soil.**
JP Morgan, Citi Bank, Wells Fargo, and Bank of America alone have financed $977 billion in fossil fuel projects since the 2015 Paris Climate Agreement, including financing Marathon Petroleum in my district’s backyard.
[**Pitch in today to fight back against greedy banks that put their profits ahead of the safety of our communities and our economy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zLUh_f6AyzNchCpCJyBIYXOtFFK0XzoXXD1rLRSekwoDKkgyTQ4PWz9-T0bDEHyII01sj1RW8C_JS1ceOnYVftdSqGuNM1diqWfBFlCtuIzK5-UD5h-dgV1sPvAU5KM8TKm1Vytgi9fBM5K-m5L6ckB-0yGmn8FCnUisrvcCNRKzqawnAFgrhJKIn43KIN7Evj6HF_u5oodsVuqFfeln-iBDVCCl2ZFNsPR2G4Ke6Qfv9JdVW6OvJkb1yo466kGpHLJ_x8hd5S9EIIOx8ZAxe1N6K2U_plCh1W2jdfVjC4tSrDTzgv_zHxCyXibXhH8HFJnBvddAvQFm75XJUwdfPhiuC20Foy5-iQ8QhKWN4CKgi3mvCWiBwftsXZEGqLJYIQ5UFofApWf2fi73TsSEfksJEPmDY3YcrFRfwSRLD7_FlzfqDEBil1mCQK_gPVyn8aJ3vihnqwW6XyCq4yH3pt-uD4RYU2xqk-buIwuiJiCIYSpppQ8m_mfxUGAKKAlaliNrAEcYfAmlkL_loyd1RYNByz-GjNNUGFylgz_Tvcyg/3ui/mMVham3BQYuNpYmSsn5dEw/h3/LUHS50RuQxa1mdNvqlAZVISTZOtHdCEPC9lFJhdzRj4)

clean_body: Thank you for fighting by my side as we ensure the voices of our residents, not the Big Banks, are the ones impacting decisions in Washington, DC and in our communities. | | | Friend, It seems that every time the wealthy and powerful create a financial crisis through their greed and risky behavior, they get bailed out by U.S. taxpayers. But when we fight for critical policies for working and low-income people, such as student debt relief and Medicare for All, we’re told we can’t afford it. In the wake of the failures of Silicon Valley Bank in California and Signature Bank in New York, I will hold President Biden to his word that no taxpayer dollars will be used to bail out these irresponsible financial institutions. I am also working with my colleagues in the House and Senate to immediately repeal the 2018 banking deregulation law, which banks spent nearly $2 billion advocating for through direct lobbying and campaign contributions in the 2018 election cycle.1 The American people are sick of our government only addressing the interests of the wealthy and corporations while ordinary people are continuously rejected in our fight for livable wages, affordable housing, and access to higher education. | I have not been shy about taking on the big banks.During the last session of Congress, I held executives at J.P. Morgan Chase, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, Bank of America, Morgan Stanley, and CitiGroup accountable for their lack of knowledge about how their investments in dirty fossil fuel projects are contributing to environmental racism, which lead to increases in pre-existing conditions of residents in frontline communities due to poisoning our air, water, and soil. JP Morgan, Citi Bank, Wells Fargo, and Bank of America alone have financed $977 billion in fossil fuel projects since the 2015 Paris Climate Agreement, including financing Marathon Petroleum in my district’s backyard. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for fighting by my side as we ensure the voices of our residents, not the Big Banks, are the ones impacting decisions in Washington, DC and in our communities. In solidarity, Rashida 1 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Donald J. Trump March 14th, 2023
ICYMI: President Donald J. Trump Returns to Iowa, Lays Out His America First Agenda for 2024
On Monday, President Donald J. Trump returned to Iowa to deliver a policy-focused speech to thousands of supporters at the Adler Theater in Davenport. Despite frigid temperatures, thousands of Iowans [began lining](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMtuwyAQRb8G72LBYANZeNHUzaKp0kXVxy7CBsekYFsBy8rfF6ykErrAGZiZO7oijIstKbdAMlWV0BGcmQowUExJCYQSCnkjOgqakbYlIBnTqMBK-9-xU-MgrbqE6-ymvB1d1leYYyKwxkpIoVnJAQpOy6aRpGiEoiqzVR_C5BF9QrCPa1mWfLgF47RPKSJJ1eOGk5Aks48yjdYE06bjWm9jxkVuYh9yCMbnfXAW0f0c3MlpZWaHaK2dNBYBS9CP87XVEbbmJO-slW6S5jxE-nD8iIxD0EOIAUFFgqfBGhWvXyK8evnBj_MKe6Oik7p8e7efoJpLdq3UtBhrjWc8jumcOlgnE0tZ090qxHcIYP0HsA4BDsXu58gO34d68yLPy6ZmZbGkKDxHDbdJ_z-9Z8nvzgDx-g_6Yolk) up to welcome President Trump eleven hours before his highly anticipated arrival.

Iowans from 77 counties line up to welcome President Donald J. Trump to Davenport

President Trump started the day by joining [NEWSRADIO 1040 radio host Simon Conway](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kE1vgzAMhn9NuBURp4Rw4LCO9TCmTZM2dbcqX5R0CUEQhPrvF1A7KbLix_Ebv9YVpgUrcV4CTlSVQ4uzxFSQAckIzgETTCAVrCWgKZYSA6dUo32m9PTrW-V7btU1jLMbUuld0lWlFsBboctSFCyTSgEDISiFrMAlEySxVRfCMCHyhOAYz9L5kSvjU9NpPoZVJtJW8zCPWsXrZJzvd9L3C7_FNHAR4-CV5FOYVg1ynIM7O63M7BCptePGIqArnPw8Sh2hNGd-Z5K7gZtLH-nD56Pi-6D7EAuMsBWee2vU2j2G5vRVs8_XDXZGxfnr_O3DfoMS12Ss1LAYa81Ei7icyzrBto_4lTXtrULFAQFsfQCbdWj2h5932pyaevfCL8uupvl-WavwHGO4Dfr_6V0lvTsDVNR_RrmILg) to preview his trip and highlight his America First policies that have benefitted all Americans.

In anticipation of President Trump’s return to the Hawkeye State, 3,500 patriots packed the Adler Theater, while thousands of people overflowed outside of the venue. In total, over 16,500 grassroots sign-ups were collected by Team Trump, representing 77 of Iowa’s counties. President Trump [drew nearly 10 times the crowd](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMFuwyAMhp-G3BoFk5D0kMParId22k7TtlNFwSR0kEQNUdQ9_SDqJqEf9NnY_o015WW1pcUWaKLqAjTNElNDBixjtADKKIP0UmkGyKmUFATnSPJM4fQ9aDX0wqqrv81uTOXgkq5GUdBMM9RVSbcZZ5QjLxAFRamrIr8ktu68HyfCnggcwlmWJe3v3jicYolAYvdwZVFolHkKMg7WeCPjc-23McMiNmEO0XszpZ13lrDD7N3ZoTKzI6xBJ4wlwCOchvkmMUBpzuLBpHCjMG0f6J_jv8jQe-x9CFSsivDcW6Ni3s_XsWz3R-1X2BkVnDTFy5t9B3W5JrdajYux1ky8DGtq4wTrZkIra_S9JuWOAKz_ANYlwCnffb7y08ep2TyLdtk0vMiXGIV9UH8f8T_1USV9OANSNr_MI4nq) of his nearest challenger, who visited the area last week.

Over 3,500 people packed the Adler Theater to hear from President Trump

In his speech, President Trump highlighted the importance of protecting students from woke ideology in schools and empowering parents to make educational choices in the best interest of their children.

[USA Today](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UE1v4yAU_DX2jcg8bJwcfGjr9pKqu5eqe4sIYJsWgwW4Vv59H1a6EpoH876G0R3l7fFEmxPQUnUNDLQqTQcVsIrRBiijDA7X48BAcyolBcG5LupK6fjlB-WdsOozhXVeDtLP5YStrNFVBcOghKwbxnTLGG_beqj4iTNe2m5KaYkFeyjgBc-2bYc1iuSVuOUZSMXkww2j01vEoNUqRTLe4T0rw1BloBn23eTbb5HMPmgS5eS9JYhGarKIoF0SlgQzTikSq2MkMiSSgnCRGBeFMynvorTmDdqA0rMu9rKm-TJrZda5YL2ehbEF8ExGvwapkZTmIu6cFPMizOiQ_fXuN-NdQgmYOLJjJi_OGoVPxWJ8-oh6_LuTk1HoSd-8_rHvoK6fZejUshlrTeQtGj5mBbvHuMqa4dYV7WMBsPcB7HbCuX7898bPH-eePItxIz1v6i1n4Qkx3Rb9v_Q-5XD_GRRt_wPVE6KM) : “Trump, who spoke about a host of issues before turning to education, said he will cut federal funding for any school pushing ‘critical race theory,’ ‘transgender insanity’ or ‘any other inappropriate racial, sexual or political content on our children.’”

“‘I said the other day I will bring back parental rights into our school system, and the place went crazy,’ he said. President Trump also touted his lengthy record of fighting and winning for American farmers, and laid out exactly what he will do when he returns to the White House.

"Within hours of my inauguration, I will cancel every Biden policy that is brutalizing our farmers — every single one," [President Trump said to a roaring ovation](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kE1vwyAMhn8NuSUCk5DkkEO7rJdO22nabhXlo6WDJEqIWP_9IOsmIWM9L_i1rTrC6qYlVQskk10FmuDMdICBYkoqIJRQKM6NpqAYEYIAZ0yhEku1fI1ajgO38ubn1U2FGF127WTdMq1bIinGjLUNZmeslCYMc4yFKjPbXb2fFkR3CA7xhBCKQYXF8e9UIpJptMYbscT01yDfDHIzBp5rPjs1Jy01GS-cAknByJQRAgRXqTY9rN6dnJJmdYj2ynFjEbAEl3GdhYpQmBN_MMHdxM1liPRv_j9lHLwafBQa2iR4Gmw0o71ud0ydJZNqg1cj41x99fJm30Geb9ncySkYa83C6ri0S-pg21O0skbfO1TvEcD2D2BbCRzL_ecrO34c-_yZX0Les6oMSYWnGP19Uv9PH1WKx2SA6v4Hyy-MNQ) . "I'll appoint a special team to attack the high price of fertilizer — we'll get that taken care of.

"We won't just increase ethanol production in our country, but we'll export ethanol all over the world. And just as I did for four straight years, I will protect Iowa ethanol and I will go after anyone who wishes to destroy it."

"With the insane Green New Deal, Joe Biden is trying to totally kill Iowa ethanol. By contrast, I fought for Iowa ethanol like no president in history."

He is trying to raise taxes on farms, reinstate the death tax, and fertilizer prices are up almost 300%. Net farm income is projected to fall by 16% this year alone.

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump March 14th, 2023 ICYMI: President Donald J. Trump Returns to Iowa, Lays Out His America First Agenda for 2024 On Monday, President Donald J. Trump returned to Iowa to deliver a policy-focused speech to thousands of supporters at the Adler Theater in Davenport. Despite frigid temperatures, thousands of Iowans up to welcome President Trump eleven hours before his highly anticipated arrival. Iowans from 77 counties line up to welcome President Donald J. Trump to Davenport President Trump started the day by joining to preview his trip and highlight his America First policies that have benefitted all Americans. In anticipation of President Trump’s return to the Hawkeye State, 3,500 patriots packed the Adler Theater, while thousands of people overflowed outside of the venue. In total, over 16,500 grassroots sign-ups were collected by Team Trump, representing 77 of Iowa’s counties. President Trump of his nearest challenger, who visited the area last week. Over 3,500 people packed the Adler Theater to hear from President Trump In his speech, President Trump highlighted the importance of protecting students from woke ideology in schools and empowering parents to make educational choices in the best interest of their children. : “Trump, who spoke about a host of issues before turning to education, said he will cut federal funding for any school pushing ‘critical race theory,’ ‘transgender insanity’ or ‘any other inappropriate racial, sexual or political content on our children.’” “‘I said the other day I will bring back parental rights into our school system, and the place went crazy,’ he said. Monday’s crowd, too, reacted with when he declared, ‘As president, I’ll fight to expand that right to every single state in America.’” President Trump also touted his lengthy record of fighting and winning for American farmers, and laid out exactly what he will do when he returns to the White House. "Within hours of my inauguration, I will cancel every Biden policy that is brutalizing our farmers — every single one," . "I'll appoint a special team to attack the high price of fertilizer — we'll get that taken care of. "We won't just increase ethanol production in our country, but we'll export ethanol all over the world. And just as I did for four straight years, I will protect Iowa ethanol and I will go after anyone who wishes to destroy it." "With the insane Green New Deal, Joe Biden is trying to totally kill Iowa ethanol. By contrast, I fought for Iowa ethanol like no president in history." President Trump promised to hold China accountable and bolster American trade. “I will implement a four-year plan to phase out all Chinese imports of essential goods and gain total independence from China,” President Trump said, from the crowd. He also vowed to immediately reverse the radical and senseless policies from Joe Biden that is destroying the American farming industry. "Under Joe Biden, it has been a non-stop war on American agriculture — you know that," . "Biden reimposed the Waters of the United States rule. He reimposed it on the first day in office. He is trying to raise taxes on farms, reinstate the death tax, and fertilizer prices are up almost 300%. Net farm income is projected to fall by 16% this year alone. After his speech, President Trump answered and listened to the issues that are important in their communities. When asked about to the United States, President Trump said: “I saved so many different manufacturers. If you look at Whirlpool in Ohio, they had such a problem. South Korea was dumping, and China, thousands and thousands, millions of units in at a price that was not going to work. I ended that. I put a 50% tariff on. That part of Ohio is thriving today. Those companies are doing great. We have to look at individuals. We will be able to handle that situation very easy. Don't forget, we have a power called the economy. The problem is we have people who do not know how to use it to our collective advantage. But I know how to use it.” While in Davenport, President Trump made a surprise visit to the Machine Shed restaurant to greet local supporters. At the restaurant, President Trump , and ordered several pies to take back to Florida. Roger Barwick, a maintenance worker at the restaurant, was . "It was awesome," he told WQAD-TV. "Used to seeing him on TV. Great seeing him in person. I think he's gonna win, I think he can get us out of the big debt we got." "I think it says a lot that, you know, an individual with his title and you know, prestige that they take time out of their schedule to stop in and see the people everyday life," said Matthew Kaperka. Ahead of President Trump’s visit, he unveiled a , including from former acting U.S. Attorney General Matthew Whitaker, former Congressman Rod Blum, Iowa State Senators Jeff Reichman and Charlie McClintock, State Representatives Bobby Kaufmann, Craig Johnson, Anne Osmundson, Mark Cisneros, Steven Bradley, Derek Wulf, Heather Hora, Brad Sherman, and Cindy Golding. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. body:
Straight from my desk for you.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60236593/396477628/823540626?refcode=ea.8e6e8553-7ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.8e6e8553-7ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZlODU1My03YWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmh3qfqTd12vvZfSt9i3pTub6jnU7GF7hGwCQNHz2Fc=&emci=cb64d350-72c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8e6e8553-7ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — **I just announced plans for historic investments in North Carolina’s students, families, and workforce to ensure that success abounds in our state for generations to come.** _This is the right moment to put resources where they are needed most._ North Carolina is already a great place to live, learn, work, and raise a family — but we all know that there’s more we can do to make sure all our communities thrive. **My newly released budget meets our most urgent needs.** Our budget:
* Increases teacher pay by an average of 18% over two years, raising our teachers’ wages to the highest in the Southeast.
* Addresses the growing mental health and substance abuse crisis with a $1 billion plan.
* Expands Medicaid before the end of the fiscal year to keep our people healthy.
* Funds job training and apprenticeship programs to bolster our workforce and ensure there are skilled workers to fill good-paying jobs.
* Provides childcare stabilization grants to ensure kids can access safe, quality care and education and their parents can get back to work.
* Increases pay and improves benefits for state employees to ensure we can retain the qualified workers who power our state government.
* Grants tax breaks for middle class families while ensuring corporations and the wealthy still pay their fair share.

Peter, our budget is a responsible, balanced plan that invests in opportunities for families and communities. It saves in case of future uncertainty, with more than $7 billion in reserve in case of a downturn. _And it doesn’t raise taxes._ **[This is how we keep moving North Carolina forward. If you’re in favor of this historic investment in our state, please, stand with me today. Add your name here to show your support for our budget>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60236595/396477630/851014230?refcode=ea.8e6e8553-7ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.8e6e8553-7ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZlODU1My03YWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmh3qfqTd12vvZfSt9i3pTub6jnU7GF7hGwCQNHz2Fc=&emci=cb64d350-72c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=8e6e8553-7ac3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | [SUPPORT GOV. | Dear Peter,

**Tonight's St. Patrick's Day party has been moved to O'Neill's Irish Pub in San Mateo, **due to an unexpected power outage at Fiddler's Green in Millbrae. We hope you can still join us at our new location, O'Neill's Irish Pub! We apologize for any inconvenience.

[_We look forward to seeing you tonight at O'Neill's, 34 South B Street, San Mateo, beginning at 5:30pm._ If you haven't already RSVP'd, ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=1e65c24334&e=292fde286a)[please click here](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=81f1da0c46&e=292fde286a)[.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=17748a40be&e=292fde286a)

For more information on tonight's event and our new location, please call or text Annie Eagan at 415-269-5105.

Thanks so much for your support.
---
| Sincerely,
Kevin Mullin

The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: All Eyes on Texas Today
body:
Texas courts are where we see the assault on abortion access
---
| | | | Today, a court in Texas heard arguments about prohibiting the distribution of mifepristone, FDA-approved medication for the termination of pregnancy. This form of medication abortion makes up more than half of all abortions in our country, and if FDA approval of these pills is reversed, 40 million Americans could lose access to this safe, effective medication.
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60237206/396479800/-538144025?refcode=folf230315&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ3MTRiOS03Y2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lL4VXuIYgTT1pPkH6ZSf45_rVNsspPfH_W0SW0rm3NI=)
---
All eyes are on Texas today because the court could issue a nationwide injunction on dispensing the medication, upending the process and undoing the authority of FDA to approve safe and effective medical products. And they should stay here. **Because what we are seeing in Texas courts is the full spectrum of the assault on our freedom and the disastrous consequences for people here — and the implications for people everywhere.** Two lawsuits filed in Texas last week show the terrifying scope of what is happening here after SB 8 and the devastating consequences for Texas women. Last week, two other cases landed in Texas courts. On Wednesday, five Texas women who were denied abortions while facing medical crises because of Texas’ restrictive abortion law, and had to leave the state to get care, sued the state. On Thursday, a Texas man filed a lawsuit against friends of his ex-wife after she allegedly ended her pregnancy, claiming wrongful death and seeking more than $1 million in damages based on Texas’ draconian abortion laws passed in the last legislative session.
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60237207/396479801/-538144025?refcode=folf230315&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ3MTRiOS03Y2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lL4VXuIYgTT1pPkH6ZSf45_rVNsspPfH_W0SW0rm3NI=)
---
These lawsuits tell important stories of what is happening here. And these stories tell us just how irresponsible, dangerous, and cruel these laws are. We can and must end these terrible laws in our legislature. The way we do that is by winning elections. [_**That’s why our work together — on this campaign and campaigns across the state and the country — is so vital. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60237208/396479802/-538144025?refcode=folf230315&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ3MTRiOS03Y2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lL4VXuIYgTT1pPkH6ZSf45_rVNsspPfH_W0SW0rm3NI=) I will continue doing everything I can to protect our freedom — freedoms that are under attack not only in Texas but everywhere. I’m proud of my work in Congress to defend our fundamental right to make our own decisions about our bodies, our families, and our futures. And I am going to work to make sure that we hold this seat, win back the House, and elect more pro-choice champions everywhere we can. [_**I hope you will help, too. If you are able, a contribution today would be a great place to start.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60237209/396479803/-538144025?refcode=folf230315&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ3MTRiOS03Y2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lL4VXuIYgTT1pPkH6ZSf45_rVNsspPfH_W0SW0rm3NI=) Together, we can do anything,
---

| | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60237210/396479804/927702936?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ3MTRiOS03Y2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lL4VXuIYgTT1pPkH6ZSf45_rVNsspPfH_W0SW0rm3NI=)**

name: Pramila's iPhone
subject: The very first day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
From the very first day I launched my campaign for Congress, we've been a 100% grassroots movement. When I was elected in 2016, I was one of just **_four**_ Members of Congress who refused corporate PAC contributions.
Since coming to Congress, I have watched and seen what's possible when our movement campaigns, organizes, _and_ fundraises around a people-first agenda.
**Politics and policy should not be bought.** That's why **_I've never accepted a penny from corporate PACs.**_ I was not elected to serve Exxon, Shell, Pfizer, Starbucks, and Amazon — or their CEOs. I was elected to serve you.
That's why our movement is powered by people like you, Peter. **_Every single contribution**_ helps us continue expanding our progressive coalition and building real political power.
I'm reaching out to you today with a personal request — and a link my team made just for you. **Will you use the link below to donate today and fuel our grassroots movement?**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-request?refcode=em-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40886?refcode=em20230315-2275&t=1&akid=2275%2E420207%2EkMoPR1)**
Thank you for being a critical part of our ever-growing progressive movement.
In solidarity,
Pramila
(Sent from my iPhone)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230315-2275-footer&t=2&refcode2=2275_420207_kMoPR1&akid=2275%2E420207%2EkMoPR1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2275%2E420207%2EkMoPR1)

name: Kelly Burton
subject: the honor of a lifetime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
I’m so excited about this next phase of NDRC’s work
|
---

Team, I wanted to let you know that, after six incredible years, I’ll be stepping down as President of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee.

I helped found the NDRC in 2017 because I believed in Attorney General Eric Holder’s plan to stop Republicans from gerrymandering in 2021-2022 the way they did in 2011-2012. It was the first time ever that Democrats were developing a comprehensive national strategy to combat GOP map manipulation.

In the years since, grassroots supporters like you have helped the NDRC execute an incredibly effective strategy. We’ve held map-manipulating politicians accountable, helped elect Democracy Defenders, passed fair redistricting reforms, and more. These efforts helped secure the fairest congressional map in 40 years!

**We have a lot to be proud of, team. But the fight for fair maps continues.**

Redistricting litigation is happening right now in more than a dozen states, monumental redistricting decisions will be coming from the Supreme Court later this year, and Republicans are still determined to politicize the courts and gerrymander their way to power.

It’s clear that redistricting is no longer a once-in-a-decade phenomenon. As we enter this next phase of the work, I look forward to continuing to serve the NDRC as a Board Member and strategic advisor. **But before I take that step, I have one more ask – an ask that, as a supporter of our work, you undoubtedly have heard from me before:

[_Will you make a contribution to my final grassroots fundraising email on behalf of the NDRC? There remains work to do and your contribution will help ensure we have the resources we need to get it done._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60237951/396482009/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230315_FR_3i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzOTUwOWQwLTdlYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0dgdqlNQ_9XnmqLVbRFaj7mwZegZcq_K0Ms-pRsSr3s=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I’m so excited about this next phase of NDRC’s work | Team, I wanted to let you know that, after six incredible years, I’ll be stepping down as President of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. I helped found the NDRC in 2017 because I believed in Attorney General Eric Holder’s plan to stop Republicans from gerrymandering in 2021-2022 the way they did in 2011-2012. It was the first time ever that Democrats were developing a comprehensive national strategy to combat GOP map manipulation. In the years since, grassroots supporters like you have helped the NDRC execute an incredibly effective strategy. We’ve held map-manipulating politicians accountable, helped elect Democracy Defenders, passed fair redistricting reforms, and more. These efforts helped secure the fairest congressional map in 40 years! We have a lot to be proud of, team. But the fight for fair maps continues. Redistricting litigation is happening right now in more than a dozen states, monumental redistricting decisions will be coming from the Supreme Court later this year, and Republicans are still determined to politicize the courts and gerrymander their way to power. It’s clear that redistricting is no longer a once-in-a-decade phenomenon. As we enter this next phase of the work, I look forward to continuing to serve the NDRC as a Board Member and strategic advisor. But before I take that step, I have one more ask – an ask that, as a supporter of our work, you undoubtedly have heard from me before: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Working for former Attorney General Eric Holder and helping to lead this incredible grassroots team has been the honor of a lifetime. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The foundation of this movement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

You are the foundation of this movement,
Peter.

Because we don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, your grassroots support
means a whole lot to us — it’s what keeps us going in times like now, when
many grassroots organizations and nonprofits are having a tough time
financially.

We have a lot of exciting plans for this year — right now, we’re laser
focused on candidate recruitment and ensuring we select the best possible
leaders to build the Squad in 2024 — but we can’t get anything done
without having the funds to execute those plans.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131073?refcode=em20230315-28001&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28001%2E1203867%2EVkbpDh ]We’re counting on four more grassroots supporters from 18326
to rush in and chip in $3 before tonight’s mid-month
fundraising deadline — will you make a contribution now,
Peter?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131073?refcode=em20230315-28001&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28001%2E1203867%2EVkbpDh ]Contribute $3

Every single dollar we raise from our grassroots base goes to work helping
us to send more working-class champions like Cori Bush, AOC, Jamaal
Bowman, and Summer Lee to Congress.

When the DCCC and their corporate candidates are behind on fundraising,
they call on wealthy donors and corporate PACs for contributions — but
unlike the establishment, we rely on grassroots contributions from all
over the country to make up the difference.

Our grassroots supporters come from communities nationwide — not just the
wealthiest zip codes.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131073?refcode=em20230315-28001&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28001%2E1203867%2EVkbpDh ]Will you be one of four donors from 18326 to chip in before
our mid-month deadline tonight?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131073?refcode=em20230315-28001&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1040&akid=28001%2E1203867%2EVkbpDh ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1041&akid=28001%2E1203867%2EVkbpDh ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1042&akid=28001%2E1203867%2EVkbpDh ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230315-28001-footer&t=1043&refcode2=28001_1203867_VkbpDh&akid=28001%2E1203867%2EVkbpDh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1044&akid=28001%2E1203867%2EVkbpDh

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
This campaign is sustained by donations from less than 5% of Ruben’s supporters. Most coming from emails like this.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60238136/396482191/754863273?refcode=em_header&refcode2=b604d286-7fc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=6pi+JGXLDZRG1HFvxnulKIXZV3SQLPyLq5VN/YXQR3pqAJFUKpYepzuK2geyT+VHKhyC+Spwdsq+qImjFRKZ9A==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODQzNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA0ZDI4Ni03ZmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8WWS_tsbN1WjViHVApsXQvtSFslyT3HdwdcsdrQo4A=)
Peter -
Please don’t click away — it’s getting late and we’re short of our mid-month fundraising goals... 😬
If everyone reading this email donated $3, we would CRUSH our mid-month fundraising goals and file an FEC report that absolutely shocked the world.
Unfortunately, not everyone gives. So we’re relying on people who understand how important this race is to give before midnight. 🧠
Ruben doesn’t do as many big-dollar fundraisers as Senator Sinema. This campaign is sustained by donations from less than 5% of Ruben’s supporters. Most coming from emails like this. 📧

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60238178/396482290/-1227659829?amount=20&contactdata=Nt547rxV27stFBvA61GpBY2YBX+lS5XnTFJYYtiXwv7WuLr2+gIxnrNr72fEU2uByTZ/8FGQzxFlsHaCoRNIbI3+wAVrttesKsQhvfnuljzA4FlmzehT9ZXiCPH6FRsbmvETt0V68dEdrSJyqiHoiQ==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230315_FR_1.1_0_1MO_katherineclark_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTY4YmFiZS03ZmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1T1CE-TSJrZ2lqdLufFHYWafqFgRU-Osq6gBI69f9U=)

Happy Women’s History Month!

My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber.

Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!**

I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color.

**And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher.**

**[That’s why I’m writing to you today. We need strong women in Congress, and I’m asking you to support that effort by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Sharice Davids' campaign to elect more women into office.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60238179/396482291/-1227659829?amount=20&contactdata=Nt547rxV27stFBvA61GpBY2YBX+lS5XnTFJYYtiXwv7WuLr2+gIxnrNr72fEU2uByTZ/8FGQzxFlsHaCoRNIbI3+wAVrttesKsQhvfnuljzA4FlmzehT9ZXiCPH6FRsbmvETt0V68dEdrSJyqiHoiQ==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230315_FR_1.1_0_1MO_katherineclark_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTY4YmFiZS03ZmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1T1CE-TSJrZ2lqdLufFHYWafqFgRU-Osq6gBI69f9U=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Sharice Davids and Katherine Clark and will process immediately.

Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.

Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we _all_ do better.

**Together, Sharice and I will continue the fight for gender equity and women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve.**

**[So please, if you can afford to, split a contribution today between my campaign and Sharice's and help us fulfill the country’s promise of equality and opportunity for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60238191/396482298/-1227659829?amount=20&contactdata=Nt547rxV27stFBvA61GpBY2YBX+lS5XnTFJYYtiXwv7WuLr2+gIxnrNr72fEU2uByTZ/8FGQzxFlsHaCoRNIbI3+wAVrttesKsQhvfnuljzA4FlmzehT9ZXiCPH6FRsbmvETt0V68dEdrSJyqiHoiQ==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230315_FR_1.1_0_1MO_katherineclark_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTY4YmFiZS03ZmMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1T1CE-TSJrZ2lqdLufFHYWafqFgRU-Osq6gBI69f9U=)**

Thank you for your support! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America.

All my best,

— Katherine

Representative Katherine Clark

clean_body: | = Happy Women’s History Month! My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip. When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber. Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different. There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone! I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color. And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Sharice Davids and Katherine Clark and will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good. Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we all do better. Together, Sharice and I will continue the fight for gender equity and women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve. = Thank you for your support! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America. All my best, — Katherine Representative Katherine Clark Massachusetts 5th Congressional District Democratic Whip | = * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. 1. Team Ilhan's mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight.

subject: Last week’s ‘Moore from Moore’ video update
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60238972/396484029/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJiZmZiMC04MWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKxLXm5uwkuhRliyyl45la2y2eumWx3k8hl-x3JET2E=&emci=d2afa5fa-75c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=85bbffb0-81c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Hey friends, Last week’s Moore from Moore video comes to you from Washington, D.C., where I joined local, state, and federal leaders from Maryland to make it clear that Prince George’s County is the perfect home for the new FBI headquarters. [**Watch last week’s video update here for more information on our efforts to bring the Bureau to Maryland, and more!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60238973/396484030/-803653937?v=ty56L11v4aw&ab_channel=GovernorWesMoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJiZmZiMC04MWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKxLXm5uwkuhRliyyl45la2y2eumWx3k8hl-x3JET2E=&emci=d2afa5fa-75c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=85bbffb0-81c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60238974/396484031/-803653937?v=ty56L11v4aw&ab_channel=GovernorWesMoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJiZmZiMC04MWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKxLXm5uwkuhRliyyl45la2y2eumWx3k8hl-x3JET2E=&emci=d2afa5fa-75c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=85bbffb0-81c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Here’s what else my administration and I were up to last week:
* Aruna and I visited students and faculty at Frederick Community College, one of Maryland’s great local community colleges. Our budget proposes historic investments in education, including $393 million for our state’s 15 community colleges like this one.

* I announced the development of a new Home Chef manufacturing and distribution center in Baltimore City, creating 500 new jobs for Marylanders.

* My family (including our new puppy Tucker!) and I joined other families and firefighters at the Annapolis St. Patrick’s Day Parade for a fun celebration.

I hope you’ll continue to tune in and follow our administration’s progress as we continue our work to move Maryland forward and leave no one behind.
Elevate,
Wes

Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.

name: Conor McGuire
subject: In case you missed it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60239459/396484231/-972986530?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230315mm1_cm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDRiOWJmNi04MWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oG5-54Z5sNTEHFc6lsMwHJTxrevZ4hLeE0z6uXM2uRA=)
---
Team, In case you missed it, the DCCC named Gabe a Frontline Member last week — he is the most vulnerable Democrat up for re-election in one of the nation’s most competitive House races next year. **On top of that, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just named NM-02 one of their 37 TOP TARGET seats they’re trying to flip in 2024.** The far-right isn’t just trying to defend their House majority — they’re doing everything in their power to expand it so they can successfully pass dangerous legislation to rip away reproductive choice, workers’ rights, LGBTQ rights, and more. The lack of progress coming out of this Republican-controlled Congress just goes to show that we _need_ to flip the House if we’re going to improve the lives of people across New Mexico and the country, and that means protecting Gabe’s crucial toss-up seat here in NM-02. **Our campaign is only two weeks away from our very first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2023** — it’s our first major test of this election cycle, and we need to put up big numbers to show the people still stand with Gabe. **[Can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us reach this critical fundraising goal before midnight on March 31? clean_body: | = Team, In case you missed it, the DCCC named Gabe a Frontline Member last week — he is the most vulnerable Democrat up for re-election in one of the nation’s most competitive House races next year. On top of that, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just named NM-02 one of their 37 TOP TARGET seats they’re trying to flip in 2024. The far-right isn’t just trying to defend their House majority — they’re doing everything in their power to expand it so they can successfully pass dangerous legislation to rip away reproductive choice, workers’ rights, LGBTQ rights, and more. The lack of progress coming out of this Republican-controlled Congress just goes to show that we need to flip the House if we’re going to improve the lives of people across New Mexico and the country, and that means protecting Gabe’s crucial toss-up seat here in NM-02. Our campaign is only two weeks away from our very first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 — it’s our first major test of this election cycle, and we need to put up big numbers to show the people still stand with Gabe. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = This is the first time our fundraising numbers will go public this year, so let’s make it clear to both our allies and opponents that Gabe’s not going anywhere! name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Today’s Announcement by the Texas Education Association.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Friend,
As many of you know today the Texas Education Authority announced it was seizing control of Houston Independent School District. Let me be clear, we are strongly opposed to these actions by the Texas Education Authority.
I stand with Mayor Turner and many other local leaders in strong opposition to this announcement. We as Houstonians will continue to advocate for our kids and public interests here in Houston.
Onward,
Amanda K. Edwards

name: DID YOU SEE? via Team Wiley
subject: time is ALMOST up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Did you see yesterday’s email? Our deadline tonight may not seem like a big deal, but in all reality, every single deadline from now until Election Day 2024 is important. At the end of this month, Bo Hines and the far right will see what they are up against. We want them to know they’re up against a force. Chip in a donation of any amount right NOW and help us show up strong → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230315-email] Thanks, Team Wiley ----- Original Message ----- https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230315-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230315-email]Hi there, Peter. As I’m sure you know by now, we have a deadline at midnight tomorrow. http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230315-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230315-email] With just 1 day to go, I wanted to come directly to you with an update: we still have $1,642 left to go to reach our $2,500 goal. Can you rush in a $5 donation right now to help us close the gap? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230315-email&amount=5] Wiley is hard at work defending the rights of North Carolinians in Congress, and he has big goals for his time in office. But in order for him to keep up the hard work expanding access to affordable health care, addressing our country’s affordable housing crisis, and fighting for families, we have to reach our campaign’s fundraising goals. This month is the most important one we have had so far this cycle. In just a matter of weeks, all of our fundraising numbers will be published. When Bo Hines and the GOP see our totals, we have to send the message that our campaign is not one to be messed with. That’s where you all come in: can you help us reach this $2,500 goal by midnight tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-mm?refcode=230315-email] Thank you, Mariah Morgan Finance Director Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

That’s where you all come in: can you help us reach this $2,500 goal by midnight tomorrow? [] Thank you, Mariah Morgan Finance Director Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

>> [] Follow Wiley Online: [] [] [] Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Is Your Representative on the List?
body:
Stacey Abrams has a new job! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkixud-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Wednesday![Do you agree with Ron DeSantis?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-t/) **U.S. Double Billed** **[The US government may have paid twice for grants it doled out to fund research at labs in Wuhan, China](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-i/),** according to a newly launched federal probe that found tens of millions of dollars in potentially fraudulent payments. **Is Your Rep. on the List?** The [**National Republican Congressional Committee released a list**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-d/) on Monday of dozens of House seats currently held by vulnerable Democrats they're looking to flip in the 2024 election. **Facebook Said Border Was Open** The massive group of migrants that swarmed the border on Sunday **[were motivated by a online rumor that the border was open](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-h/)** and would welcome them in. **Executive Order on Gun Sales** Biden is expected to**[announce an executive order that would expand background checks to more firearm sales](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-k/) **by expanding the statutory definition of a firearms dealer, **It's About Time** The [**Treasury Department is giving the House Oversight Committee access to suspicious activity reports (SARs) related to Hunter Biden**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-u/) and the Biden family's foreign business deals. **We Must Protect the Children** **[Biden thinks it's cruel and sinful to refuse sex change operations for children](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-o/)** and wants a federal law to prevent red states from outlawing the procedures on kids under 18. **Stacey Abrams New Job** Stacey Abrams has announced**[she will be joining an environmental advocacy dark money group](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-x/) **that is pushing to regulate and ban natural gas-powered stoves.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* **[Helping out](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-c/)** a friend.
* Today's **[generation.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-q/)**
* I'm **[coming in hot](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-a/).**
* That **[face you make.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkixud-trhiujldw-f/)**

800 Washington Ave Ste C

| Dear Peter,

**Tonight's St. Patrick's Day party has been moved to O'Neill's Irish Pub in San Mateo, **due to an unexpected power outage at Fiddler's Green in Millbrae. We hope you can still join us at our new location, O'Neill's Irish Pub! We apologize for any inconvenience.

[_We look forward to seeing you tonight at O'Neill's, 34 South B Street, San Mateo, beginning at 5:30pm._ If you haven't already RSVP'd, ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=2f84ca2505&e=292fde286a)[please click here](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=457c21d05a&e=292fde286a)[.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=3cb8dfea17&e=292fde286a)

For more information on tonight's event and our new location, please call or text Annie Eagan at 415-269-5105.

Thanks so much for your support.
---
| Sincerely,
Kevin Mullin

Peter,
Lately, it seems we’ve been focusing a lot on our southern neighbors in Mexico, and how their country is affecting ours through Biden’s open border policies.
Now, it seems even their election systems are affecting ours – Mexico has a President dead-set on rigging elections so that he can never be voted out of office.
---

That’s scary as it is, but the scariest part is that the same stunts are being pulled right here in the U.S.
Sometimes it can be hard to tell what’s going on, especially as these campaign finance laws and “ethics” systems masquerade as “democracy.” But make no mistake – it’s tyranny.
At Preserve Democracy, our goal and passion are to fight for election integrity by exposing this kind of manipulation in America.
We work to do that in a number of ways:

* Equipping Americans to protect election integrity
* Increasing voter turnout
* Educating citizens at all levels on how to spot election manipulations

We believe this is a cause every American should be passionate about, and we’d like to invite you to join our team to ensure free and fair elections for generations to come.

name: HER Time Abortion Alert
subject: This just happened:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60244694/396486704/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzVjODM4MWQtODVjMy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BFS5YduIqbKQ-_LiPgL_G-uePfsOPINTOJJ6fZAg8N0=)
---
Peter – Earlier today, a conservative federal judge is holding a hearing on the legality of mifepristone, one drug of the two-step abortion pill regimen — the most common form of abortion in the country. The case was brought by a group of extremist anti-choice activists who are using shoddy science to claim the drug — which has been used safely by hundreds of thousands of women — should lose its FDA approval. **Once again, our human rights and bodily autonomy are in the hands of a conservative, white, anti-choice man, who nobody elected.** We’re bracing for the outcome of this case, and in order to prepare for all possible scenarios, are building up an action fund to fight back. Whatever the result, we’ll be working hard to restore reproductive rights in this country. name: Jason Crow
subject: My birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Folks — it’s Jason. I’m sure your inbox is as filled as mine, so I’ll make this quick.

Tonight is our last mid-month deadline of the quarter. This marks the halfway point of the month — and just two weeks before our important FEC deadline.

We’re required to publicly disclose our fundraising numbers at the end of this month. Reporters, dark money donors, and even potential opponents will be watching to see the strength of our grassroots movement. I know we can hit it out of the park.

Use this secure link to donate: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-march-2023 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-march-2023]

Thank you for your support,

— Jason

P.S. For all those who have wished me a happy birthday today — thank you! I’ll be celebrating 44 with a cold beer. Cheers to that! 🍻

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We'll be real with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If you get emails from any other campaigns or political groups, we know that sometimes they can make deadlines feel like the sky is falling.
#
Hi Derek,
If you get emails from any other campaigns or political groups, we know that sometimes they can make deadlines feel like the sky is falling. We know, because we get them too. They're basically like:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230315-1?refcode=em20230315-1-8291&refcode2=8291_434096_s517tC&akid=8291%2E434096%2Es517tC)
**Here on Team Fetterman, we don't want to do that.** So we'll be real with you: At the end of this month, we're facing a real Federal Election Commission deadline. Online fundraising is the main way we power John's work, so we're reaching out to see if you can chip in today.
**[Can you show your support + help us reach our $25,000 mid-month goal by making your very first donation to our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230315-1?refcode=em20230315-1-8291&refcode2=8291_434096_s517tC&akid=8291%2E434096%2Es517tC)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230315-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230315-8291&refcode2=8291_434096_s517tC&akid=8291%2E434096%2Es517tC)**
We're hoping to see as many folks from PA as we can on our FEC report when we file. **[If you can chip in anything at all, we'd be extremely grateful.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230315-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230315-8291&refcode2=8291_434096_s517tC&akid=8291%2E434096%2Es517tC)**
Thanks for being on our team (and reading our emails!), Derek. 💛
Together.
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230315-8291-footer&t=1&refcode2=8291_434096_s517tC&akid=8291%2E434096%2Es517tC)**

| | Peter,

We’re running the numbers, and after we saw an outpouring of support today, we think we could have our best showing yet this year.

However, we’re seeing donations slowing down, and the trend line is concerning.

[_**Please, rush a donation right now to help us turn things around before our midnight deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60245145/396487223/710125701?refcode=20230315.3_GADFT_3AE_ND&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjljZTY2My04NWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0NNkJeYqLf9XpsfBoaWhuCr8ejMGHJvWvp4MVe9L5mk=)

This is a critical goal in the fight to keep Georgia blue in 2024, flip the House, hold the presidency, and defeat MAGA extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene.

clean_body: What to expect next: | | | | | Friend, Inside Elections just made their prediction for the state of NJ-07’s 2024 Congressional race: What this means for you: Once again, the race in New Jersey’s Seventh Congressional District will be a battle like no other—anyone’s game once Big Money Democrat Backers take notice...which they already have. And if their big money WINS, you can bet this will mean trouble for NJ07 and our nation with the Left’s Reckless Tax and Spend proposals—not to mention—a Broke and Woke Progressive Agenda that has supercharged the IRS and led our nation towards an ever-looming-recession. A “pure toss-up” rating means this is going to be close—and we can’t afford a rerun of what’s on the other side of that. | | We’ll get straight to the point: Ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight, we wanted to give you an update about the Georgia legislature’s extremist attacks. We’ve already seen the incredible impact this people-powered team has when we come together: Through our work and the work of Georgia voting rights activists, we killed a major anti-voting bill last week. But we still need to stop bills that would undermine election administration, threaten criminal justice reform, and ban trans youth from accessing vital health care. The strength of our advocacy depends on what we raise during key fundraising moments like this. [_**We’re just hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline and we’re counting on your support to exceed our $15,000 goal. This latest round of attacks on our elections and the LGBTQ+ community is part of a national trend of extremist politicians suppressing the voices of voters and targeting marginalized communities. We cannot and will not let this stand.
It’s clear that extremist lawmakers in Georgia are using the same playbook as they did in recent years, with the passage of SB 202, a voter suppression law, and HB 1084, a law banning transgender students from competing on sports teams.
**For them, they are simply picking up where they left off. For us, it means coming together and fighting back against yet more attacks on fundamental freedoms.**
[_**The fight ahead will not be easy, so we need the strength of this entire team alongside us. Can you rush a donation right now to help exceed our $15,000 mid-month goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60245787/396487432/641727787?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230315_f_mm2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc4MThjYS04NWMzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L2IdJwUFyDt_C_EcBzh9DOujvYbVUAFD7-z22sW8V84=)

clean_body: This moment requires the strength of this entire grassroots team. | | | We’ll get straight to the point: Ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight, we wanted to give you an update about the Georgia legislature’s extremist attacks. We’ve already seen the incredible impact this people-powered team has when we come together: Through our work and the work of Georgia voting rights activists, we killed a major anti-voting bill last week. But we still need to stop bills that would undermine election administration, threaten criminal justice reform, and ban trans youth from accessing vital health care. The strength of our advocacy depends on what we raise during key fundraising moments like this. = | = = = = = This latest round of attacks on our elections and the LGBTQ+ community is part of a national trend of extremist politicians suppressing the voices of voters and targeting marginalized communities. We cannot and will not let this stand. It’s clear that extremist lawmakers in Georgia are using the same playbook as they did in recent years, with the passage of SB 202, a voter suppression law, and HB 1084, a law banning transgender students from competing on sports teams. For them, they are simply picking up where they left off. For us, it means coming together and fighting back against yet more attacks on fundamental freedoms. = Thanks so much, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Derek, Republicans are trying to reverse our progress on equality and inclusion in public education. Just last year, **Youngkin’s education plan excluded several crucial lessons about the history of racism in our country and the culture of black and brown people. The policy also removed LGBTQ history from the curriculum.** This past September, Youngkin enacted a policy forcing transgender and gender non-conforming students to use the restroom of their gender assigned at birth. **The GOP wants to rewrite history and put their radical theories and beliefs in our children’s textbooks.** They’re trying to invalidate our students' identity, stripping away their sense of security and wellbeing. We cannot let this happen. A Democratic General Assembly is the only way to prevent the worst of Glenn Youngkin’s ideals from being education policy in Virginia. Friend,
---
| Right before I was inaugurated in 2017, Chuck Schumer issued a threat to me on live TV.
---
| _**He said I should be careful challenging the Deep State, because the Deep State has “six ways from Sunday at getting back at you.”**_
---
| But that’s the battle I signed up for.
---
| I didn’t run for president to play nice and be careful. I ran to expose corruption and fight for justice.

| And believe me, the Deep State found far more than six ways to exact revenge...
---
| **...They raided my home, intimidated my family and associates, impeached me twice, slandered me with a fabricated dossier, spied on my private communications, accused me of being a Russian asset, and dragged me through _countless_ witch hunts.**

| _But there’s a much more powerful force to be reckoned with than the Deep State – and that’s the force of our MASSIVE grassroots movement._
