Beware the Ides of March!
**WATCH MY INTERVIEW WITH STEVE BANNON[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/3e22f22e-48b4-48ef-9384-320935d8aff7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): **
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e22f22e-48b4-48ef-9384-320935d8aff7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
March 15, the Ides of March, will forever be associated with the **assassination of Julius Caesar, who was stabbed to death inside the Roman Senate by 40-60 conspirators who were led by Brutus.**
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TlmEjpe5neqbFhqPoi2llySDg9mCPxRoOr05_KxoQ_Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=108608176)
Ultimately, Caesar'a death resulted in a string of Civil Wars, and ended with the death of the Roman Republic.
In many ways, we are on the same trajectory here in the United States. Our Republic is on life support, and on could argue that we are in the middle of a political civil war in our country, with both political parties also experiencing factions among party leadership and their respective bases.
Today, I joined Steve Bannon on War Room to discuss the Ides of March, and why on June 17, 2017, nearly 6 years ago, I stormed the stage of the New York Public Theatre's production of Julius Caesar during Shakespeare in the Park in New York City's iconic Central Park.
Thank you for reading LOOMER UNLEASHED. This post is public so feel free to share it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=108608176&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA4NjA4MTc2LCJpYXQiOjE2Nzg5MjQyODUsImV4cCI6MTY4MTUxNjI4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.G3qt4oX5-aJx3CXS0fkPYwLy4uz-XxtPr3yK1W4ZnHs)
The production of Julius Caesar put on by the New York Public Theatre portrayed Caesar as a Trump look alike, while the character of Caesar's wife, Calpernia, was modeled off of Melania Trump.
Making matters even worse, the production was funded by New York Tax payers, as well as corporate sponsors. In 2017, at the time of this production in New York City, I was living in New York and was a New York Tax payer. President Donald Trump was also a New York resident and taxpayer, and he had been inaugurated to his first term as President of the United States only five months prior.
For week, the mainstream media ran headline after headline about this assassination porn play, and each night, every Fox News Pundit Harped on about how outraged they were over the production that incited violence against President Trump.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c2733080-d250-4ecd-8c89-79ec7df08b62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I decided to put an end to the Trump assassination porn since everybody else only preferred to complain about it. I bought a ticket from a ticket scalper in Central Park for $500 cash since tickets were sold out, I waited for the production to begin, and during the production, I stormed the stage during the assassination scene and shut it down.
While I was on stage, I called for the New York Public Theatre to "STOP THE NORMALIZATION OF POLITICAL VIOLENCE AGAINST THE RIGHT!"
And I also shouted, "THIS IS INCITEMENT OF VIOLENCE AGAINST DONALD TRUMP.
Shortly after doing so, I was arrested by NYPD and charged with trespassing and disorderly conduct. Days later, I was interviewed by Sean Hannity on Fox News about why I decided to protest the production of Julius Caesar.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b1780fcf-c497-4070-84dd-7d3a12fa4da8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Years later, the Left is still inciting violence against the right, and our Republic is closer to failing than ever before!
Beware the Ides of March!

Thank you for your support! I truly appreciate it._

clean_body: before we send out our next shipment, we wanted to give you a chance to claim yours before it’s too late | | | | | When we re-launched our membership cards, we had no idea they would be so popular! So before we send out our next shipment, we wanted to give you a chance to claim yours before it’s too late! ** Right now is the BEST time to claim your official 2023 DLCC membership card. Here’s why: We have no off years at the DLCC – with the Virginia House and Senate in play this fall and Republicans dumping six figures into critical special elections, it’s crucial that we have grassroots members behind us! And President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden know that electing Democrats up and down the ballot is the key to defending democracy and building back a better America.**But, we need help from our supporters to keep up with massive Republican efforts to crush state Democrats. As an official member of our team, you’ll help us win these competitive elections, support our caucuses year-round, and spread Democratic power in our target states! That’s why we’re counting on you. It’s never too early to take a stand against Republican extremism and accelerate our progress in the states! So, we have to ask: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks for sticking with us!
